name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Sorry to bother you so late
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This is my least favorite part of the job.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2498%2E35263%2EfTHiNx)
Peter — Sorry to bother you so late on a Saturday. I’ll be honest, asking for donations is my least favorite part of the job. But my campaign team tells me it’s absolutely necessary if we’re going to break the polling tie in my race and keep up with the flood of Republican spending we’re up against. My megamillionaire opponent cut his campaign a whopping $8 million check last quarter, and has already spent over $4 million of it on campaign ads. He’s pledged to self-fund to the tune of $20 million, so there will be even more where that came from... **I simply don’t have the ability to self-fund like Eric Hovde can.** But whoever has more resources to get their message out will likely win this 50-50 race, so we need every bit of help to fight back. **[The last thing I want to do is bother you more over the weekend, so I’m hoping you can help us close the gap toward our April fundraising goal tonight. So if you’re able, will you chip in today to help me defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240427_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2498%2E35263%2EfTHiNx)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-apr24.Xs9pUr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240427_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2498%2E35263%2EfTHiNx)

* I’m now officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate.
* GOP megadonors like the Koch network are pouring millions of dollars into this race to defeat me.
* The _Cook Political Report_ just _downgraded_ my race from "lean Democrat" to a "Toss Up."

**My race in Nevada is key to winning Senate control, but I can't protect my seat without the help of grassroots supporters like you. So please, I'm humbly asking:** **[Will you pitch in $5 or more right now so we can hit our end-of-month goal, keep Nevada blue, and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83860661/469738987/2034486384?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3750-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTc2MGRhMy1mMzA0LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XId2CEmSOmyjw6ZIUqYb9mVs7zxs7JPGSgWD1k5nflY=)**

Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. +------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|Derek — |
|Adam’s end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up in a few days, and|
|we’re counting on this team to step up to support his campaign. |

|To reach voters across the Golden State, we need this grassroots team to|
|pitch in. $5, $10, or $50 can help us connect with undecided voters to |

|this November. |
| |

| |

Since the overturning of Roe v. Wade it’s been abundantly clear that the far-right extremist, Trump-appointed justices on the Supreme Court _cannot_ be trusted with our rights.
They are limiting reproductive freedom, targeting access to birth control and attacking in vitro fertilization all across the nation. And now, we’re waiting on SCOTUS to decide the fate of abortion pill mifepristone.
**When it comes to our personal freedoms, we can't trust extremist, conservative justices to make the right decisions.** **And with Trump as the GOP presidential nominee — _the stakes have never been higher_.**
That's why it's critical for us to know if you approve of SCOTUS.

subject: quick math problem for you…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
| | | ⚠️ **SLAM THE BREAKS**** on Biden's Radical Green Agenda! **⚠️**
** _**[**> >> DONATE TO OUR APRIL FUNDRAISING GOAL <<<**](http://links.theconservativewins.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e006e7926372403584f5c8579dd021dc&_e=vzBkBxmwvLdG-7kOZijmxpgMhLhTMw05AUi3Y1YAFI3PLVB9DeZAyJXtDeyrkNvjrJ9RueVZLpsl8ML_x52Oaio0CJzhNnfzu0akD8v9wgpjsqAcDMZ-Fizcm4eGb-qKUr4eBSjKb-G4ZOT4fOx8lFvJmurK7vrhfavkw_ftwqbRmL68f04KS1EPkSOweaWhYEjXLeqoHwxn2CVf9wwgrPlD1rzBDnuaYtlgMm15OX6AhYNs47pjp9-VuublcVxNFH0yaEKSoZ8tQ_qXuD_MlSblG7XoJE7VTed42fgLHTjKrre15pQ-jhzKZI6LhqxHmZwbdCEZoTTmC3YiUQ3axhW7yXdQAj1nAcnPor5BhO6Nuu0q9YBu_HL5vRlUANLSHTrHNDmamrUzByXS_2wu6bUpelzC9QJ8Iut2HzD0TrprhMGmm980XLusETDzaY8k2-fTAOyJBOa79jB6fYoKxQ%3D%3D)**_
---
| | Fellow American, Quick math problem for you:
* Right now, electric vehicles represent about **8.4%** of the American market.
* Joe Biden wants to push that number to**70%** in less than a decade.

_How will he make that happen when most American consumers report that they aren 't interested in buying an EV?_ **I 'll tell you the answer: President Biden plans to force EVs down our throats in an exercise of raw executive power.** His new EPA rule will strongarm American consumers into buying electric vehicles, regardless of whether they can afford it. _**[That's wrong -- and that's why I just joined a 25-state coalition to block this insane emissions rule.](http://links.theconservativewins.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e006e7926372403584f5c8579dd021dc&_e=vzBkBxmwvLdG-7kOZijmxpgMhLhTMw05AUi3Y1YAFI3PLVB9DeZAyJXtDeyrkNvjrJ9RueVZLpsl8ML_x52Oaio0CJzhNnfzu0akD8v9wgpjsqAcDMZ-Fizcm4eGb-qKUr4eBSjKb-G4ZOT4fOx8lFvJmurK7vrhfavkw_ftwqbRmL68f04KS1EPkSOweaWhYEjXLeqoHwxn2CVf9wwgrPlD1rzBDnuaYtlgMm15OX6AhYNs47pjp9-VuublcVxNFH0yaEKSoZ8tQ_qXuD_MlSblG7XoJE7VTed42fgLHTgtWh4M2hwkqG6c7kcbzefF1t-lk_aT0bTscYzgKiA4xB4wrxWlXL3Yn7M-YzwRcs5EET566_bkXN8VNwM5NyWFjXf_KftBCnwY_6iLGZUoqX47ymx47T0NIwHhU6-c5pY0xiyGAXPeAcTwYTp_tikIA8lNKfmxIrNZqCMKRgYmYg%3D%3D)**_ **You want to take America 's car keys, President Biden? Team, this is HUGE: According to a new poll, **94% of Democrats say they're voting _against_ Trump this fall!**

But poll after poll shows Trump locked in a statistical tie with President Biden -- which means November's election could be _**razor-close!**_

With such a tight race ahead, we need to lock in as many Democratic votes as possible. We need 26 more Pennsylvania Democrats to confirm that they WON'T vote for Trump. **So please, respond to our urgent poll before it closes at _midnight_ :**

**Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON'T vote for Trump >>**
| [Add My Name](http://go.dscc.org/go/17910?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240427-TrumpAlert-TrumpDefWontSupportDemRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240427-TrumpAlert-TrumpDefWontSupportDemRF-Pros-sl1&akid=14469%2E9716520%2Ew_0dI5)

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Referendum
body:
I want to remind you of some things we’ve seen (and lived through) in recent years—which we never thought we’d see in our country...

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6b7uctsut21pc392hfck2eifhn3nufffkr7dd88_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie6or5cth2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zte14k54dpft0u34b6otasmvpnt3kgevgg2t09i0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie6or5cth2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg5suipr8v03381a2fgqpp4e65pd8rhv2i48dl6o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie6or5cth2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zfh7lgulgjtqo6q3gm1jre1n28r5co3ulp4vn6ug_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9jm0or5cth238h1e8he4937chgm4p73cdimeoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9ug36425er07und6glcogtdha6rs0bcfpkedsh0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie6or5cth2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zahhptof8mck80lo4ddtd6e2thg4l8ju9uqp98q8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr4c5h69or3cljm49fg)

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691068%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zNFUqoR%2fcAzlKh5T8XcfFw&sysid=1)
---
|
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691068%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zNFUqoR%2fcAzlKh5T8XcfFw&sysid=1)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason -- conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691069%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h77JWUwdEvLmyCDaheckXw&sysid=1)
---
This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691060%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3yLJpMiJPm0%2bW0N9cZLnfw&sysid=1)**
---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvd7r2r1n99rm8nba7hjf344rtnjrrl8b1hiqnt0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came to define the war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zai3nv5su427q36jl942m9an1evgfos2a4451020_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob2cdh2bs) Don’t get left behind. Secure your DVD set today with any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqo6unn8546ehbg06v76eep9ltnp8nigfgmv2pmo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob2cdh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkjgu875vmisucfch7ru2fvhgrhiiu7h2o20k3p0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob6clh2bs)
---
|
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3oue0qcvqip28oarseutum0efhvusqltjbqg0mg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob6clh2bs)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason — conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2vfv63t5ui7uca3uimvm2kcue0icekdaeau8jlg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob6clh2bs)
---
This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5js3217tlo63cbbo1si0738s4rquovqe7ov8j88_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob6clh2bs)**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze6eiemi7vni97c1dnkk967upudfam0q39umumi0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob6clh2bs)
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself
---

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I’ve dedicated my whole life to serving the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump is relying on true patriots to step up and serve during his second term

Friend,

My whole life has been about service to the American people.

I was a captain in the United States Army. I served as a member of Congress from the great state of Kansas. **[And then I had the ultimate privilege of serving in President Donald J. name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Consider...
body:
I want to remind you of some things we’ve seen (and lived through) in recent years—which we never thought we’d see in our country...

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8emfi6giucmm62ifihtfbjvljcmo57nrnbg1voo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob2cth2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zionad9l4t8uveid9rvvdn3iaurs4ol0gjmm7e48_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob2cth2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z125ulfdrdrklhtboo28j1bdtj8f238rp996lha0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob2cth2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbmv849mdro51kls85jgsvc7p2990pvrj8e64uhg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9jm0or3c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhdi2lbjhbbd06o7f1kaj1ukuhe0pn5hufempoqg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c9ie1ob2cth2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq0iofcpb09pvbpn0rnib9sk6gou2i14knu6d9v8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr4c5h69o71c9jm49fg)

You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

### Get to know Jonathan Emord

For the past 38 years, Jonathan Emord has litigated against the federal bureaucracy, winning repeatedly. He is a leading constitutional law and litigation expert and the author of five critically acclaimed books.
It's time to end transitioning of youth; stop the assault on girls and women's sports, locker rooms, and bathrooms; eliminate woke indoctrination in schools and the military; ensure equal justice under law; secure our borders; roll back excessive government spending and cut taxes; reduce the size and scope of the government; and liberate free enterprise.

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33661%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Go1oq8LB7MKCfaorH8A8gw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came to define the war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33662%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bm%2bf1EV8HvAJ6nHUgi7ABA&sysid=1) Don’t get left behind. Secure your DVD set today with any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33663%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o6fE15xq3gOA9gq9SFpGDA&sysid=1)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlbvc8rci7crs6nm049fpvi12g8gv1c54sn2htp0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cpg64o30cth2bs)
---
|
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmeh5393q3l9fh5dh9kovc8htsllq0b9clhe2qvg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cpg64o30cth2bs)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason — conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zta61bkrm5ot9fuu7st2bahlfea662s86c3683q8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cpg64o30cth2bs)
---
This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr4efpmfg1gvqdlm3j3sc55j52eob6c9s7fc60q0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cpg64o30cth2bs)**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd1kk82lmsk5c0pdc6bc85be3gevhvib7g9btg6g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cpg64o30cth2bs)
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsBnSrOiWN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBnSrOiWN

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I’ve dedicated my whole life to serving the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump is relying on true patriots to step up and serve during his second term

Friend,

My whole life has been about service to the American people.

I was a captain in the United States Army. I served as a member of Congress from the great state of Kansas. **[And then I had the ultimate privilege of serving in President Donald J. Trump’s cabinet.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33670%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pr6PH%2fyT%2f5%2bkWoJ6GlAGNQ&sysid=1)**

Friend, I can tell you from experience: _**[President Trump needs to be surrounded by strong, conservative patriots who support his mission during his second term in office.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33671%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bzh55bRC5%2b6wJEUSmrN97g&sysid=1)**_

The NRSC wants to hear from you about who you’d like to see serve in the next Trump Administration. That’s why you’ve been selected to represent _your city_ in Project 47, an exclusive survey for grassroots Republicans only.

Ever since March 16, when presidential candidate Donald Trump created
a controversy by predicting President Joe Biden’s efforts to force
Americans to convert their lives to electric-vehicle (EV) lifestyles

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I’ve dedicated my whole life to serving the American people

body:
President Trump is relying on true patriots to step up and serve during his second term

Friend,

My whole life has been about service to the American people.

I was a captain in the United States Army. I served as a member of Congress from the great state of Kansas. **[And then I had the ultimate privilege of serving in President Donald J. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I’ve dedicated my whole life to serving the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump is relying on true patriots to step up and serve during his second term

Friend,

My whole life has been about service to the American people.

I was a captain in the United States Army. I served as a member of Congress from the great state of Kansas. **[And then I had the ultimate privilege of serving in President Donald J. Trump's cabinet.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z93gtj7614fgrskkn62498d03hdv4e9e3oqv9e48_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cpg6aor1chh2bs)**

Friend, I can tell you from experience: _**[President Trump needs to be surrounded by strong, conservative patriots who support his mission during his second term in office.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0uplpfiffktaul7amgqv1utrphah3adrfqgb2jg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cpg6aor1chh2bs)**_

The NRSC wants to hear from you about who you'd like to see serve in the next Trump Administration. That's why you've been selected to represent _your city_ in Project 47, an exclusive survey for grassroots Republicans only.

Thank you,

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Why does she want men playing in the women’s tournament?
body:
Dawn Staley said, “If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports...you should be able to play.”

| Fellow Freedom Defender, Maybe you saw this tweet from me earlier this month. I responded when the University of South Carolina’s women’s basketball coach Dawn Staley said, **“If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports ...you should be able to play.” ** [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33683%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jNuW5CmY5cEqPD6T0sLMXQ&sysid=1) This is ridiculous. There’s a reason the NCAA created separate divisions for men and women’s sports. It’s the same reason why the 3-point line is further, the basketball is bigger, and there are more dunks compared to layups in men’s basketball vs women’s basketball. There’s no question that Staley is a great coach. She coached her University of South Carolina team to two national titles in the past three years with a 109-3 record. That’s virtually unheard of. **But what if they had to play the University of Connecticut’s men’s championship team?** This isn’t only about keeping women’s sports fair -- though that matters. It’s also about protecting women’s safety and opportunities. Because if we use Dawn Staley’s definition, any man that “considers” himself a woman would have access to women’s scholarships. No man should be able to steal a woman’s scholarship or her place on a team. Her remarks send a clear message to young girls and women around the country. That message is that **we don’t matter**. Our safety, privacy in locker rooms, chances for athletic opportunity and success, and our dignity as female athletes don’t matter to Dawn Staley. You and I must work to uphold the integrity of fair sports and the value of women before this crackpot movement goes any further. [Help me and the Leadership Institute stand bravely for women, free speech, and common sense by donating right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c33684%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jIZ6K1aAKr%2bIfZEhaZr1Rg&sysid=1) With the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute, my colleagues and I fight the left’s radical anti-women agenda every single day. We count on people like you. clean_body: Dawn Staley said, “If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports...you should be able to play.” | Fellow Freedom Defender, Maybe you saw this tweet from me earlier this month. I responded when the University of South Carolina’s women’s basketball coach Dawn Staley said, “If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports ...you should be able to play.” This is ridiculous. There’s a reason the NCAA created separate divisions for men and women’s sports. It’s the same reason why the 3-point line is further, the basketball is bigger, and there are more dunks compared to layups in men’s basketball vs women’s basketball. There’s no question that Staley is a great coach. She coached her University of South Carolina team to two national titles in the past three years with a 109-3 record. That’s virtually unheard of. But what if they had to play the University of Connecticut’s men’s championship team? This isn’t only about keeping women’s sports fair -- though that matters. It’s also about protecting women’s safety and opportunities. Because if we use Dawn Staley’s definition, any man that “considers” himself a woman would have access to women’s scholarships. No man should be able to steal a woman’s scholarship or her place on a team. Her remarks send a clear message to young girls and women around the country. That message is that we don’t matter. Our safety, privacy in locker rooms, chances for athletic opportunity and success, and our dignity as female athletes don’t matter to Dawn Staley. You and I must work to uphold the integrity of fair sports and the value of women before this crackpot movement goes any further. With the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute, my colleagues and I fight the left’s radical anti-women agenda every single day. We speak at colleges across the country, where we identify brave students and give them the training, resources, and support to fight for their rights. But we cannot do it alone. We count on people like you. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute P.S. Fox and Friends asked me to join them to talk about Staley’s comments. If you’d like to watch it for yourself, click . | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000 Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mAnyS7eEIZjN_3wCALXJug~~/AARclAA~~~)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/apczWbFpNDYvVj-5LaVGEw~~/AARclAA~) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Fidelity, Vanguard, and Schwab stack up »](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BWiBoNd11gJ-lRIy3dgCsA~~/AARclAA~)

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: How important is religious liberty to you?
body:
I want to remind you of some things we’ve seen (and lived through) in recent years—which we never thought we’d see in our country...

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3G9SYfuMarBNbZI6B8fehQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoEKb-P0SxaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwNDI4VwNzcGNCCmYnRw0uZuwGVWlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3G9SYfuMarBNbZI6B8fehQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoEKb-P0SxaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwNDI4VwNzcGNCCmYnRw0uZuwGVWlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/3G9SYfuMarBNbZI6B8fehQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoEKb-P0SxaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3JlbGlnaW91cy1saWJlcnR5LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDEyNTNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXJlbGlnaW91c2xpYmVydHlzdXJ2ZXkmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtUk9OLTIwMjQwNDI4VwNzcGNCCmYnRw0uZuwGVWlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Restore Our Nation
---

body:

Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here!

“We don’t complain about things, Kristi. We fix them.” These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor’s Residence.

And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders.

**So I’d like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! [YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c691078%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BcvB1iDAxb1lNjOjR4sPNQ&sysid=1 "YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR

This memoir is the perfect read for everyone who cares about the future of America.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Why does she want men playing in the women’s tournament?
body:
Dawn Staley said, "If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports...you should be able to play."

| Fellow Freedom Defender, Maybe you saw this tweet from me earlier this month. I responded when the University of South Carolina's women's basketball coach Dawn Staley said, **" If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports...you should be able to play." ** [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ydVj9cSZH5_2RkLNSSNmJw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoELUsP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9weGwuaXN0LzRhNWNmYXN3amY_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9Q0I0ODgzM1cDc3BjQgpmKBYbLmYCBTKfUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) This is ridiculous. There's a reason the NCAA created separate divisions for men and women's sports. It's the same reason why the 3-point line is further, the basketball is bigger, and there are more dunks compared to layups in men's basketball vs women's basketball. There's no question that Staley is a great coach. She coached her University of South Carolina team to two national titles in the past three years with a 109-3 record. That's virtually unheard of. **But what if they had to play the University of Connecticut 's men's championship team? ** This isn't only about keeping women's sports fair -- though that matters. It's also about protecting women's safety and opportunities. Because if we use Dawn Staley's definition, any man that "considers" himself a woman would have access to women's scholarships. No man should be able to steal a woman's scholarship or her place on a team. Her remarks send a clear message to young girls and women around the country. That message is that **we don 't matter**. Our safety, privacy in locker rooms, chances for athletic opportunity and success, and our dignity as female athletes don't matter to Dawn Staley. You and I must work to uphold the integrity of fair sports and the value of women before this crackpot movement goes any further. [Help me and the Leadership Institute stand bravely for women, free speech, and common sense by donating right now.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ydVj9cSZH5_2RkLNSSNmJw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoELUsP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9weGwuaXN0LzRhNWNmYXN3amY_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9Q0I0ODgzM1cDc3BjQgpmKBYbLmYCBTKfUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) With the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute, my colleagues and I fight the left's radical anti-women agenda every single day. We speak at colleges across the country, where we identify brave students and give them the training, resources, and support to fight for their rights. But we cannot do it alone. We count on people like you. [That's why I hope you'll aid our fight with your generous gift to the Leadership Institute today.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ydVj9cSZH5_2RkLNSSNmJw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoELUsP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9weGwuaXN0LzRhNWNmYXN3amY_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9Q0I0ODgzM1cDc3BjQgpmKBYbLmYCBTKfUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute P.S. Fox and Friends asked me to join them to talk about Staley's comments. If you'd like to watch it for yourself, click [here](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/idN0b5UQaX3A9EZ4Cza2WQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoELUsP0QraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vdmlkZW8vNjM1MDUxMjc1NDExMlcDc3BjQgpmKBYbLmYCBTKfUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).
---
| [ **Stand with Riley** ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ydVj9cSZH5_2RkLNSSNmJw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoELUsP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9weGwuaXN0LzRhNWNmYXN3amY_c291cmNlX2NvZGU9Q0I0ODgzM1cDc3BjQgpmKBYbLmYCBTKfUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I’ve dedicated my whole life to serving the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump is relying on true patriots to step up and serve during his second term

Friend,

My whole life has been about service to the American people.

I was a captain in the United States Army. I served as a member of Congress from the great state of Kansas. **[And then I had the ultimate privilege of serving in President Donald J. Trump's cabinet.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mGuLBsMebZ0BGBbw-1AzEg~~/AARclAA~)**

Friend, I can tell you from experience: _**[President Trump needs to be surrounded by strong, conservative patriots who support his mission during his second term in office.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mGuLBsMebZ0BGBbw-1AzEg~~/AARclAA~)**_

The NRSC wants to hear from you about who you'd like to see serve in the next Trump Administration. That's why you've been selected to represent _your city_ in Project 47, an exclusive survey for grassroots Republicans only.

_**[Participate in Project 47 to make your recommendations for Vice President, Attorney General, Secretary of State, and more.>>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mGuLBsMebZ0BGBbw-1AzEg~~/AARclAA~)**_
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mGuLBsMebZ0BGBbw-1AzEg~~/AARclAA~)
Thank you,

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mGuLBsMebZ0BGBbw-1AzEg~~/AARclAA~)
Mike Pompeo

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Has American turned away from the Constitution?
body:
I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93f298648406472a8a4724fc70d783e0&_e=8uHtbtTd7Gj5GTp8y_b952Z9IH2MXIPF0gFcR6zcepj-GDyDgVLJo1xztAZK22TbM8niUfHQJCWhbBD7iOkJbnKKYdW30xfbgFQ-0CL7sbbkP7BSU-SOqNN7G_0kEZIIM7zL9PgLMkXlakgPvn2PT3Qc2dYH0VjmhqE1Grwr1EBVr9Dx5jDRgh9K_B4DHctGcSw71Fx7ZPhIN_fh8LxlbTvll7iaoOOL6raHXGQdjQaTqJKL2YRRTDjbqckJ9KuKeDOcY_qbiy6VhQlxc1mtS2N94Jbe_rSpGZlruEnkB1sPQlwVVAswNSWtMEmuEgYjXIPFvjJ5HfXVNbGGWTMSGEmlRorz6UAPg9aofBb0v1nY5DLmcxuV9zCrdQ30aU-j2QXqGqihkjYQvXo06-Mvzg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93f298648406472a8a4724fc70d783e0&_e=8uHtbtTd7Gj5GTp8y_b952Z9IH2MXIPF0gFcR6zcepj-GDyDgVLJo1xztAZK22TbM8niUfHQJCWhbBD7iOkJbnKKYdW30xfbgFQ-0CL7sbbkP7BSU-SOqNN7G_0kEZIIM7zL9PgLMkXlakgPvn2PT3Qc2dYH0VjmhqE1Grwr1EBVr9Dx5jDRgh9K_B4DHctGcSw71Fx7ZPhIN_fh8LxlbTvll7iaoOOL6raHXGQdjQaTqJKL2YRRTDjbqckJ9KuKKs6_XY_qBVdDjZLyDeyp58TRhFGTNv5OdTLyV7gaEGk12cvW8opy9TEUDIWdfT1bzfzXZDnWDBhV4F_Z5uYEdwXb0VIGOMqavZWRX3HsBnTSqxjEs1espa08QL2yHdldgVAssgovkt_Q_HBaIYj6hw%3D%3D) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include: **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=93f298648406472a8a4724fc70d783e0&_e=8uHtbtTd7Gj5GTp8y_b952Z9IH2MXIPF0gFcR6zcepj-GDyDgVLJo1xztAZK22TbM8niUfHQJCWhbBD7iOkJbnKKYdW30xfbgFQ-0CL7sbbkP7BSU-SOqNN7G_0kEZIIM7zL9PgLMkXlakgPvn2PT3Qc2dYH0VjmhqE1Grwr1EBVr9Dx5jDRgh9K_B4DHctGcSw71Fx7ZPhIN_fh8LxlbTvll7iaoOOL6raHXGQdjQaTqJKL2YRRTDjbqckJ9KuKdxlFIBT0VGc5Cv8MmcpDMu9yfgz9nAiXTBUYWBRgHtnD1pDKMwlr3mSgeEVq50PZ4KeNNHYzF5FXst083z12TkD3etp7t5m5CiHVgT4HYygUzZ30x5ZDh7LUJu90fTwxIEcJGWH7HkivyLp2o3FUEw%3D%3D) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84c1b934e4264acca8a139df50e52fd1&_e=KK_Sf12zvyqPx_kpyHHJ1nmiQNueIqjY_TqGfEIPDYIJQIyDPzSlr4YFhTWPyHNPqa1WJB2po2a4YI4v3BVkWgoDwLvbeT8J-_JtDIlvHvJ1GCWJmcw3RNh8mXWPkmW8xOByjFNHrSww_PpYD9U3hL5vdeE2-U6YOoZJqhz952l7Q0LOoFJXgFG9Bz0TzjDaPrs-9BuJaXQ1AapSN4rHZMkeZkAfnl2DOD6AjTld_NPGzcsxgYSEjwhOSqmalXne8FlT97IE7qda32sZeXvRyyTlGQ1Lh_ITsDBTYFINmV850mP3_WTYlY8B1AYuyTDoTIjlSW5QxkfVJ14l89CN8AxSRt8F6KP5O9pvmja1vV2c-LnbIXnpz2PXXMaixz-n0WjI3Vk3bDiX7Gp2Mb4Uw3Tdq6-cJYzeAsZNIGjKFn0%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84c1b934e4264acca8a139df50e52fd1&_e=KK_Sf12zvyqPx_kpyHHJ1nmiQNueIqjY_TqGfEIPDYIJQIyDPzSlr4YFhTWPyHNPqa1WJB2po2a4YI4v3BVkWgoDwLvbeT8J-_JtDIlvHvJ1GCWJmcw3RNh8mXWPkmW8xOByjFNHrSww_PpYD9U3hL5vdeE2-U6YOoZJqhz952l7Q0LOoFJXgFG9Bz0TzjDaPrs-9BuJaXQ1AapSN4rHZMkeZkAfnl2DOD6AjTld_NPGzcsxgYSEjwhOSqmalXne8FlT97IE7qda32sZeXvRy1go_DCFB5j7hUM-RR8YOdJxcDzXLlVAxjwM-hRZh1hS5ycTYUXhvZtPh8xuKdL3WL9ibUWqjACenvn4xEmTRSeCxCGlccwmPpGk6btFBWVJgFzZkPo8UXmRLRy_MbDjenvdgjgKPIkBF7zW1Ehurdk%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84c1b934e4264acca8a139df50e52fd1&_e=KK_Sf12zvyqPx_kpyHHJ1nmiQNueIqjY_TqGfEIPDYIJQIyDPzSlr4YFhTWPyHNPqa1WJB2po2a4YI4v3BVkWgoDwLvbeT8J-_JtDIlvHvJ1GCWJmcw3RNh8mXWPkmW8xOByjFNHrSww_PpYD9U3hL5vdeE2-U6YOoZJqhz952l7Q0LOoFJXgFG9Bz0TzjDaPrs-9BuJaXQ1AapSN4rHZMkeZkAfnl2DOD6AjTld_NPGzcsxgYSEjwhOSqmalXne8FlT97IE7qda32sZeXvRy--CGNpdDoXmlna70g36iy5H9FgUK_iqwfZEx__y1jtnJHn8Ru7Xg7dGt67jItSMa7qmhdD3Xc2yuURboPlWsQDS9FKq8RjFFmKSpMN6QfDrgg5E8xA2m29IHyH58l1kvmjLGV1uefVFDbHjqHlqi0Y%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84c1b934e4264acca8a139df50e52fd1&_e=KK_Sf12zvyqPx_kpyHHJ1nmiQNueIqjY_TqGfEIPDYIJQIyDPzSlr4YFhTWPyHNPqa1WJB2po2a4YI4v3BVkWgoDwLvbeT8J-_JtDIlvHvJ1GCWJmcw3RNh8mXWPkmW8xOByjFNHrSww_PpYD9U3hL5vdeE2-U6YOoZJqhz952l7Q0LOoFJXgFG9Bz0TzjDaPrs-9BuJaXQ1AapSN4rHZMkeZkAfnl2DOD6AjTld_NPGzcsxgYSEjwhOSqmalXne8FlT97IE7qda32sZeXvRy4_XwS9Www75FxdqgKOoXzyjDcVUmCiDD8DfnJg0pljW3F4rTzq3B7K0wqk1879siFttKFywM-I7IU-IbxOCxzhE31D5RkdGr45O_bNjcpXISfbJ_Dirrjo13jWtlXtun-1AEFqZIQFkJ-h5C_GBfPQ%3D)**

clean_body: I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open. Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation. The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism." Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the National Referendum on Religious Liberty by using the secure link below: Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty." Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. The first step is ...EDUCATION. Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide. After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies. I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the National Referendum on Religious Liberty , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called " The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of " The Second World Wars" on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The " The Second World Wars" DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Mike Pompeo

body:
President Trump is relying on true patriots to step up and serve during his second term

Friend,

My whole life has been about service to the American people.

I was a captain in the United States Army. I served as a member of Congress from the great state of Kansas. **[And then I had the ultimate privilege of serving in President Donald J.
