name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court

| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yP1HqsHzO5Va7d9Ix0D4AQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoEMMeP0RRaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVJPTjQ4ODA3VwNzcGNCCmYnIykuZuC0fS1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
|
---
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yP1HqsHzO5Va7d9Ix0D4AQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoEMMeP0RRaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVJPTjQ4ODA3VwNzcGNCCmYnIykuZuC0fS1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason — conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yP1HqsHzO5Va7d9Ix0D4AQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoEMMeP0RRaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVJPTjQ4ODA3VwNzcGNCCmYnIykuZuC0fS1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yP1HqsHzO5Va7d9Ix0D4AQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoEMMeP0RRaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVJPTjQ4ODA3VwNzcGNCCmYnIykuZuC0fS1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yP1HqsHzO5Va7d9Ix0D4AQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRoEMMeP0RRaHR0cHM6Ly9iYWJ5bG9uYmVlLmNvbS9wbGFucz91dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVJPTjQ4ODA3VwNzcGNCCmYnIykuZuC0fS1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aa964cb37a664b498a6a9bc1cf6b7b93&_e=EcFgt0H-MizR1ILo8wStIlYUTlHT8a5csiVub4lghQHyif0nH1LkQK4HwfG1Ly51Sk5dUfrf42Ps4E_-8yO-T1y6mH1YJFjN9NNNXlbFknlGTma4PWcMR6poqlf4w8_j_F3UpDKhwNfs4kXr28LKLv1PP130Wacw9fEcVWyuaWqWU32pYNykZdkSOYNZvKvPSmKQiIvBBLL7EIiZMsmiRscCccp7XcElv8zz79zWLo0hb5HBJt9-LzzGdU-FRQxc1Q8E4-lgs12TRxNpSZsPtg%3D%3D)
---
|
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aa964cb37a664b498a6a9bc1cf6b7b93&_e=EcFgt0H-MizR1ILo8wStIlYUTlHT8a5csiVub4lghQHyif0nH1LkQK4HwfG1Ly51Sk5dUfrf42Ps4E_-8yO-T1y6mH1YJFjN9NNNXlbFknlGTma4PWcMR6poqlf4w8_jCu2-qZOp_9dnzgCns58aebI0CiAoA1eJ5NnSuspc9LI9dyEHB3DNijqRsbxnfE0i492uEihHy0FHZJtEcYEhj3pbceWUb_hBYdPlLmL0_pusucS226Zvf2mipL54VNl-NBLcdh_Q3K9YqC8LN3CuYw%3D%3D)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven 't heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason -- conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that's not an exaggeration; we've experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person ("Admiral" Rachel Levine) as a man. It's gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That 's why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aa964cb37a664b498a6a9bc1cf6b7b93&_e=EcFgt0H-MizR1ILo8wStIlYUTlHT8a5csiVub4lghQHyif0nH1LkQK4HwfG1Ly51Sk5dUfrf42Ps4E_-8yO-T1y6mH1YJFjN9NNNXlbFknlGTma4PWcMR6poqlf4w8_j0oprCxNrkTMRmyZhIBYsVcdJwd7dWqrR9hoFj5rV-meq4C-VAuOjHXqVVelLJzsuH9wDiIgWXnGCgWTPfzaRqx4B6vkZilwMATKKMKNJSqrevOnRC7X_cQESNNGT7ONeQsAyS4SFqJzUYBAVRJSfjg%3D%3D)
---
This is nothing new for us. We've long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we've taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn't easy or inexpensive, but it's the right thing to do. And it's making a difference. But we can't do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=aa964cb37a664b498a6a9bc1cf6b7b93&_e=EcFgt0H-MizR1ILo8wStIlYUTlHT8a5csiVub4lghQHyif0nH1LkQK4HwfG1Ly51Sk5dUfrf42Ps4E_-8yO-T1y6mH1YJFjN9NNNXlbFknlGTma4PWcMR6poqlf4w8_jhlHmsnmYGuwDUFbNnum8Jz7OK_6849r_OYqGCdawWf6VLY9amh-D1uh5KGoc-8D4_cwygh3qtwwtFa6c5zJIBuyZ5O2I8bAfilNq1ik19CqycX-r7PZOBat6x8rvhGsBgYCw2RlWaANkNu_7xHFbgA%3D%3D)**
---

We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn't easy or inexpensive, but it's the right thing to do. And it's making a difference. But we can't do it without you. Seth Dillon CEO | The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself | | | Copyright(C) 2024 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. ** The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| Dear Peter,
Virginia U.S. Senate candidate Jonathan Emord wins big! He defeated the Deep State, the administrative state, over and over again. He won the two statewide debates against his primary opponents by double digits. And he will defeat Tim Kaine and save our state and nation from the ravages of communism and woke ideology.
Abraham Lincoln said of General Ulysses S. Grant: "I can't spare this man--he fights!" And we can say this of Jonathan Emord: "We can't spare you--you fight and win!"
To beat Tim Kaine, we need a savvy fighter and a sure winner. That's Jonathan Emord.

Team Emord

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I’ve dedicated my whole life to serving the American people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump is relying on true patriots to step up and serve during his second term

Friend,

My whole life has been about service to the American people.

I was a captain in the United States Army. I served as a member of Congress from the great state of Kansas. **[And then I had the ultimate privilege of serving in President Donald J. Trump's cabinet.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b7fa50d8ebe4721aaad6603777fd9ce&_e=5K3ysIJuJ2RdJL-Z5uzEJj70yDIcf40LQgTp-PU1wl9poN7xjPqqfljFI2HK0zl9tI2SY9_pulodvtLivN-PMHDZmjhAakHZdzgJhENY441NeDwi-lFLECAIsorm3_d_gPSRD5aawrUbbpApaXk6xtOo5fihjRpNe2qdCaCkKDZsXJAKcpGDlOPv1EEXQXW2nwMJtTvv0B4GezsHb20B0A0zLTTxjxy-J1Um9Au4mEXWMnI7fu1sUMio6SPewo3UEvvH_CyUWIYYswFqdHAwNJFEYdaYOIvbRexyZkIc1wF-ZXUT5yCSyYdtDckWs6Nkyio2UE1MglO_dU8UZarNU8qFOa4xtPbjzx4PhyltX9DI1uUXOBI-qahrTBu73PmgJaW4aweGOTTjJtZ_aQb06ZRzK1cqHG3_d-7hCgPfdRWRAPKB1Vmo2K-bNx_v7i-qq39SSOtvLG9r8WOqWALqpA%3D%3D)**

Friend, I can tell you from experience: _**[President Trump needs to be surrounded by strong, conservative patriots who support his mission during his second term in office.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b7fa50d8ebe4721aaad6603777fd9ce&_e=5K3ysIJuJ2RdJL-Z5uzEJj70yDIcf40LQgTp-PU1wl9poN7xjPqqfljFI2HK0zl9tI2SY9_pulodvtLivN-PMHDZmjhAakHZdzgJhENY441NeDwi-lFLECAIsorm3_d_gPSRD5aawrUbbpApaXk6xtOo5fihjRpNe2qdCaCkKDZsXJAKcpGDlOPv1EEXQXW2nwMJtTvv0B4GezsHb20B0A0zLTTxjxy-J1Um9Au4mEXWMnI7fu1sUMio6SPewo3UEvvH_CyUWIYYswFqdHAwNJFEYdaYOIvbRexyZkIc1wF-ZXUT5yCSyYdtDckWs6NkPiPF7t8eu42OzNo5_Oq55-DD-j3zpOYw7GenCxFC1kqrRejUS14poNT1xI5REhmtdxML2bvOAYMhjqfIZ-lLXiLaiS7e80dRqy0QRygLbrMaLo8x5tbnMZWpuQgyVMcy92486DJIaA4m0tPKLtOI3g%3D%3D)**_

The NRSC wants to hear from you about who you'd like to see serve in the next Trump Administration. That's why you've been selected to represent _your city_ in Project 47, an exclusive survey for grassroots Republicans only.

Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here!

"We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence.

And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders.

**So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! ---
| | | | | I won’t ever forget it, Peter. Standing on the House floor. Hearing shouts, pounding, breaking glass. Barricading the door, teaching my colleagues how to use their gas masks. Texting my staff, telling them to hide. I carried a rifle in Iraq and all I had to defend myself on January 6th was a pen. But I was ready to fight. And after that day, Trump’s loyalists crawled right back to him. Witnessing them reject what they lived through, watching them ignore the testimony of the police officers that defended us that day while they were beaten, bloodied, pepper sprayed, cursed at... it makes me sick. Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots who were “invited in” — she even campaigns with them. I think anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate. This race in Arizona is just me and her. It’s on us to stop her march to more power and influence. Whoever wins in Arizona is going to determine which party holds the Senate, and could even decide whether Trump takes back the White House. I need you with me, and I need you to take this race seriously. [**Please split a donation of $20 — that or anything you can give — between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to crush Kari Lake’s campaign and defend our democracy.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bb9ed0d-7063-4433-ac5f-611bea2888d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Thanks for your support. As we gear up for one of the toughest elections of our lives, it means a lot to have you behind me. Ruben

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

| | Peter, In some areas, parents have a choice: send their children to a failing public school or a private Catholic school.

The contrast is clear: between stagnation and success... between falling behind and forging ahead.
---
[**SIGN TO SAVE CATHOLIC SCHOOLS**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=205b3b0c663c44428275c6edca68bf59&_e=rhVm8sKbUBITkLc7pMt-6nv3Wu8tiz946ZftgccWE5OJckb6jZc5dJITcb3_MiUFZNZ_J4v3iidWHmFLRnisfC6_h0gvW7aV40BafHqTt1W7mQue0WBRLSdo1pE9oSSzU2dqwq8QC4yJoTXaSkowcwWwvCoNxc3xHsdcj_tr9sHvSNKFVNneqDlOwvGJrF9knfE-CBtRoUk4o96tK0GloMu6P70XqvnbBrIjZol8N0BTrwxiSHKajE8AP5kzH0zMFZjb8iJr3hELUpOXCDyAaBb8WFVQvyQaphX9hjfk1rHJUCGpNLybMmY0Fi34y14gJni7wij6zTfR9g8ePG7bn9pMp72CdjqE8m0ksYZDwE0s4DrEqFnxGjaG7Z1xdNKN2zPQw4GKmT8ZIF7oGHH5bXvR7eI3Dykt_nko0IvFmtHiSf3Am_qh-aHWzNOZNQGe)
---
The _**American Federation for Children’s Growth Fund**_ understands the gravity of this decision. It's not just about choosing a school; it's about choosing a path for your child's future.

**The Catholic school option represents hope, promise, and proven success for millions of families.** [**It offers an environment where your child can thrive academically and socially.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=205b3b0c663c44428275c6edca68bf59&_e=rhVm8sKbUBITkLc7pMt-6nv3Wu8tiz946ZftgccWE5OJckb6jZc5dJITcb3_MiUFZNZ_J4v3iidWHmFLRnisfC6_h0gvW7aV40BafHqTt1W7mQue0WBRLSdo1pE9oSSzU2dqwq8QC4yJoTXaSkowcwWwvCoNxc3xHsdcj_tr9sHvSNKFVNneqDlOwvGJrF9knfE-CBtRoUk4o96tK0GloMu6P70XqvnbBrIjZol8N0BTrwxiSHKajE8AP5kzH0zMFZjb8iJr3hELUpOXCDyAaBb8WFVQvyQaphX9hjfk1rEWDj2f8PkrT41H-KkEl2lfHQu3CVKerQIrp1g1lBHHpPrxay11UrFzTT3wWaR8SYuMD0eD4OfhQ1heRPqHySaOhCKrmqX31yYtMAJzKxrG44slJCe5zZdmT06gCxK2wWRlXp9-XalUhu_Lq54SGSsf)

But this choice is at risk.

The very existence of Catholic schools hangs in the balance, threatened by education bureaucrats who refuse to allow parents to use education tax dollars on the school of their choice. __That includes private Catholic schools, Peter. __

**Peter, you have the power to make a difference!**

You can ensure that families like yours continue to have access to quality education options. [**The first step is to sign the petition to save Catholic education.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=205b3b0c663c44428275c6edca68bf59&_e=rhVm8sKbUBITkLc7pMt-6nv3Wu8tiz946ZftgccWE5OJckb6jZc5dJITcb3_MiUFZNZ_J4v3iidWHmFLRnisfC6_h0gvW7aV40BafHqTt1W7mQue0WBRLSdo1pE9oSSzU2dqwq8QC4yJoTXaSkowcwWwvCoNxc3xHsdcj_tr9sHvSNKFVNneqDlOwvGJrF9knfE-CBtRoUk4o96tK0GloMu6P70XqvnbBrIjZol8N0BTrwxiSHKajE8AP5kzH0zMFZjb8iJr3hELUpOXCDyAaBb8WFVQvyQaphX9hjfk1rE5CndQBegHbmDhgMbyLXq9nAD0QOYb5zLzLa_qCIENdAtc6UnDFFLmw2HhH0erlGcyBg-vZmmVChc_4E4kuf2idXma33AdLM--bzbeeIt7Bv5JV-XVjCG0Nuh2M7J820dEgJBy3bZxKXSueeO28wOs)

[**SAVE CATHOLIC EDUCATION: ADD YOUR NAME NOW**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=205b3b0c663c44428275c6edca68bf59&_e=rhVm8sKbUBITkLc7pMt-6nv3Wu8tiz946ZftgccWE5OJckb6jZc5dJITcb3_MiUFZNZ_J4v3iidWHmFLRnisfC6_h0gvW7aV40BafHqTt1W7mQue0WBRLSdo1pE9oSSzU2dqwq8QC4yJoTXaSkowcwWwvCoNxc3xHsdcj_tr9sHvSNKFVNneqDlOwvGJrF9knfE-CBtRoUk4o96tK0GloMu6P70XqvnbBrIjZol8N0BTrwxiSHKajE8AP5kzH0zMFZjb8iJr3hELUpOXCDyAaBb8WFVQvyQaphX9hjfk1rENXf9GlIjjhxlaULuBFtLuouuBbCvSvACBZAExuq-oD_XiwAJuJwXayCNF-YgaV6Rq3AszNfvkHDikk4PWX4LV71FyEb5jJaZYe28F706nhO1_HlacPFfHKFTQKoAYDHeEFiGMq3ksf1l0V4FeGjy7)
---
Your voice matters. Your choice matters. _Your child's future matters._

**[**Click here to sign the petition and provide families with EVERY educational opportunity available, including Catholic education.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=205b3b0c663c44428275c6edca68bf59&_e=rhVm8sKbUBITkLc7pMt-6nv3Wu8tiz946ZftgccWE5OJckb6jZc5dJITcb3_MiUFZNZ_J4v3iidWHmFLRnisfC6_h0gvW7aV40BafHqTt1W7mQue0WBRLSdo1pE9oSSzU2dqwq8QC4yJoTXaSkowcwWwvCoNxc3xHsdcj_tr9sHvSNKFVNneqDlOwvGJrF9knfE-CBtRoUk4o96tK0GloMu6P70XqvnbBrIjZol8N0BTrwxiSHKajE8AP5kzH0zMFZjb8iJr3hELUpOXCDyAaBb8WFVQvyQaphX9hjfk1rFHEcvFodtrXiclLjpifta0hRxWA0X2J8my1IKkrIk0TRYxQQPg_ASit_n1Jq1igrnGzdzJmuCtiE9rC9fr98Do6gNGyagyvrFQzQxlOX0qDBAmDZGQeFXBAVKQxYICD-HjeXklnAtewC_hcZeWByuw)**

Thank you for taking this crucial step toward securing a brighter tomorrow for your family.

Sincerely,
Rebekah Bydlak
American Federation for Children Growth Fund

| | **Who is the American Federation for Children Growth Fund? **
---
We’re an organization of parents, activists, and policy professionals all united under one mission: _bringing school choice to parents and students in every state. _

We believe:
---
📚 Every child deserves access to a high-quality education 🏫 Parents should have a say in what school their child attends✏️ Education tax dollars should follow students, whether the child attends public or private school
---
**And 72% of Americans agree.** Yet, not every state offers even one alternative to traditional public schools. That’s not fair to students or parents – _and we’re fighting to make that change._
---
[**JOIN THE SCHOOL CHOICE REVOLUTION**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=205b3b0c663c44428275c6edca68bf59&_e=rhVm8sKbUBITkLc7pMt-6nv3Wu8tiz946ZftgccWE5OJckb6jZc5dJITcb3_MiUFZNZ_J4v3iidWHmFLRnisfC6_h0gvW7aV40BafHqTt1W7mQue0WBRLSdo1pE9oSSzU2dqwq8QC4yJoTXaSkowcwWwvCoNxc3xHsdcj_tr9sHvSNKFVNneqDlOwvGJrF9knfE-CBtRoUk4o96tK0GloMu6P70XqvnbBrIjZol8N0BTrwxiSHKajE8AP5kzH0zMFZjb8iJr3hELUpOXCDyAaBb8WFVQvyQaphX9hjfk1rGVQXaOG19kupcCNwTMDuJiMSwZMa8kiTlVlkJD_fr3I4AZnfwru-JD9FX059FfUS2jF0gFIqKCLYpvYTM0JkpS_MYvXA1P_JNwct0NpEsHUkLZM_0vn8GmcvAOXvo_RPWjpwKu88BRqO5N32sG_r-F)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Why do women seem to be our own worst enemy?
body:
Dawn Staley said, "If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports...you should be able to play."

| Fellow Freedom Defender, Maybe you saw this tweet from me earlier this month. I responded when the University of South Carolina's women's basketball coach Dawn Staley said, **" If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports...you should be able to play." ** [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f602c03f774edf88903116ea0afa7d&_e=N5Gb_rH8fsSpufk05-rANqNLvNdfuHslRgNAZDrj20GnpgYMeZDqXdHTEGj85lox01UhoYZsiara9S8PZCTewi4KuZa68AYpVE8Txugyr7Zye8qUcigXcMQJLmph4A9qqsHvg8LiYkvUuKGteaU9SeDxRcLR5rJka-V9rfk0AkzOC-77eGG-a9Ysk7jPy6oB3IWXTF1KeTnbisl-5nIX_ZB8Rkl7IDsi6TbajCwlVBI%3D) This is ridiculous. There's a reason the NCAA created separate divisions for men and women's sports. It's the same reason why the 3-point line is further, the basketball is bigger, and there are more dunks compared to layups in men's basketball vs women's basketball. There's no question that Staley is a great coach. She coached her University of South Carolina team to two national titles in the past three years with a 109-3 record. That's virtually unheard of. **But what if they had to play the University of Connecticut 's men's championship team? ** This isn't only about keeping women's sports fair -- though that matters. It's also about protecting women's safety and opportunities. Because if we use Dawn Staley's definition, any man that "considers" himself a woman would have access to women's scholarships. No man should be able to steal a woman's scholarship or her place on a team. Her remarks send a clear message to young girls and women around the country. That message is that **we don 't matter**. Our safety, privacy in locker rooms, chances for athletic opportunity and success, and our dignity as female athletes don't matter to Dawn Staley. You and I must work to uphold the integrity of fair sports and the value of women before this crackpot movement goes any further. [Help me and the Leadership Institute stand bravely for women, free speech, and common sense by donating right now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f602c03f774edf88903116ea0afa7d&_e=N5Gb_rH8fsSpufk05-rANqNLvNdfuHslRgNAZDrj20GnpgYMeZDqXdHTEGj85lox01UhoYZsiara9S8PZCTewpt9x1pfxIDm2QjakytHDUIziZfHhhkA_2zEPUjdvZH5ksD2Iuu5uVq1TlaIDsGnpqtU4yrxsQqojVEJMOqoifiRp12nOW_hXtki9r6PqlfiaIzUaPUvTj7-huVj-42e_Vp9BEySu0adUh0_-19JUfM%3D) With the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute, my colleagues and I fight the left's radical anti-women agenda every single day. We speak at colleges across the country, where we identify brave students and give them the training, resources, and support to fight for their rights. But we cannot do it alone. We count on people like you. [That's why I hope you'll aid our fight with your generous gift to the Leadership Institute today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f602c03f774edf88903116ea0afa7d&_e=N5Gb_rH8fsSpufk05-rANqNLvNdfuHslRgNAZDrj20GnpgYMeZDqXdHTEGj85lox01UhoYZsiara9S8PZCTewqryaslDY2v6zugzfyLBptLN_ybuM_m7hr2GdeEhepqTZmKyZu2eNXWZpb86HN_-aWPUu3iZyi7n36DcrpLip0Vf_FUrjXdiMK8ijhCmmdTtlRF_2_Cysx3JQpeZKklNM6ycU4EIabkLdn9jRgGHfbo%3D) Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute P.S. Fox and Friends asked me to join them to talk about Staley's comments. If you'd like to watch it for yourself, click [here](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c1f602c03f774edf88903116ea0afa7d&_e=N5Gb_rH8fsSpufk05-rANqS3KNbDEur40hKcorotZo_okdMnRe19UHl7y_iheT6QMMzGgSdLZDbnBtuGytJD9TT64RaY_g7nBU6JZZcb77zNuQS18v_4yWBq0mLTmfC0NpH3w_EZUzWzEmlK-JyT4nDe8O3Uk05zRzpHsN1gUIKmu6G2KF7RzN1ixNZX-fRhzU6JLLdwdQGdd-H8tr5tysaeMSTqyetxe7wD4v7__zg%3D).

clean_body: Dawn Staley said, "If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports...you should be able to play." | Fellow Freedom Defender, Maybe you saw this tweet from me earlier this month. I responded when the University of South Carolina's women's basketball coach Dawn Staley said, " If you consider yourself a woman and you want to play sports...you should be able to play." This is ridiculous. There's a reason the NCAA created separate divisions for men and women's sports. It's the same reason why the 3-point line is further, the basketball is bigger, and there are more dunks compared to layups in men's basketball vs women's basketball. There's no question that Staley is a great coach. She coached her University of South Carolina team to two national titles in the past three years with a 109-3 record. That's virtually unheard of. But what if they had to play the University of Connecticut 's men's championship team? This isn't only about keeping women's sports fair -- though that matters. It's also about protecting women's safety and opportunities. Because if we use Dawn Staley's definition, any man that "considers" himself a woman would have access to women's scholarships. No man should be able to steal a woman's scholarship or her place on a team. Her remarks send a clear message to young girls and women around the country. That message is that we don 't matter. Our safety, privacy in locker rooms, chances for athletic opportunity and success, and our dignity as female athletes don't matter to Dawn Staley. You and I must work to uphold the integrity of fair sports and the value of women before this crackpot movement goes any further. With the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute, my colleagues and I fight the left's radical anti-women agenda every single day. We speak at colleges across the country, where we identify brave students and give them the training, resources, and support to fight for their rights. But we cannot do it alone. We count on people like you. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute P.S. Fox and Friends asked me to join them to talk about Staley's comments. If you'd like to watch it for yourself, click . | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000 Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Shanahan on Ukraine: “What about Americans?”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Take a stand with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Nicole Shanahan today.

|
---
| | | | **[Take a stand with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Nicole Shanahan today.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
ICYMI, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s VP running mate Nicole Shanahan took to Twitter to blast both parties for sending an additional $60 billion of your tax dollars to Ukraine.
Nicole Shanahan posted on [X.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=Z_o1v5uRNRxRYZz5aguEaqWPmdcC4eskoLp4JKQp5_9dSQaTfqibIhX7rz2Tf6CMTpml11aNOeIeCZ7X5pNenfNaIqNPuImULAcxpRAslWH0Zeg31MvaN8oRmwxk94UkDxbqXjXUNvVXXxHAiVrEdef7BYrNgM5y-iZLUBCAyXI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=3),
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=4)
Nicole is exactly right! Instead of subsidizing America's defense industry, why is Congress not focused on the real problems Americans face? The two-party political machine is wildly out of touch, and it's time for fresh leadership in the White House.
Nicole is an extraordinary story of living the American Dream. She rose from an impoverished upbringing to become an accomplished patent attorney, philanthropist, and entrepreneur who has shattered glass ceilings in the tech industry. Her extraordinary accomplishments include founding philanthropic organizations dedicated to reproductive health for older parents and programs to help end poverty.
Most importantly, Nicole Shanahan is a real person–not a political insider. She understands the fight we face as Americans is BIGGER than Politics!
Take a stand with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Nicole Shanahan today.
[April is almost over and we are short of our $4 million FEC Report goal. Please make a generous DONATION to Team Kennedy before the end-of-month!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=5)
[Donate $50](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=50&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=6)
[Donate $75](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=75&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=7)
[Donate $100](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=8)
[Donate $240](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=9)
[Maximum](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=10)
Your support today will put Kennedy/Shanahan on the ballot in each of the 50 states, and onto the National Debate Stage against President Joe Biden and Donald Trump.
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shanahan_tweet_4_28_24_rs_nd1&n=11)

body:
our chance is disappearing before our eyes...
| We thought when we reached out to let you know that Colin Allred was within **STRIKING DISTANCE** of Ted Cruz in the polls, _donations would POUR IN!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66377?t=6&akid=13969%2E878179%2EnD7zgO) **But we couldn’t have been more wrong.** We missed our $10,000 goal by a full $4,576!

If we don’t make up the difference immediately, we’ll be too far behind to catch up and we’ll lose our chance to send MAGA Ted Cruz packing!

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Study Finds Insufficient Evidence for Prescribing Puberty Blockers to Children + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=00ac585f48&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[UK study has local implications for children and transgender treatments](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f74913ab81&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Earlier this month, an independent review of gender identity services for children and young people — known as the [Cass Review](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=48a4959360&e=b7b3eddce2) after its lead author, Hilary Cass — was published in Britain. The review is groundbreaking and may revolutionize the treatment for children and adolescents. It has already changed policies and practices in multiple European [countries](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=461f14107f&e=b7b3eddce2). The 350-page report demonstrates a scholarly research methodology and also a compassionate approach for those seeking treatment and support. The review is accessible to not only clinicians and physicians, but also to lay people. The author went to great lengths to weave in the “lived experiences” of young people who are often desperately seeking medical treatment.
**Why It Matters.** “Children’s Hospital of Philadelphia (CHOP) is the largest local provider of pediatric services to children. Their[ Gender and Sexuality Development Clinic](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5fb1dcd1a9&e=b7b3eddce2) ‘offers psychosocial and medical support for gender variant, gender expansive, and transgender children and youth up to age 21 and their families.’ "I requested comments four separate times from CHOP and the clinic co-founders regarding their thoughts about the review, the clinic’s annual budget, the number of gender reassignment surgeries performed, and the percentage of patients prescribed puberty blockers or hormones. None of the requests were returned with the exception of an out-of-office automatic response from Dr. Dowshen.”
**Quotable.** “The bottom line is that we simply do not have enough information nor research to support the current practice of prescribing puberty blockers or hormones to children. Absent a robust clinical trial, local pediatric facilities should discontinue this practice and Medicaid should stop paying for it. Standing up for children and following science even when it is unpopular should not be political. Both sides of the debate have weaponized this vulnerable population to advance their own agendas. It is now time to simply do what is right and follow the recommendations in the Cass Review to ensure the best possible outcomes for these young people.”
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1943522c2d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.['Greedflation' and other tall tales](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=485c6fc3bc&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Guy Ciarrocchi_
Dear voters, Bob Casey, Joe Biden and the Democrats are imploring you not to blame them for inflation: blame those money-grubbing businesses. This is one of the modern Democrat Party’s only remaining ties to the old-school Democrat Party: blame “big business.”

**Why It Matters.** “This Democrat-created problem began with locking us down for too long and reopening too slowly. Production fell. Supply chains were broken. Supply and Demand 101: reduce supply and prices go up. Not due to greed, due to reality — manufacturers and sellers have fixed costs and need to recoup money. If they can’t sell 100 pairs of jeans at $40 because they only have 30 pairs, they start selling them at $75 or $100 a pair just trying to meet payroll and expenses. "The problem was compounded by even more ‘emergency’ spending in 2021 because Biden had to show us that he really cared. Adding in Biden’s ‘covid relief,’ Washington spent more additional money than its annual budget. Then, having helped cause inflation, and having heard voters complain about high gasoline prices and inflation, they gave us the ‘Inflation Reduction Act.’ Yet, even Democrat politicians admitted — before Biden’s signature was dry on the Act — that it was really the ‘green new deal.’ Even more spending. Plus now the federal government put laws in place to slow the production and exploration of American natural gas and oil — putting Democrat rhetoric into reality. More spending, plus policies to slow energy production: brilliant!”
**Quotable.** “Casey has checked all the boxes in the new Democrat playbook: (1) impose left-wing policies — especially slowing or stopping American energy; (2) ignore the problem — the harm the policies will obviously cause; (3) blame anyone else, never accept responsibly and never accept cause and effect; and (4) when forced to act in response to the public’s anger, pass out cash and grow the size and power of the federal government.”
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=facfc4df2e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Webinar**
* The livestream of our “[Chaos and Crisis: Behind the Walls of George Hill Correctional Facility](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e55d8ee345&e=b7b3eddce2)” webinar is now available on YouTube

---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Few surprises in ‘relatively calm and successful’ Pennsylvania primary](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2013cf515b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Montgomery County state rep. proposes requiring greater clarity on county election website addresses to negate scams](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4f95feb7f6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Nathan Benefield: Don’t ignore the destructive ideas coming out of Harrisburg](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=78ffbed52a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[D’Orsie + Rowe: A new day has, indeed, dawned in the Pennsylvania State House](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1eb8f78fce&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: City and federal task force is combating carjacking](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9193641a2d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Peter Mihalick: Foreign investment in Pennsylvania company is good](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f84c3e3d89&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
As Gaza protests turn ugly across college campuses in America, our friends at _The Free Press_ dispatched reporter Olivia Reingold to survey the scene. Her report, “[Camping Out at Columbia’s Communist Coachella](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=16a57ea0a6&e=b7b3eddce2),” tells of the bizarre collection of protestors and their, oh, let’s say “eccentric” theories of what needs to change in the world and how all of it, somehow, is related to Israel. And if you want to get more recommendations for articles throughout the week, check out the “In the Spotlight” tab on our main page and see what articles from other publications that the _Broad + Liberty_ staff found to be worth reading.
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded exclusively by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

body:
Hey, it's Vivek - never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7941377b58fc4415b089dc0cf413c068&_e=V6OUoKLYAC9_wPqQUCUIbo0YIyxQNoRAr2PVYP4rYVYWHqDw5RwYFC5O6vREnAMNd5YpcvIPu1OopBSUO85UGixQzDEY85kZdjKN5s6CRAHlKZKiJkPEq2E0b5TIRtoy9DQgN5NqCGssXXd9pSJ5r_Mm-CqX2bqUjSydBP1JRkp5aMRAprY8uNjTCIgYHAFoBUXg2aDVrmX5TNdNoikOICnSItITj_e-p8BUN5MCF8DMJ2HR5PMDfmxB7blL_7STizBjvBNUUN8lRp4Vh93ZUXWF43koC-md_1DIGBXtSt3-nF4twhoMXE0O1freI-iuPo6Yqp0U_f_WS43HmZO31DZXdTYebym4tH1-VyehnCeMW1Niw8bHQr6VH_KXjKkYO4mtFrEwLx2ralO_Syzk_g%3D%3D "Vivek Ramaswamy")

My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy.** I hoped to email you on a lighter note but I didn't have another choice with everything happening right now.

The unholy alliance between Joe Biden, the corrupt Deep State, the DC Swamp, the Liberal Media, and the Radical Left Democrats is a national disgrace.

_**[We, the American People, will never forget what they've done to us. Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who:](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7941377b58fc4415b089dc0cf413c068&_e=V6OUoKLYAC9_wPqQUCUIbo0YIyxQNoRAr2PVYP4rYVYWHqDw5RwYFC5O6vREnAMNd5YpcvIPu1OopBSUO85UGixQzDEY85kZdjKN5s6CRAHlKZKiJkPEq2E0b5TIRtoy9DQgN5NqCGssXXd9pSJ5r_Mm-CqX2bqUjSydBP1JRkp5aMRAprY8uNjTCIgYHAFoBUXg2aDVrmX5TNdNoikOICnSItITj_e-p8BUN5MCF8DMJ2HR5PMDfmxB7blL_7STUBYVF-AbhqQLLgUszNJGhcNIlYGz9KuGv8ecFrkJxE2IpGiZX1oxqXff96RqX0Xl9y5wAaeZKKU1Mg9b4HTPxg-zcnOWGcMXp2PED93dZQ201B-MSPatVinEF5bP_BQKf7sHcePhvJbZLFXXNRWpCg%3D%3D "We, the American People, will never forget what they’ve done to us. Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who: ")**_

**- Desecrated** Easter Sunday with wokeism
**- Arrested** the leader of the Republican Party
**- Removed** Trump from the ballot in key states
**- Raided** Mar-a-Lago with armed agents
**- Censored** Conservative voices
**- Spied** on Catholic worshippers
**- Gutted** election integrity measures
**- Peddled** the Russia Hoax for years
**- Threw** open our border to illegals
**- Abandoned** Americans in Afghanistan
**- Caved** to the Chinese Communist Party
**- Moved** to pack the Supreme Court
**- Forced** propaganda into classrooms

And the list goes on and on and on! Never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time. If the Radical Left Democrats somehow win control of the White House, the Senate, and the House... America will be lost forever.

_I know this to be true. You know it too._ But when everything is on the line, moments like this separate the strong from the weak. And make no mistake - the future of our country hangs in the balance.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we're rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen.](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7941377b58fc4415b089dc0cf413c068&_e=V6OUoKLYAC9_wPqQUCUIbo0YIyxQNoRAr2PVYP4rYVYWHqDw5RwYFC5O6vREnAMNd5YpcvIPu1OopBSUO85UGixQzDEY85kZdjKN5s6CRAHlKZKiJkPEq2E0b5TIRtoy9DQgN5NqCGssXXd9pSJ5r_Mm-CqX2bqUjSydBP1JRkp5aMRAprY8uNjTCIgYHAFoBUXg2aDVrmX5TNdNoikOICnSItITj_e-p8BUN5MCF8DMJ2HR5PMDfmxB7blL_7STtY-1STHy58nKwrWdqamCnkOS7dT_xcmWonmDIYVPW6XrpAptTqmwgGai-maZ-yDbu8XVXxvDvbV_S-f0hYzJOLU6w4sXEKh2Iw2xJiyZtjnqneUYgwIoQYgC7tMDDoTpLbyV8MLXOGN2ogCCGX8U4A%3D%3D "That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we’re rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen. ")**_

If you consider yourself a strong American Patriot - like the two of us do - I'm personally asking for your full commitment right here and right now.

The resources we collect today will help build the largest GOP voter turnout operation in history, deploy an army of volunteers in swing districts, run hard-hitting ads in battleground states, harvest ballots where it's legal, and help make this the most secure election EVER.

**THAT** is how Conservatives will win in a landslide...

**THAT** is how we take control of the White House, Senate, AND House...

**THAT** is how we stop the Radical Left Democrats from destroying America...

**THAT** is how we save our country as we know it...

**AND THAT** is how we send shockwaves through the heart of the Deep State, DC Swamp, and Liberal Media...

_**[I'm asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that's you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It's the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you?](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7941377b58fc4415b089dc0cf413c068&_e=V6OUoKLYAC9_wPqQUCUIbo0YIyxQNoRAr2PVYP4rYVYWHqDw5RwYFC5O6vREnAMNd5YpcvIPu1OopBSUO85UGixQzDEY85kZdjKN5s6CRAHlKZKiJkPEq2E0b5TIRtoy9DQgN5NqCGssXXd9pSJ5r_Mm-CqX2bqUjSydBP1JRkp5aMRAprY8uNjTCIgYHAFoBUXg2aDVrmX5TNdNoikOICnSItITj_e-p8BUN5MCF8DMJ2HR5PMDfmxB7blL_7STiuXN7KWkekVGnUngxB8KbyFLsa6oM_tbUbhEnXBcMJjmqDrHj5QamwX4CdhX2JDSqBWJJV-ms4nUiEkfYXsTF8METpfnvWlKbWEkjI95nLO6ZT-VLXIHVS-VDR2qW3lYsIqNm_KdrlJYMDuSHbSxng%3D%3D "I’m asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that’s you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It’s the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you? ")**_

If you can't afford to pitch in $100 or $50 right now, I understand completely. If you can spare JUST $5 or $10, it will still go a long way in the fight for what we believe in. I only ask that everyone contributes SOMETHING.

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy

**THEN** Cheney was **_shunned_** by her Republican colleagues because she told the truth about Trump and all of his wrongdoings.

**SO NOW** she’s doubling down on her commitment to holding Trump accountable and standing up for our democracy! **[So we need you to take our poll to let us know what you think: Do you approve of Liz Cheney? »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/lizcheney?source=FFR_20240428_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21336%2E4449941%2EzUdt6b)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/lizcheney?source=FFR_20240428_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21336%2E4449941%2EzUdt6b) | **[Yes, I approve of Liz Cheney »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/lizcheney?source=FFR_20240428_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=21336%2E4449941%2EzUdt6b)**

_If there’s one thing Democrats and Cheney can agree on, it’s that we MUST get rid of MAGA crooks like Donald Trump!_

subject: Friend, I just realized —

body:
my midnight deadline
| | | Good morning, friend —
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83868278/469780880/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1147-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmIwOTJkZTctNWYwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VETsXGUjJWF3jNU5ekmuDyb4PtMPEUK1EK00W8uh1ZM=)
While enjoying my Sunday breakfast of doughnuts and coffee, I realized that we are rapidly approaching the deadline for our $800,000 end-of-month goal — and as of 9:00 a.m., we're still 12% short of hitting it.
**So I'm reaching out to ask for your help in closing that gap:[ If that's all you need to hear, you can click this link to help me make my goal on time and stay on track to retire Rick Scott. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83868279/469780881/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1147-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmIwOTJkZTctNWYwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VETsXGUjJWF3jNU5ekmuDyb4PtMPEUK1EK00W8uh1ZM=)**
**But before that, I want to share a story about doughnuts — and how they can help save our slim Senate majority. **
My family arrived in America with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment — and her constant reassurance, work ethic, and firm belief in the American dream inspired me to fight for a better life.
**So once I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. **Those small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe and made it so that, every Sunday, my mom and I could set aside time in the afternoon to play dominoes (another treasured Sunday tradition)_._
And after a lot of hard work, the life we only dreamed of before became reality. We moved out of that one room apartment. I got a scholarship to an incredible college. I eventually found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much — **and I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress.**
**In short, making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. With your help, it'll be the start of my story as Florida's next senator, too. **
My life has taught me that even the smallest acts, like kneading dough for minimum wage, have the power to create huge, transformative changes.**And with your small donation of just $10 dollars —** _about the price of a dozen doughnuts_**— or anything you can spare, you can have a big impact on my chances of competing with my ultrawealthy opponent and winning. **
**[So, friend, will you chip in $10 or anything you can before my crucial monthly deadline to help me retire Rick Scott? This campaign is powered by small-dollar donations, so your support makes all the difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83868280/469780882/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1147-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmIwOTJkZTctNWYwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VETsXGUjJWF3jNU5ekmuDyb4PtMPEUK1EK00W8uh1ZM=)**

Together, I’m confident that we can overcome any challenge, and the goal of this ad is to spread that specific message — _but the hard part is raising the funds to keep it running and to fully-fund our campaign for the final few weeks of this race._

Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here!

"We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence.

And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders.

**So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: an incredibly important deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I'm working tirelessly to win change for your family
| | |
---
Friend, it's Kirsten. I'm about to ask you to **[make a $5 donation ahead of my end-of-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83870129/469787087/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4994-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQ0YThmZi02MTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXGOPfnE1MpBGkenKuP5U3dGsrXSK5C2KYAFipXc2lQ=)** This is an incredibly important deadline, and I'm counting on your help to hit my goal. **But first, I want to thank you — so much — for supporting my campaign.**
I'm fighting every single day to earn your support and deliver on the promises I've made to you. From certifying the Equal Rights Amendment so that we can restore reproductive rights nationwide to fighting gun violence and keeping our communities safe, I'm working tirelessly to win change for your family.
As my grandmother taught me when I was a young girl, politics isn't about parties or polling numbers._ It's about the people._ It's my job to serve your family and do everything that I can to make life better for _you_. And it's an honor that I'm grateful for every day. So thank you for trusting me with your support and giving me this incredible opportunity to serve.
I wish that I could end this email here. But unfortunately, elections are an unavoidable part of politics. And to continue to serve your family in the Senate and win progress on all the issues you care about — reproductive rights, affordable health care, protecting our seniors and so much more — **I need your help.**
Democrats are heading into a historically difficult election cycle. And here in New York, right-wing extremists had their best election in decades in 2022. I'm confident that we can reverse that trend this year. **But because I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, I'm counting on grassroots donations to compete with far-right megadonors. **
**[Please, if I've earned your support and trust fighting for you in the Senate, will you make a donation to help me continue this work and defend my seat? I'm up against a critical deadline in less than 48 hours, and I need a surge in grassroots support now to hit my goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83870130/469787088/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4994-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQ0YThmZi02MTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXGOPfnE1MpBGkenKuP5U3dGsrXSK5C2KYAFipXc2lQ=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83870131/469787089/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk4994-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQ0YThmZi02MTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXGOPfnE1MpBGkenKuP5U3dGsrXSK5C2KYAFipXc2lQ=)

With gratitude and love,

Kirsten

I'm about to ask you to = This is an incredibly important deadline, and I'm counting on your help to hit my goal. But first, I want to thank you — so much — for supporting my campaign. I'm fighting every single day to earn your support and deliver on the promises I've made to you. From certifying the Equal Rights Amendment so that we can restore reproductive rights nationwide to fighting gun violence and keeping our communities safe, I'm working tirelessly to win change for your family. As my grandmother taught me when I was a young girl, politics isn't about parties or polling numbers. It's about the people. It's my job to serve your family and do everything that I can to make life better for you. And it's an honor that I'm grateful for every day. So thank you for trusting me with your support and giving me this incredible opportunity to serve. I wish that I could end this email here. But unfortunately, elections are an unavoidable part of politics. And to continue to serve your family in the Senate and win progress on all the issues you care about — reproductive rights, affordable health care, protecting our seniors and so much more — I need your help. Democrats are heading into a historically difficult election cycle. And here in New York, right-wing extremists had their best election in decades in 2022. name: Team Gallego
subject: We have some bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Please. If you have a minute to spare, don’t scroll past this email.
#

Peter, please. If you have a minute to spare, don’t scroll past this email.
We’ve seen a huge swell of support over the last two months as it became clear this will be a two-way race between Ruben Gallego and Kari Lake.
A race between someone who will work to defend and expand the right to abortion, and someone who wants to ban it.
A race between someone who believes in the integrity of our elections, and someone who spreads lies and conspiracies about election denial every chance she gets.
A race between someone who fought to defend our Constitution, and someone who supports the insurrectionists who stormed our Capitol on January 6th.
Ultimately, a race that will be among the closest and most expensive in the entire country.
But here’s the bad news: In spite of all of that, our fundraising has slowed down over the last few days. Not a little bit, either. We were flying before, but we’re crawling now. It’s getting to the point where we’re worried we might not be able to hit our goals.
That’s a problem. If we miss, it could be a disaster for our chances.
To turn this around, we need everyone who understands how important Arizona is, how important this campaign is, to dig deep and make their first donation.
And that’s why we’re asking you, humbly and respectfully:
[**If you can afford to chip in a few dollars to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S. Senate, now is the time to do it. Our April fundraising deadline is coming up fast, and we need your help to hit our goals.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240428-1-160&t=1&akid=2260%2E734936%2Eoob_oD)

President Donald J. Trump is asking for our country to pray again, and I couldn’t agree more.

**_“MAKE AMERICA PRAY AGAIN”_** \- President Trump

It’s Sen. Josh Hawley, and God has a plan, Peter. We trust in Him.

"We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence.

And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders.

clean_body: There's only 100 signed books left | | | | | Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here! "We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence. And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders. So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! "YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE >>>" | No Going Backby Kristi Noem | | | "Generic Button" This memoir is the perfect read for everyone who cares about the future of America. Because if we are going to get America back on track, we must return to the values of grit and hard work that my youth and father instilled in me. BUT DON 'T DELAY - there are only 100 signed copies left. Plus, your contribution today will fuel our efforts to take back the House and restore Conservative leadership in Washington. Thank you for your support! | Kristi Noem Governor of South Dakota | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Andy Kim
subject: Here’s a little secret about political campaigns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
An average Senator running for re-election in 2022 had to raise $13,600 every day just to get re-elected.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83874160/469798840/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjhkMjA5Ni02NzA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f287VpDUz8Pvt0izDehyXTE2SPddJJ0Sz-GaAlUuw6E=&emci=c9e4cf64-2703-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=728d2096-6705-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=26261389)

| | Here's a dirty little secret about political campaigns: they cost a lot of money. An average Senator running for re-election in 2022 had to raise $13,600 every day just to get re-elected. Some candidates spend upwards of 30 hours every week, dialing through lists of wealthy donors, asking for thousands of dollars. I don't want to run that kind of campaign. We're running a campaign "by the people" and "for the people." We're building a grassroots movement in living rooms and at kitchen tables all across New Jersey. **In the first quarter of the year, our team raised over $3 million, with the average donation totaling around $61, and with 95% of all contributions received under $100.** The person who decides if we get to run a true campaign "by the people" is you. If you join us in powering our movement for change, we can show New Jersey and the rest of the country that there's a better way that doesn't just rely on the well-off and well-connected. name: Rick Scott
subject: I’m not afraid to say this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, I’m going to say something most politicians are afraid to say: if you enter our country illegally, you’re a CRIMINAL!

It’s time to stop mincing words and start putting the rule of law FIRST.

This is Senator Rick Scott. I’ve been working to secure our border, but Chuck Schumer and the Democrat Senate majority are cutting me down at every turn.

The Left knows that the SECOND Republicans take back control, we’ll end this border crisis, and that’s why they’re so desperate to stay in power.

_You see, Democrats LOVE open borders because all they see is future Democrat votes._

That’s why states like California want to let illegals vote in elections!

name: Mayra Flores
subject: Lost my Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Service and Honor
body:
The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me – that’s because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.
This is probably the hardest email I’ve ever written.

| |
---
| | | This is probably the hardest email I’ve ever written. | | |
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5c3ff386af1747388de6bbf260b9078c&_e=8dlONWm_am8h_6tmZOFi0Li8zU8tSfoo00P0XxtEx5ap2znMYwAvLqa-KMf2I0SYm0m4RpK5Rgt1kE8j50EzTEB6fZAyOCW_JasK4ceri2bbU2E_HlxVL74e4AHNUYWzk-KffqFdGOCCVhr2qRQKeEnVmWm-kzpXZ-wi4bPYCmjSS3eyu8_Te2KbgbbMOa-Ci2-fE6PYMhOi39rKHGByQJHh2A6PAcQMwPanG4XvGjAe9NjJbMUSEV2t-JDiG3pBWXz_T4ulHsSdgK1Dc9_ntD9iahAkHhEONFkiJZ3pGPRSzWaFeqo9c2KXVbVlDDRwQWH_1sSubp7vyntZsWYxrMSD0z3NmPVchhM4XBxUd_FAmUXFPmRSae83jkt8D72S8rY8rX3_qxweNGXVz9Drkw_JGJuBrlFU4n7hRG4ERzM%3D)

Friend --

I wish things would have gone a different way...

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. ** | **Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control.**
---

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).

Peter,
This isn’t the email I wanted to send on a Sunday, but we’re running out of time, and this can’t wait.
Our next end-of-month fundraising deadline of this unbelievably critical election year is on Tuesday, and according to my fundraising team, we’re still more than $40,000 short of our goal.
If we come up short, we’ll have no choice but to scale back our plans right after a fifth consecutive poll showed Donald Trump running dead-even with President Biden in Minnesota.
**Peter, here’s the bottom line: If Trump flips Minnesota red in November, he wins re-election.** If we’re going to avoid another four years of Donald Trump in the White House, we have to come together around our shared values and give the next six months everything we’ve got. And that starts with reaching Tuesday’s goal.
**[This is a make-or-break moment, and I’m counting on you. Can you chip in for the first time this year to help us make up the difference? Anything (even $1) counts!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83876552/469806496/-252994555?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzExMDVjNy02YjA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iuKDwuffOXF9toySZ-_xGQbPCIcHqBo97VISG53uV68=)**

Team, Saying that it’s important to send President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris back to the White House is the understatement of the century. It’s extremely important to stop Donald Trump. But it’s equally as important to send them Democratic majorities in Congress by flipping control of the House of Representatives and protecting the Senate majority. **[Will you support our efforts to elect Democratic candidates up and down the ballot by donating to Fight Like Hell PAC ahead of our April fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83876604/469806582/-983049648?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240428_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTAxMTA1YzctNmIwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=78x4ECRt6AlTCzxRy_m3sBqo7Tt85foDut4DzIW6KlM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83876606/469806584/-983049648?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240428_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTAxMTA1YzctNmIwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=78x4ECRt6AlTCzxRy_m3sBqo7Tt85foDut4DzIW6KlM=)

**We’ve seen what Washington looks like when Donald Trump is president and Republicans control both chambers of Congress, and it’s not pretty.**
They passed a trillion-dollar tax cut for the wealthy and large corporations _and_ put three far-right judges on the Supreme Court who are directly responsible for overturning _Roe v. Wade._
**In contrast, the Biden-Harris administration have always put hardworking Americans first** — lowering prices for families, reducing the cost of prescription drugs, creating over 15 million new jobs, attacking the climate crisis head-on, and more.
Now, we need to do everything we can to ensure President Biden and Vice President Harris have the Democratic majorities they need in Congress again so they can build on their record economy, make _Roe v. It’s extremely important to stop Donald Trump. But it’s equally as important to send them Democratic majorities in Congress by flipping control of the House of Representatives and protecting the Senate majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We’ve seen what Washington looks like when Donald Trump is president and Republicans control both chambers of Congress, and it’s not pretty. They passed a trillion-dollar tax cut for the wealthy and large corporations and put three far-right judges on the Supreme Court who are directly responsible for overturning Roe v. Wade. In contrast, the Biden-Harris administration have always put hardworking Americans first — lowering prices for families, reducing the cost of prescription drugs, creating over 15 million new jobs, attacking the climate crisis head-on, and more. Now, we need to do everything we can to ensure President Biden and Vice President Harris have the Democratic majorities they need in Congress again so they can build on their record economy, make Roe v. Here are five things you need to know about our opponent:

**1\. He tried to restrict the right to vote.** He voted for legislation to raise the voting age to 21, limit ballot return drop boxes, and waste tax dollars funding sham election audits that boost Trump’s Big Lie.

**2\. He’s an anti-abortion extremist.** He supported a bill that would punish doctors for providing reproductive care, supported defunding Planned Parenthood, and co-sponsored a bill that would implement a six-week heartbeat abortion ban, without exceptions for rape or incest.

**3\. He repeatedly attacked the LGBTQ+ community.** He donated to Women’s Choice Network, which has referred to “homosexual behavior” as “sinful and offensive to God.”

**4\. He supports giving tax breaks to the rich.** He voted to lower the corporate tax rate, then voted *against* a bill to decrease taxes for everyday Pennsylvanians.

**5\. He would be a disaster for working class Pennsylvanians.** He voted *against* protections for workers and *against* a minimum wage increase. He even said that making it easier for workers to unionize is “anti-American.” [**Our opponent would be a disaster for Western Pennsylvania, and we have to defeat him at the ballot box. name: Mark Takano
subject: I was outed by my Republican opponent. Will Rollins is now running to unseat him.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rollins [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rollins]
Hi there, folks, it's Mark Takano.
I'm reaching out to ask you to split a $15 donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rollins] between Serve America and Will Rollins’ campaign before his next deadline hits. Before I do, I want to be vulnerable for a moment, and share a personal story about my coming out experience.
In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay by sending out bigoted, homophobic campaign mailers in our race.
This was before I'd even come out publicly.
Coming out is an extremely personal moment, so you can imagine my horror finding out I had been outed so publicly -- and in such a hateful way.
And you might be familiar with the person who did it -- Ken Calvert, the same Republican that Will Rollins is now running to unseat.
Calvert blamed “the times” and claims he has since changed, but his attacks on the LGBTQ community haven’t. He voted against the Matthew Shepard hate crimes bill. He voted against gay adoption and voted to keep us out of the military.
After all these years, I can’t think of a stronger rebuke of Calvert's long-standing, anti-LGBTQ agenda than by replacing him with an openly gay prosecutor like Will who will uphold the law and fight for equal rights.
Will’s race happens to be one of the most consequential elections in the country in the Democrats’ effort to retake the House. He can win, but he’ll need your support to do it. If you can, please split a contribution of $15 or more between Serve America and Will’s campaign before their next fundraising deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rollins]
Thank you,
Mark
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rollins]

Dear Peter,

I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just had to share it with you.

Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83877234/469808771/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjYWM5MjNkLTZkMDUtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFamUNEDDKxZzQsZvXsDDLaNp8cP3T6Eh8DMC7yV1Zs=)
I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.

Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause.

**Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to ask** — [ will you click this link and pitch in a few dollars to split between Defeat Republicans and my campaign?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83877235/469808772/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjYWM5MjNkLTZkMDUtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFamUNEDDKxZzQsZvXsDDLaNp8cP3T6Eh8DMC7yV1Zs=) If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read on. I have lots to share and more to say. I think you’ll like it.

I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company.

We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school.

This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.)

While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day. In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.

These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.

And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours. That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.

[If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to continue that work by chipping in $25 to split between Defeat Republicans and my campaign before our end of quarter deadline tonight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83877236/469808773/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjYWM5MjNkLTZkMDUtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFamUNEDDKxZzQsZvXsDDLaNp8cP3T6Eh8DMC7yV1Zs=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below._ | [DONATE $25 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83877237/469808774/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjYWM5MjNkLTZkMDUtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFamUNEDDKxZzQsZvXsDDLaNp8cP3T6Eh8DMC7yV1Zs=) [DONATE $50 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83877238/469808775/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjYWM5MjNkLTZkMDUtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFamUNEDDKxZzQsZvXsDDLaNp8cP3T6Eh8DMC7yV1Zs=) [DONATE $100 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83877239/469808776/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&express_lane=true&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjYWM5MjNkLTZkMDUtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFamUNEDDKxZzQsZvXsDDLaNp8cP3T6Eh8DMC7yV1Zs=) [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83877240/469808777/1348252985?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240331_1_3&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjYWM5MjNkLTZkMDUtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dFamUNEDDKxZzQsZvXsDDLaNp8cP3T6Eh8DMC7yV1Zs=)
---

Hopefully, this photo helped brighten your day and gave you a bit more insight into why I have dedicated my life to this cause.

Shalom.

Adam
