name: Team Bohannan
subject: We need a pro-labor House majority.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
For over a century, unions have been at the forefront of the fight for safer working conditions.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83877455/469809838/180180251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzUzNzdkZi02ZDA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ssVbMBxx9rk63VUo2AdYbHGuK0u6IcUkIvsTYCJrv7Q=)
Peter,

Today marks Workers' Memorial Day, a time to honor those who have lost their lives on the job. As we reflect on this solemn occasion, we're also reminded of the critical importance of unions and responsible regulatory agencies in creating safe working environments.

For over a century, unions have been at the forefront of the fight for safer working conditions. **Christina's father was an operator but was never given the chance to be part of a union. When he got sick, the burden of care fell entirely on his family.** Fast forward to today, Christina's brother is a proud member of IBEW and is cancer-free, largely due to the support he got through his earned union benefits. **Christina stands proudly with unions and working Iowans, recognizing their contributions to workers' protection and workplace safety.**

However, Mariannette Miller-Meeks doesn't share our commitment to workers' rights. **With a lifetime score of just 9% from the ALF-CIO, she falls even lower than the average House Republican in their extreme far-right caucus.** She even voted against the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which aimed to strengthen unions and safeguard workers' rights to fair pay, benefits, and safe working conditions.

Christina is running for Congress to stand up against anti-labor extremism and provide a voice for everyday, working Iowans. **But with our end-of-month fundraising deadline just two days away, we're still falling short of our goal.**

That's why we're reaching out to you today: **[Will you chip in today to help us defeat Miller-Meeks, flip IA-01, and create a pro-labor House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83877456/469809839/182211867?refcode=em24_240428_eom3_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240428_eom3_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=ac5377df-6d05-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzUzNzdkZi02ZDA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ssVbMBxx9rk63VUo2AdYbHGuK0u6IcUkIvsTYCJrv7Q=)**

clean_body: For over a century, unions have been at the forefront of the fight for safer working conditions. | = Peter, Today marks Workers' Memorial Day, a time to honor those who have lost their lives on the job. As we reflect on this solemn occasion, we're also reminded of the critical importance of unions and responsible regulatory agencies in creating safe working environments. For over a century, unions have been at the forefront of the fight for safer working conditions. Christina's father was an operator but was never given the chance to be part of a union. When he got sick, the burden of care fell entirely on his family. Fast forward to today, Christina's brother is a proud member of IBEW and is cancer-free, largely due to the support he got through his earned union benefits. Christina stands proudly with unions and working Iowans, recognizing their contributions to workers' protection and workplace safety. However, Mariannette Miller-Meeks doesn't share our commitment to workers' rights. With a lifetime score of just 9% from the ALF-CIO, she falls even lower than the average House Republican in their extreme far-right caucus. She even voted against the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which aimed to strengthen unions and safeguard workers' rights to fair pay, benefits, and safe working conditions. Christina is running for Congress to stand up against anti-labor extremism and provide a voice for everyday, working Iowans. But with our end-of-month fundraising deadline just two days away, we're still falling short of our goal. That's why we're reaching out to you today: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Thank you, Team Bohannan = Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: Lucas’ background and message can win in Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Plus, four other reasons why we need your help today, Peter.
#
Peter — here are 5 reasons why you should add a donation of $5 or more toward our goal of raising $500,000 online before April 30:
**[CHIP IN $5 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/48933?refcode=em20240428-5386&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5386%2E614464%2ETlJ33M)**
1. **Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable.** After winning this Senate seat with only 51% of the vote, Hawley spent his term embarrassing Missouri and betraying our country. Now, Hawley’s approval is just 43% — even lower than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida.
2. **National insiders are targeting our race.** They’ve been spending big since this time last year to prop up Hawley’s campaign. But just this month, we learned they’ve already spent more than $1 MILLION this year to keep Hawley afloat in this race.
3. **Abortion will be on the ballot in Missouri.** This election was already going to be a referendum on Hawley’s crusade against reproductive freedom. But now, with a ballot measure to restore abortion rights in Missouri, we know voters will turn out to take back their power at the ballot box — just like they did to raise the minimum wage, expand healthcare, and legalize weed.
4. **Lucas’ background and message can win in Missouri.** Unlike Josh Hawley, Lucas knows what it’s like to grow up in a forgotten community. He’s seen the power of working people, from all walks of life, coming together to support each other when times get tough. That’s why he’s drawing support from folks all over the state — no matter who they voted for before.
5. **This is our most cost-effective chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024.** Missouri’s media markets are cheaper, and our electorate is smaller, than other states with targeted chances to flip Senate seats this year. That means your support will allow us to reach voters with Lucas’ message early and often — and that’s exactly what it’ll take to win this race.

**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you add $5 (or more!) toward our goal of raising $500,000 online before our end-of-month deadline on Tuesday? clean_body: Plus, four other reasons why we need your help today, Peter. Peter — here are 5 reasons why you should add a donation of $5 or more toward our goal of raising $500,000 online before April 30: 1. Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable. After winning this Senate seat with only 51% of the vote, Hawley spent his term embarrassing Missouri and betraying our country. Now, Hawley’s approval is just 43% — even lower than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida. 2. National insiders are targeting our race. They’ve been spending big since this time last year to prop up Hawley’s campaign. But just this month, we learned they’ve already spent more than $1 MILLION this year to keep Hawley afloat in this race. 3. Abortion will be on the ballot in Missouri. This election was already going to be a referendum on Hawley’s crusade against reproductive freedom. But now, with a ballot measure to restore abortion rights in Missouri, we know voters will turn out to take back their power at the ballot box — just like they did to raise the minimum wage, expand healthcare, and legalize weed. 4. Lucas’ background and message can win in Missouri. Unlike Josh Hawley, Lucas knows what it’s like to grow up in a forgotten community. He’s seen the power of working people, from all walks of life, coming together to support each other when times get tough. That’s why he’s drawing support from folks all over the state — no matter who they voted for before. 5. This is our most cost-effective chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024. Missouri’s media markets are cheaper, and our electorate is smaller, than other states with targeted chances to flip Senate seats this year. That means your support will allow us to reach voters with Lucas’ message early and often — and that’s exactly what it’ll take to win this race. So what do you say, Peter? If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for all your help, Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Connie Britton (via JoeBiden.com)
subject: We can make history again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I use characters and storytelling to make a difference in the world: this Election Day let’s tell the story of the America we believe in, together. | | |
---
Peter, it's Connie Britton. You may know me from my roles in _Friday Night Lights_ , _Nashville, The White Lotus_ , and more. Acting is my passion, and using characters and storytelling to make a difference in the world is my calling. **But today, I’m reaching out to share why I’m supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the presidential election -- and why I hope you will, too.** I remember when I heard the news that President Biden and Vice President Harris had defeated Donald Trump back in 2020. It was an exciting and important moment for our country. Democracy prevailed, and we saw firsthand how their message of unity and progress resonated with folks across the country. As a woman, and mother of a Black son, the relief and hope that I felt was unmatched. **Peter, I want to feel that feeling again.** [If you do too, please pitch in $25 or whatever you can today and join me in supporting the Biden-Harris campaign. Your donation -- no matter the amount -- will go a long way towards helping Joe and Kamala win and making sure that Election Day is a day of joy and optimism.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_txOk3qDyrJonr0YlsQO4Z_FMiIfYa7r0dN0XE7eHt78UruGxxlPnP-yyutbcS6cbMN13FanBLNmrDTRHWj6W9JxdrUnzccglqA5j0TpP7z7oWcFgnaYkxTL9NYyTe7cs1GawmqB6sGc3Fn5qcQOfVXR9H-Va6jPKHsZN1HQoa3qmt_mAlKJW5MoVuVymoyoP_ysV6HQVNt1WQnf_c6egUL-SOmvu1eBBH_F5rsUUgguxYUZ8QK7wy0MFDcJW1APNxwavWFbQyoOBW5cSedhSyjqzryJtm_RV64PGCE6LfW2jIWycL8gok9lcS9lG_bGkU48rxjjXd4kgwUdqYK_QqZwVdX_cP5fBor1_XeFf9PUnrcInjpPWLLSSznNxnEmpq3uXtLF4_PwBcjB39Lyy63g/45w/rhxVp693QkuzT_vx4dIn1A/h0/h001.fuAhisaEO3gEBc1cGijL8pqVXQ8ZSrDQi9v9WcrguEQ) | | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRivizIuY7_hyRTlr0Ev1A4jwo48Pzlh6he5y-OY0IheoZjxVIC4N-AjocZnli1EUay-_nNDlet3bGjiLuuFu4tsMLCs_cM58vsipzQZptXenSkOhedOqzQdCX9cQqdjoWvFJOxrrhmfGgrejvfvo7QkeEJaGq_yZhs3IJYKr0wcw3En8s8J6BULKbOS6rHqIClGWGKzkhlCeO6CMYhg4dC0NAI_I5TKiQ_bL3NgTuapSFG_abKAdjBlGdXh0XaUgNsL1PLlZkYkPouAoPpuULkWrnKqWFj-du4sSL_BP01wRrJ-hBitIg_G1PsOgCnf0AuII65gvGG-hqyYSyNPz9cmWbstaRrcDufN4mtXpHxzOJJGCBuc23AkWSz6wJo6YLtX_e9JAn5XcKgCvNpxwj_cMpE2UKmp2-rH6keptTTk1r8idWj9Oc2RXMlqhk7wkvdY3b40nr1tDYAUptU2irck4CyA75kmoCATJrv9xtqCKRhhQQXCTL1y5NkZYVLfctFg/45w/rhxVp693QkuzT_vx4dIn1A/h1/h001.pg3XoReqZRRZWNRxC-g1THwCGPuH-Oq2MAh-uwPYSrw)

Peter, this election is about our country’s most fundamental values -- as Americans and as human beings. What do we hold most dear? What do we want to teach our children? What do we want the country they grow up in to look like?
I’ve contemplated these questions, and I can sum up my answers in just a few words. I want my son to grow up in a country where he is respected and empowered. Where women are supported in the continuing fight for our rights. Where we treat our earth, our neighbors, and communities around the world with care, compassion and kindness. **And where democracy wins. I want my son to grow up in the America that I know Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are fighting for.**
[Now more than ever, the soul of our nation is at stake. And Joe and Kamala are counting on all of us to do whatever it takes to fight back against extremism and support their campaign. For the future of our democracy and the future of our children. clean_body: I use characters and storytelling to make a difference in the world: this Election Day let’s tell the story of the America we believe in, together. | | | Peter, it's Connie Britton. You may know me from my roles in Friday Night Lights , Nashville, The White Lotus , and more. Acting is my passion, and using characters and storytelling to make a difference in the world is my calling. But today, I’m reaching out to share why I’m supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in the presidential election -- and why I hope you will, too. I remember when I heard the news that President Biden and Vice President Harris had defeated Donald Trump back in 2020. It was an exciting and important moment for our country. Democracy prevailed, and we saw firsthand how their message of unity and progress resonated with folks across the country. As a woman, and mother of a Black son, the relief and hope that I felt was unmatched. Peter, I want to feel that feeling again. | | | Peter, this election is about our country’s most fundamental values -- as Americans and as human beings. What do we hold most dear? What do we want to teach our children? What do we want the country they grow up in to look like? I’ve contemplated these questions, and I can sum up my answers in just a few words. I want my son to grow up in a country where he is respected and empowered. Where women are supported in the continuing fight for our rights. Where we treat our earth, our neighbors, and communities around the world with care, compassion and kindness. And where democracy wins. I want my son to grow up in the America that I know Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are fighting for. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for all you're doing, Connie Britton

Six months, Peter!

That's how long we have until the November Election, and only three months until the August Primary.

The clock is ticking and the future of our country is at stake. Luckily, the momentum is on our side. But if I'm being honest, a victory in November will not be possible without the constant support of conservatives like you. Your dedication means the world to me, and together, I know we'll take back this seat to continue Don Young's legacy of delivering real results for Alaska and America. Thanks for standing with me,

During my speech to the delegates and guests, I emphasized my goals for revitalizing the economy, undoing Biden's energy destruction, securing our borders, protecting our elections, and prioritizing Alaska's security. I was honored to have Speaker Mike Johnson, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, and Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik introduce me via video at the event.

clean_body: | | | | | Six months, Peter! That's how long we have until the November Election, and only three months until the August Primary. The clock is ticking and the future of our country is at stake. Luckily, the momentum is on our side. But if I'm being honest, a victory in November will not be possible without the constant support of conservatives like you. Your dedication means the world to me, and together, I know we'll take back this seat to continue Don Young's legacy of delivering real results for Alaska and America. Thanks for standing with me, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | We have the momentum with the support of conservative leaders in Alaska and across the country. They're on Team Dahlstrom, and I cannot wait to join them to help get America back on track! ✅ Anne Garland Young, Widow of Don Young (NEW!) ✅ Congressional Leadership Fund ✅ Mike Dunleavy, Governor of Alaska ✅ Speaker of the House Mike Johnson ✅ House Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik ✅ House Majority Leader Steve Scalise ✅ House Majority Whip Tom Emmer ✅ Winning for Women PAC | | | Addressing the Alaska Republican State Convention I enjoyed meeting dedicated Republicans from across out state. During my speech to the delegates and guests, I emphasized my goals for revitalizing the economy, undoing Biden's energy destruction, securing our borders, protecting our elections, and prioritizing Alaska's security. I was honored to have Speaker Mike Johnson, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, and Republican Conference Chair Elise Stefanik introduce me via video at the event. | | | A Video Message from House Leadership Did you hear the news? House leadership is rallying behind our campaign and her fight for Alaska! | | “We are proud to support Nancy Dahlstrom. She is a new and fresh voice for Alaska that will win this seat and grow our majority. When I met Nancy, she made clear that Alaska comes before all else. That is the type of honorable leadership that we need more of. Nancy knows what it will take to protect of border, secure our elections and unleash America and Alaska's potential” – Elise Stefanik, House Conference Chair | | | Our Race was Identified as Top 20 Race in the Country As the year moves closer and closer to November, races are heating up. And as cold as the weather may be, Alaska is no exception. Our very own congressional seat has been identified as aTOP 20 race for the 2024 election cycle. While we have a lot of work to do to secure this seat, it's up to all of us to get the word out. | | "If the GOP can coordinate a positive campaign and educate its voters on ranked-choice, it stands a chance to flip the seat." | | | | Alaskans are independent, strong willed, and always willing to lend a hand whether you're a lifelong friend or a complete stranger. Pick up one of our new "Alaska Strong" T-shirts or other merch items to support my campaign and show your Alaska pride. Supplies are limited, so act fast! | It's time to retire Mary Peltola! Week after week, month after month, Mary Peltola is abandoning Alaskan values for the radical ideology of the left. Thankfully, the dedicated volunteers at the Alaska GOP are keeping track of her destructive behavior. Just last month, she joined Nancy Pelosi and voted to strike down major reform legislation to combat rampant corruption in the green energy sector. | Thanks for scrolling through another Dahlstrom Dispatch! With your support, we can restore Alaska's conservative voice in congress. Can't donate? No problem. There are many ways that you can get involved. clean_body: | = Peter - Did you see Joyce’s email earlier this week? She was sounding the alarm about our April fundraising goal! We are pacing behind and with no wiggle room thanks to our well-funded MAGA opponent, Kelly Ayotte. We have to step it up. = | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you for stepping up! Team Craig —Forwarded Message— = Good morning, Peter! Sorry for the early email, but I wanted to check in with our top supporters first thing today. I just met with my Finance Director, Katelyn, over a cup of coffee to talk about our fundraising and she had some not so great news... we are pacing behind on our April goal. = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Right now, our campaign is in a dead heat against Republican Kelly Ayotte in the polls. We knew this would be a tough race, but the ratings from the Cook Political Report confirmed it: Democrats will have to give it our all if we want to flip this toss-up seat. Now that Kelly Ayotte has endorsed Donald Trump for President, the MAGA donors are in full force to help them both flip New Hampshire bright red. But I feel confident that if we meet our monthly fundraising goals, we have the message and the team to build a strong operation that can elect Democrats up and down the ballot come November. = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, your support means so much. \- Joyce | = | = = Joyce Craig for NH PO Box 3893 Manchester, NH 03105 United States | mailto:info@joycecraig.org Paid for by Joyce Craig for NH. Patricia Cornell, Treasurer. P.O. Box 3893, Manchester NH, 03105

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_042824_housing [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_042824_housing]
Hi Peter,
Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes is bringing a price-fixing lawsuit against nine of the state's largest landlords and a property management software company for conspiring to raise rent costs, and we fully support AG Kris Mayes in her efforts.
In Congress, we’ll have Attorney General Mayes’ and working Arizonans’ backs, but to get there, we have to win our election. Can you pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_042824_housing]
I know first-hand how our working families are getting squeezed left and right because I’ve been part of a working family my whole life. That’s why we’ve dedicated our careers to fighting for working families. We took on big money interests in the Arizona Legislature and raised Arizona’s minimum wage. Meanwhile, our opponents actually makes money as a landlord charging above-average Phoenix rent prices.
In Congress, we will have the backs of working families and TAKE ON corporate-backed interests, not be on their side. Will you help us get there with a contribution of $10? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_042824_housing]

Thank you,
Raquel Terán

Fellow patriot,

The Democrats have drastically stepped up their online fundraising in key House and Senate races, **and we're in danger of being overwhelmed.**

It's clear their left-wing donor base is _as motivated as ever_ to stop conservatives from regaining Congress and the White House.

We're falling behind, _**and we MUST step it up**_ if we're going to restore America First leadership to secure our borders, keep us safe, lower inflation, and defend our freedoms & values.

**My request today is a simple one:** [**I'm asking everyone reading this to chip in _just $5_ to help conservatives flip this seat in Ohio and take back the Senate majority.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1bd688956f974eea973b3ada96e6f3b8&_e=E5qKI1yo5BMAy58Nm_oBjIoT-QjHzEsXHy3Xg3xO66zxEv7HxZcwijWs3dcnDzallkK6sGGFIHNWcbg6M2LTuYLq347CmSvuXw8UWCFhX6Mj_6pvaSX4R_zCCKTLp4LcTlxKt0GzBUcEZwCxo4YnSv6jWDQK39NEHxWubYa3GAjpbt0jIqwoF3BiZ3iGRK63zBs7igJPeXQp_so_S9YvoFhc3nEtB7CrD_mPr5b9xojXcgeQvI4y67q9Dh2C7b6zE3-YYawIfdI30X-YoSt3tVcLIblUUmrGIAlDUF82391w1P0rwicvdLONTfsdXtSfv6E_KxQW8AbTZxu_royi_TEGMlYxwiL5kGB2SMf5-6qCr9JU8FiZNNm2qXf1vfIHpbBhA-GcoBeuxpKbjYx_qQ%3D%3D)

[**CHIP IN JUST $5 »**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1bd688956f974eea973b3ada96e6f3b8&_e=E5qKI1yo5BMAy58Nm_oBjIoT-QjHzEsXHy3Xg3xO66zxEv7HxZcwijWs3dcnDzallkK6sGGFIHNWcbg6M2LTuYLq347CmSvuXw8UWCFhX6Mj_6pvaSX4R_zCCKTLp4LcTlxKt0GzBUcEZwCxo4YnSv6jWDQK39NEHxWubYa3GAjpbt0jIqwoF3BiZ3iGRK63zBs7igJPeXQp_so_S9YvoFhc3nEtB7CrD_mPr5b9xojXcgeQvI4y67q9Dh2C7b6z_p_tBExq6WaQKfBKF8svBZY5t6AokNPifCLBOvLldif8VyKP-9nHEBdvnfGBl64sLVMjimanXZ3Hka6lIletWtkSBTVnOYh_YuGGuNVCG6NA9d6pXwvTowN0UpHAeCSGrxFN8MhQWcLicakLKAiHHw%3D%3D)
If you, **fellow patriot** , along with everyone else here can do just that today, it would _**significantly impact**_ our ability to broaden our reach and get passed the Democrats' messaging blockade.

[**Just $5**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1bd688956f974eea973b3ada96e6f3b8&_e=E5qKI1yo5BMAy58Nm_oBjIoT-QjHzEsXHy3Xg3xO66zxEv7HxZcwijWs3dcnDzallkK6sGGFIHNWcbg6M2LTuYLq347CmSvuXw8UWCFhX6Mj_6pvaSX4R_zCCKTLp4LcTlxKt0GzBUcEZwCxo4YnSv6jWDQK39NEHxWubYa3GAjpbt0jIqwoF3BiZ3iGRK63zBs7igJPeXQp_so_S9YvoFhc3nEtB7CrD_mPr5b9xojXcgeQvI4y67q9Dh2C7b6z1LYxjS76u--tF2kjgIJUYPU8i-jmiXvy4zv81fxHcx7WC5q_Ojc7Jg1mLf8ODmkFkdg8YtxtXg0y8easJ8P5VugFacxkjRk7EkWYwOaGzL7H5nAvtHbQgnNdY9rHeX_8ZKv5kT-1aGSJxPQxvb6a6Q%3D%3D) - there's a lot at stake, and this is all I am asking today.

Thank you,
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1bd688956f974eea973b3ada96e6f3b8&_e=E5qKI1yo5BMAy58Nm_oBjIoT-QjHzEsXHy3Xg3xO66zxEv7HxZcwijWs3dcnDzallkK6sGGFIHNWcbg6M2LTuYLq347CmSvuXw8UWCFhX6Mj_6pvaSX4R_zCCKTLp4LcTlxKt0GzBUcEZwCxo4YnSv6jWDQK39NEHxWubYa3GAjpbt0jIqwoF3BiZ3iGRK63zBs7igJPeXQp_so_S9YvoFhc3nEtB7CrD_mPr5b9xojXcgeQvI4y67q9Dh2C7b6zJaKLXkNzgn6cD0x3kEP4LVAIy0Uo4HSfVfDWLE-qw16gvYDj1bSb6vnq3p0uB_SKQk9xwtBNecxcNGqvST4gTyrZ26mM-cF67e6aKBSplTq-mTYm9ZJuwmdmB5Kva3cH2GbbfjF9enylp3VDEP98DA%3D%3D)
Bernie Moreno
GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1bd688956f974eea973b3ada96e6f3b8&_e=E5qKI1yo5BMAy58Nm_oBjIoT-QjHzEsXHy3Xg3xO66zxEv7HxZcwijWs3dcnDzallkK6sGGFIHNWcbg6M2LTuYLq347CmSvuXw8UWCFhX6Mj_6pvaSX4R_zCCKTLp4LcTlxKt0GzBUcEZwCxo4YnSv6jWDQK39NEHxWubYa3GAjpbt0jIqwoF3BiZ3iGRK63zBs7igJPeXQp_so_S9YvoFhc3nEtB7CrD_mPr5b9xojXcgeQvI4y67q9Dh2C7b6z2pXbiFL5dHOAYo18BQgnoqassCpJGfmrGVXijE9DARBsxEjUlzl2KkCCgyMXHJmVdFHEroxmvxnNklgQMcOShZhka414bkwKId21qTQ6JtkdnAtXDNbrvja4pW_iHoeTmRgg3rA1Bm0hNR89Nh5L-A%3D%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1bd688956f974eea973b3ada96e6f3b8&_e=E5qKI1yo5BMAy58Nm_oBjIoT-QjHzEsXHy3Xg3xO66zxEv7HxZcwijWs3dcnDzallkK6sGGFIHNWcbg6M2LTuYLq347CmSvuXw8UWCFhX6Mj_6pvaSX4R_zCCKTLp4LcTlxKt0GzBUcEZwCxo4YnSv6jWDQK39NEHxWubYa3GAjpbt0jIqwoF3BiZ3iGRK63zBs7igJPeXQp_so_S9YvoFhc3nEtB7CrD_mPr5b9xojXcgeQvI4y67q9Dh2C7b6zOMKMBTn7uZ0BR4r1IryzjM1qiajwAVkowgG7QJA87nSYrb4zjYRJkabV3xX2iQet5qoniuQiflpCb_ty20goXDRtKsd8DHku__Hjy2J449WXhbS0l07OLwR0wtjz6fVQmDO4soDRcIh_xTuZlBzy-Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: There's a lot a stake, and this is all I am asking today. | Fellow patriot, The Democrats have drastically stepped up their online fundraising in key House and Senate races, and we're in danger of being overwhelmed. It's clear their left-wing donor base is as motivated as ever to stop conservatives from regaining Congress and the White House. We're falling behind, and we MUST step it up if we're going to restore America First leadership to secure our borders, keep us safe, lower inflation, and defend our freedoms & values. My request today is a simple one: If you, fellow patriot , along with everyone else here can do just that today, it would significantly impact our ability to broaden our reach and get passed the Democrats' messaging blockade. - there's a lot at stake, and this is all I am asking today. Thank you, Bernie Moreno GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13962%2E878179%2EgU0HKw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13962%2E878179%2EgU0HKw).**

name: Sen. Chuck Schumer
subject: I am asking you to donate $10 to defeat Ted Cruz:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Colin Allred needs your help to defeat Ted Cruz and help protect our critical Senate majority.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T27706f81-96db-48bb-94bc-fa144b1e356e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38949609-60c9-4e83-b181-3f62fdbc4126/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, it's Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, and [I'm reaching out because Colin Allred officially is the Democratic nominee to run against and defeat Ted Cruz, and I need you to donate $10 to help him and Blue Amp Action win.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta73009aa-d718-4793-8a6f-7ea743a95e6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2d0b8fa-a6f9-4063-a841-bd95844b30f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Let me tell you why your support is so important. The race to defeat Ted Cruz doesn't just concern Texans – it concerns the future of our democracy. Our country can't handle six more years of Ted Cruz, his attacks on reproductive freedoms, his dismantling of our fundamental voting rights, and his endless self-centered antics. He's proven time and time again that his only loyalty is to himself, not the people he's supposed to represent. It's time to send him packing. Not only because Texans deserve so much better – but because if Colin wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to retain control of the Senate, which is our last line of defense against the far right. Colin can win this – Cruz won by just 2.6% of the vote in 2018. Election experts know it, and recent polling numbers show them TIED. But he'll need a massive movement of grassroots supporters behind him to help him reach voters, pull ahead, and win. [That starts today with you, Peter. Colin needs to raise $65,000 by midnight tonight so that he can stay on track to reach enough voters and win in November. That's why I'm personally asking: Will you donate $10 right now to power Colin and Blue Amp Action's campaign to victory and defeat Ted Cruz? With your help, we can finally give Texans the leadership they deserve and protect the future of our democracy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f8427d7-8d40-4b0e-b3fd-aadb1b0ecf9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Thank you, Chuck Schumer

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5095028c-550d-474b-b387-74798adcf698/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Rob Bresnahan Jr.
subject: This Needs to be Kept Confidential, Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA
body:
Don't open this if you can't keep a secret
|
---
Fellow American,

**I 'm glad that you opened this email, but this needs to be kept a secret between us.**

**I 'm behind my next major fundraising deadline, even though President Trump just endorsed me. This is not good. How did we get to this point?**

**FIRST:** I launched my campaign to flip PA-08 red and fire Matt Cartwright, who is backed by Joe Biden. Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left Woke Money Machine. I want to empower my community and stand up for the little guy, and that means standing up to career politicians like Matt Cartwright, who has lied countless times to Americans and sided with Nancy Pelosi 100 percent of the time in Congress. Cartwright snuck by with victories in 2016 and 2020 despite President Trump winning in PA-08 both times.

**THEN:** President Trump endorsed me, noting the difference between my opponent and me, "Rob worked hard to Create Jobs and Grow the Economy, unlike his opponent, Matt Cartwright, who is completely beholden to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left." Speaker Johnson, Steve Scalise, Elise Stefanik, Tom Emmer, and countless others also endorsed me.

**NOW:** [**I 'm asking you to endorse me and to chip in a donation of whatever you can afford.**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7e80cdc96c164a57b63015868bf5d560&_e=BU3duZe5TZLJ59Kwb-f6xRisfvPhQCXigs9jyYILKDYvPbHJAoihrMFcs65kieMXohJRDI92iADgCZebiZLYE2APcrmkGG91MGdCgq0mvqb2LYcCqMGIanWiNSfmSHm6YNPlhy5-PJgv3ApmNdZ_EiignaVIsdheo-yuKH3b4-2183J6psUDYkDfBXPVrmZe1GhsH-t3Ure6GIdg5zSfIZzKVw-K1hY825hivZRKNMy35G3HujwmBqc9SEFI9qPvOtlZ92MLtYnsk0trMf0yEIwGiRfkIog4ygCWOnAmXMxQMG5Rdedu-2_VgJbUM_Iw4lTPEzj5IWDkDYPwR7saAeZV07NTtlUjT26OWYtdGgiC3fVMfm7E6NO4WPhovWAyFuDHFuKFTr5w7W03XnuqsnJjfv9bIuA0IFNrNLDELrE%3D) It may not seem like much, but having a strong flow of grassroots donors and supporters will help me finally unseat Cartwright, expand our House Majority, and give President Trump one more much-needed ally in Congress when we win on November 5. This is only achievable if we meet our fundraising goals, and it starts with my next major deadline. Help me catch up.

**President Trump endorsed me because he knows I 'll fight hard to Secure the Border, Cut Wasteful Spending, Strengthen our Military, Support our Veterans, Protect our Second Amendment, and Hold Joe Biden and his Thugs accountable for their Unconstitutional Lawfare, Corruption, and Election Interference.**

If you care about any or all of those issues, then you should care about supporting my campaign, even if you're not within the PA-08 boundary lines. This race is about more than just Northeastern PA; it's about the future of our country.

[**So, I 'm humbly asking you to co-endorse me with President Trump by contributing whatever you can afford and helping me catch up on my next major fundraising deadline.**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7e80cdc96c164a57b63015868bf5d560&_e=BU3duZe5TZLJ59Kwb-f6xRisfvPhQCXigs9jyYILKDYvPbHJAoihrMFcs65kieMXohJRDI92iADgCZebiZLYE2APcrmkGG91MGdCgq0mvqb2LYcCqMGIanWiNSfmSHm6YNPlhy5-PJgv3ApmNdZ_EiignaVIsdheo-yuKH3b4-2183J6psUDYkDfBXPVrmZe1GhsH-t3Ure6GIdg5zSfIZzKVw-K1hY825hivZRKNMy35G3HujwmBqc9SEFI9qPvsqjsO01ekpfFOvS7EhypJdDfsGalMDYyRR_3QZyJXS9XwF4RvlQFDQOjtvRZF4vveKIHgrYvLQZJWCopxzUhLLli5kxkrY5i-2pqeE5TiglgZHSlxybAZKOS6n1CAsy2hQiaKpix_L6Rtb035FXuWEvSesDEouMDTyWbv7unk1Q%3D)

Thanks for charging⚡️ my campaign,
[](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7e80cdc96c164a57b63015868bf5d560&_e=BU3duZe5TZLJ59Kwb-f6xRisfvPhQCXigs9jyYILKDYvPbHJAoihrMFcs65kieMXohJRDI92iADgCZebiZLYE2APcrmkGG91MGdCgq0mvqb2LYcCqMGIanWiNSfmSHm6YNPlhy5-PJgv3ApmNdZ_EiignaVIsdheo-yuKH3b4-2183J6psUDYkDfBXPVrmZe1GhsH-t3Ure6GIdg5zSfIZzKVw-K1hY825hivZRKNMy35G3HujwmBqc9SEFI9qPvW4J7eJbrZcEeQJmEBsg-R0svD329E9o98RG3vJBR9E1F236gg1TY8dTtXlSsegkgiZDma7dYxOL6pBkr3dqyXucKzQmYCgyorCLsf-Z08gcpYKzXDQXP3XSNiW3wP5u7QOUREKv45uLtwfAqAlz2TIBLMC_5b_SwuVShOctLOAw%3D)

Meet Rob Bresnahan:

**A fifth-generation Northeastern Pennslyvanian, Rob Bresnahan took the reins of his grandfather's union electrical contracting company at age 19 and expanded the business across the commonwealth while tripling the number of good-paying union careers they provided to Pennsylvanians. Rob is focused on facing challenges head on to solve problems.

_That's why he's running for United States Congress._

Rob is committed to bringing people together and is uniquely qualified to send a jolt of energy through Congress and deliver results for everyone here in Northeastern Pennsylvania.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Wisconsin’s Senate race is TIED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi folks, Tammy Baldwin here with an important update: **A brand new poll shows that my Senate race in Wisconsin is TIED 50-50.** My megamillionaire Republican opponent, Eric Hovde, is gaining ground in Wisconsin — _and fast_. First, he plastered Wisconsin’s airwaves with more than $4 million worth of ads. Then, the Republican primary field cleared for Hovde, giving him more than 7 uninterrupted months to campaign against me. **Now, the latest polling has us tied.** Republicans are going all in to flip this I red, and we can’t expect him to let up. Eric Hovde has pledged to self-fund at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to defeat me, _and he’s on pace to spend even more than that._ Look, unlike my wealthy opponent, I can’t self-fund this campaign. I don’t have right-wing dark money groups or GOP megadonors who can spend a fortune to tilt the scales in my favor. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help me fight back. We need your help to reach undecided voters, keep our ads on the air, and make sure Hovde’s attacks don’t go unanswered. **[Will you split a donation between Tina Smith and my campaign today to help me win this 50-50 Senate race? name: Gabby Giffords and Emma Brown
subject: We have to ask you this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We usually wouldn’t reach out together, but this is important
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords here reaching out with GIFFORDS’ Executive Director, Emma Brown.Gabby Giffords
Hey team, Gabby and I just looked over our numbers for the month, and we’ve got some ground to make up to reach our April fundraising goals.Emma Brown |
| [**Can you use this link to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before the month ends?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240428-1-30&t=1&akid=8011%2E3935704%2EB5Ie4A) We really need you with us if we’re going to meet our objectives. Gabby Giffords
The stakes of this year’s elections are far too high for us to come up short. Each and every fundraising deadline is a crucial opportunity for us to garner the resources we need to support gun safety candidates up and down the ballot.Emma Brown |
| That’s why we need all hands on deck to make sure we reach our April goals before our end of month deadline passes on Tuesday. Are you with us?Gabby Giffords
[**Please make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today before our April fundraising deadline on Tuesday. This is so important.](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr24.Y_Rik7&refcode=em240428-1-30&t=2&akid=8011%2E3935704%2EB5Ie4A)**

Are you with us?Gabby Giffords If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** — Gabby Giffords and Emma Brown — Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Patriot Sentinel
subject: The Patriot Sentinel
body:
| |
---
|
# **LONG-AWAITED US MILITARY AID NO 'SILVER-BULLET' FOR UKRAINE**
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=0&link=d7dc9e38ecbd4fb6a0faf9af4312b389)
---
**The United States is the first to acknowledge that its long-awaited $61 billion aid package for Ukraine is not a "silver bullet."** As weapons and ammunition are rushed to the country, other issues such as manpower shortages in Kyiv's struggling military have come to the fore. Meanwhile, the monthslong delay in passing the aid package -- caused by wrangling among US lawmakers -- has further weakened Ukraine's position on the battleground, according to analysts.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=1&link=42879289da9c44d8894afeeb2db4ae5f)
---
|
---
|
# **SCIENTISTS EXPLAIN WHY THERE ARE 'SPIDERS' ON MARS**
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=2&link=9db525ecfc734e6bb7ae1ef61d8fe214)
---
**Incredible images taken by the ESA’s Mars Express and ExoMars Trace Gas Orbiter (TGO) spacecraft shows distinctive arachnid shapes.** However, the creepy crawlies are actually small, dark features that form when spring sunshine falls on layers of carbon dioxide deposited over the Red Planet's dark winter months. The phenomenon was viewed at the outskirts of a part of Mars nicknamed Inca City in the southern polar region, so-called as the linear, almost geometric network of ridges are reminiscent of Inca ruins.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=3&link=98a19a0766cb4488becf38aaebe904ff)
---
|
---
|
# **ISRAELI MINISTER CRITICIZES BIDEN'S LEADERSHIP AS 'HARMFUL': SAYS HE'D VOTE FOR TRUMP INSTEAD**
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=4&link=fd617e2ae71744bfacc1ba7dd3ccdb5f)
---
**Amichai Chikli, the Israeli Minister of Diaspora Affairs, made a strong statement when he said that former President Trump would better serve the interests of Israel and the Jewish people, who are in the middle of a war with Hamas.** Chikli said on Wednesday that Biden was ‘harming Israel’ and his weak policies in the face of growing threats do not help. He also said that he would vote for Trump if he were allowed to participate in American elections. Biden's leadership is not projecting any strength, and it is not only harming Israel but also other countries. Chikli is a member of Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's Likud Party. The comments come as Israel has crossed the 200th day of its war with Hamas in Gaza.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=5&link=4a0be1a8a48745d5b2d1e24f1cf6157f)
---
|
---
|
# **WEINSTEIN'S 2020 RAPE CONVICTION REVERSAL: NEW YORK APPEALS COURT DECISION STUNS**
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=6&link=c7a4d12d2a5b42018cf42e0e3ef02a5e)
---
**A stunning reversal of a 2020 rape conviction of Harvey Weinstein was overturned in a New York Appeals Court decision on Thursday, backed by a 4-3 decision. The court has determined that women who said they had been assaulted by Weinstein were allowed to testify even though their accusations had nothing to do with the case.** Weinstein was convicted in February 2020 of forcing oral sex and sentenced to 23 years in prison that stemmed from the alleged incident that happened with TV and film production assistant Mimi Haley in 2006 and the third-degree rape of hairstylist Jessica Mann in 2023.
Weinstein’s defense lawyer, Donna Rotunno, believes justice has been served in this case and courts cannot operate on emotion and lack of due process. She says this decision restores faith in the foundation of our system.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=7&link=1472040750704111bbd73060c4014db8)
---
|
---
|
# **DOCUMENTS REVEAL ALLEGED POLITICAL TARGETING IN TRUMP PROSECUTION**
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=8&link=3a2f153611674e77857a97c5796d0d63)
---
**Judge Aileen Cannon recently unsealed a series of documents suggesting a targeted effort within the Biden administration to politically prosecute former President Donald Trump.** These documents were revealed in the context of accusations directed at the DOJ, particularly under Special Counsel Jack Smith, who had indicted Trump in June 2023 for allegedly mishandling classified documents at his Mar-a-Lago residence. The indictment followed a highly publicized and unprecedented raid on a former president’s home, raising questions about the impartiality of the legal actions taken. The unsealed documents expose alleged manipulative tactics used against Trump's aides to force their cooperation. A notable incident involved the DOJ’s lead prosecutor, Jay Bratt, allegedly threatening Trump staff member Walt Nauta’s attorney with negative repercussions on his judicial nomination if Nauta did not cooperate. This tactic, if true, represents a severe misuse of power intended to leverage legal threats for political gain.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=9&link=278bf7b104164fe7a654cfe51e104451)
---
|
---
|
# **BILL TO BAN TIKTOK IN US CLEARS CONGRESS**
---
| [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=10&link=7c29c0309a6e44bb8ffc1f0d501b0bb7)
---
**The US Senate on Tuesday approved legislation requiring the wildly popular social media app TikTok to be divested from its Chinese parent company ByteDance or be shut out of the American market.** The measure was part of a $95 billion foreign aid package, including military assistance to Ukraine, Israel and Taiwan, which has now cleared Congress and heads to President Joe Biden's desk. US and other Western officials have voiced alarm over the popularity of TikTok with young people, alleging it allows Beijing to collect data and spy on users. It has 170 million users in the United States alone.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=11&link=e1d3d171dec747b39b304f12772f3902)
---
| |
---
| [ [View in Browser](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/view?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od) ] [ [Forward to a Friend](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/forward?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od) ] [ [Unsubscribe](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/unsub?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) ] [ [Report Spam](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/unsol?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) ] Email Marketing by [ [DirectIQ ] ](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=dn7w50sz3kpp2ix3od&linkid=17&link=https://www.DirectIQ.com?utm_source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_content=3065887&utm_campaign=)
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsb2L2OiPN

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osb2L2OiPN

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63100104:sb2L2OiPN:m:3:2627245898:2693468345175352A0E75AA5A6DDC3E2:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isb2L2OiPN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osb2L2OiPN

Peter, my end-of-month fundraising deadline is approaching rapidly, and I'm humbly asking for your help.
I've said it before: Asking for money is my _least_ favorite part of running a campaign. But if I don't, I won't have the resources to continue standing up for you and holding powerful and corrupt men accountable for their actions.

**So I have to ask:** [**Can you chip in $5 right now so I can continue to fight fearlessly for justice? I still need to raise $1,822 by Tuesday's deadline, and I need your help to close the gap.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83882961/469826977/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1426-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDQ5NWRkZi03NDA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-BYhzSnpUzt8I6Si-3EXAVZ45F4L5U7Aj1mihYF10c=)

Peter, I'm not afraid to make enemies. From the moment I became New York's attorney general in 2019, I got to work holding the wealthy, corrupt, and manipulative accountable. I went after Big Pharma, Big Polluters, gun rights activists, landlords – and now, I'm holding one of the most powerful and corrupt men in the nation accountable.
But to be honest, these corrupt (and well-funded) enemies of mine are going to dive deep into my fundraising numbers to find any weaknesses they're able to. They're going to want a fight, and I need to show that I have a powerful team standing with me. That's where you come in, Peter.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Here’s the truth:
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2499%2E35263%2EmgBdDF)
Peter — I know these emails can be pesky and that my team has been sending more than usual this week. I owe you an explanation as to why that is: Here’s the truth: Eric Hovde has eliminated the polling gap in this race since launching his campaign and cutting himself an $8 million check. Wisconsin’s Senate race is now a dead 50-50 tie. And this is only just the beginning. Hovde pledged to self-fund at least $20 million of his own personal fortune to flip this seat red, and he’s currently on pace to spend even more than that. I’ve said it before, asking for donations is my least favorite part of the job. And I mean it. **But that doesn’t negate the fact that donations to emails just like this are one of our most valuable sources of grassroots fundraising.** 96% of our donations last quarter were under $200, so believe me when I tell you your $5, $10, and $25 donations are keeping us afloat in this neck-and-neck Senate race. We raised our fundraising goals to respond to Hovde’s flood of spending, but I can’t self-fund like he can to make up the gap. Peter, I’m counting on you to help us out. **[I’m personally asking: Will you chip in to help me defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat from my megamillionaire opponent? We can’t protect our Democratic Senate majority unless we keep this battleground seat blue.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240428_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2499%2E35263%2EmgBdDF)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-apr24.Xs9pUr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240428_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2499%2E35263%2EmgBdDF)

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m stressed, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

Montana is the most important Senate race in the country and _The Hill_ ranks my seat the most likely to flip.
Meanwhile, my team tells me our fundraising took a massive nosedive while our opponents outspent us on the airwaves. If we don’t catch up on our fundraising soon, we’ll have to make some tough decisions about what to cut from our budget. **That could cost us the election.**

Political experts rank this seat a**toss-up** , which means it’s anyone’s game to win.

**That’s why you’re one of 10 Democrats from 37087 that we selected to take part in our exclusive live poll – but we're still missing your response. So please, tell us now:**

Top Democrats like you know that the president has made real progress for American families. Here are just some of the things he’s accomplished:
**REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS:**
He signed executive orders protecting abortion rights from the GOP's attacks.
**CLIMATE ACTION:**
He enacted the most ambitious climate action agenda in American history.
**GUN SAFETY:**
He signed the first major gun safety bill in 30 years.
**HEALTH CARE:**
He lowered seniors’ health care expenses and capped insulin costs for millions.
**JOBS:**
He helped create millions of new, good-paying jobs under his leadership.

|

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m the Senate’s only working farmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Jon Tester's Senate campaign in Montana from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83883704/469829171/-305636696?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDJiMzBlOC03NTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QwlZVPnoKEoGMVtGyIMO4XNjoKwXGO2SNRmTnmul4MQ=&emci=b1a184bc-7505-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=e02b30e8-7505-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=19445147)_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83883705/469829172/417329036?refcode=em20240428am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e02b30e8-7505-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDJiMzBlOC03NTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QwlZVPnoKEoGMVtGyIMO4XNjoKwXGO2SNRmTnmul4MQ=)
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.**
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons—but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
**These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:**

clean_body: I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts. = Hey folks, Jon Tester here. I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts. I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it. Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons—but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet. These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Adam Frisch will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This will be one of the most competitive races of 2024, and I’ll need your help from the very beginning to build a team strong enough to win. body:
Final Time Reaching Out - I’m going to need a hand

| [](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7676dfd0c72046799e2779e0ee1cbb14&_e=oI5cqU7DNbJRskYLei6nyEs6eCa-JOMlak7mCL6HWQuKiUkGXYxE_kBX7hIdD6MKFRgGepN5o1a_d3V8K4C41l8bEwZIQv5208eV22M2rE4jS7lSNmGI9tooRZuFf9mNgFbSy0vyDBSQFzP-kfFDad7GrCSZX50PEo74GIsNGIpRxC8Vk_YM_MPf6uQYrkEwsGYJN8yQzQUExD6DkjLSFBlWM8OEpytpB_O8DviVi5D_t5zrt39rE28ZjVDrlfOQ3y_Dslj6DjYPo_fgcm3tcPtV41gTcluqZUiW2Dla-HNlVzGcsD7m_JfiQwJgqydf-_mpWo08eIo7DhGY7LrQTvBz5jbc3N9NYko-3AtcPaTRr8fDaC6-zCbt1f9YxviCa4T2M8ZGLJyS95_x5gDdDg%3D%3D)

Folks,

I’ve reached out to you a couple of times about hitting my April fundraising goal.

Y’all know me and that I never stop working for you and this country. But I have to admit that despite my best efforts... we missed it.

I have one more chance to hit my target by midnight, and I’m counting on you to step up and chip in—[**even if it’s just $1.**](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7676dfd0c72046799e2779e0ee1cbb14&_e=oI5cqU7DNbJRskYLei6nyEs6eCa-JOMlak7mCL6HWQuKiUkGXYxE_kBX7hIdD6MKFRgGepN5o1a_d3V8K4C41l8bEwZIQv5208eV22M2rE4jS7lSNmGI9tooRZuFf9mNgFbSy0vyDBSQFzP-kfFDad7GrCSZX50PEo74GIsNGIpRxC8Vk_YM_MPf6uQYrkEwwyzfco-jF_jceKPOA5RMGB7UjXAAdrFkO5OI080Ktv_s1MyHzSbgj5qZyVE1XuNQpp2m-GA-imMAnb3sMZqNozSGi8i5i4MKnorub-h1FdQYHE6xzLrLKIaPpUsicn43asecaAVg-0NO_H6jHbNXjGclOnsSffY8g-1_bI_pesTv4pWwZLuTZNiadv911SwGNS7CX5i14KbTcNtWmdKPig%3D%3D)

I’m down to my last straw here and scrambling to fix this situation. My team reviewed all the support from the past few days, and I still need just a few more donors from your area.

I know you’re always there for me when the going gets tough. So, when my team asked who we should reach out to make up ground, you were top of mind.

I am counting on you. All I need is just a pinch more support from your area. [**_Chip in $1, $3, or maybe $5 if you can here._**](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7676dfd0c72046799e2779e0ee1cbb14&_e=oI5cqU7DNbJRskYLei6nyEs6eCa-JOMlak7mCL6HWQuKiUkGXYxE_kBX7hIdD6MKFRgGepN5o1a_d3V8K4C41l8bEwZIQv5208eV22M2rE4jS7lSNmGI9tooRZuFf9mNgFbSy0vyDBSQFzP-kfFDad7GrCSZX50PEo74GIsNGIpRxC8Vk_YM_MPf6uQYrkEwwyzfco-jF_jceKPOA5RMGB7UjXAAdrFkO5OI080Ktv_s1MyHzSbgj5qZyVE1XuNQULxn4QV6eyK2Ul052kkreCKxJSYtLKHVzA0OlnJ_BIxyYT5dgxNarlzsaTzmSyuJXDEoAb1lReaE-XVdc1pHdntMRxpjl5JVS6F4t7hiIJ5M-AYpEo-YcnzjtX1xI3P-mGhh3jbDMOvya-P1phqhpA%3D%3D)

Thanks,
JNK _Folks,

I’m as nervous as a pregnant Jenny. **_April’s halfway over, and I’ve yet to meet any of my fundraising goals..._**

It’s been a difficult road for Republicans on their fundraising recently. Biden’s been riding a gravy train with biscuit wheels, getting million-dollar donations left and right.

**_I’m more of a traditional kind of guy._**

So, let me cut to the chase: _I’m behind, and I have less than 24 hours to submit my numbers and get ahead._ How much am I short by?

| [**$749.82**](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7676dfd0c72046799e2779e0ee1cbb14&_e=oI5cqU7DNbJRskYLei6nyEs6eCa-JOMlak7mCL6HWQuKiUkGXYxE_kBX7hIdD6MKFRgGepN5o1a_d3V8K4C41l8bEwZIQv5208eV22M2rE4jS7lSNmGI9tooRZuFf9mNgFbSy0vyDBSQFzP-kfFDad7GrCSZX50PEo74GIsNGIpRxC8Vk_YM_MPf6uQYrkEwsGYJN8yQzQUExD6DkjLSFJ0fedugY_e_0NQZeRWSbU8EFNqN52Ft0iUlgQAExpPC41lmOWedyoS4SkD68ef3rOgYP6EHDUTb8wIkJbCf5CUhUDc7cg23f3_PM8w-54XaFGqtkf7X7QOgybSjMWtrK8Gl3RhwnuxEf-5gSbnBhVJs7kQKvdS0cPzVxzAgQHesbv-FAoYiUWeYaCGx4lbaEA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Final Time Reaching Out - I’m going to need a hand | Folks, I’ve reached out to you a couple of times about hitting my April fundraising goal. Y’all know me and that I never stop working for you and this country. But I have to admit that despite my best efforts... we missed it. I have one more chance to hit my target by midnight, and I’m counting on you to step up and chip in— I’m down to my last straw here and scrambling to fix this situation. My team reviewed all the support from the past few days, and I still need just a few more donors from your area. I know you’re always there for me when the going gets tough. So, when my team asked who we should reach out to make up ground, you were top of mind. I am counting on you. All I need is just a pinch more support from your area. Thanks, JNK Folks, I’m as nervous as a pregnant Jenny. April’s halfway over, and I’ve yet to meet any of my fundraising goals... It’s been a difficult road for Republicans on their fundraising recently. Biden’s been riding a gravy train with biscuit wheels, getting million-dollar donations left and right. I’m more of a traditional kind of guy. So, let me cut to the chase: I’m behind, and I have less than 24 hours to submit my numbers and get ahead. How much am I short by? | Hey. I know this is no big deal for big Dem donors, but for an average American like myself, this makes all the difference. My team and I will be forever grateful to you personally when we sit down and go over our donor list tomorrow. Thanks for stepping up. It’s people like you I rely on. \- Senator Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Your voice is needed
body:
The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=771fe588062b414ea7aa1cfb318ba6ba&_t=n3fBpSpn2kZbHGtqP7C4-3JaOglfGJlmtkk5M-8TSwr6by3RGS53XMA5cO6huRcTFbeTyYrUEzEiA7CXTlUvLLsup0kiCaqg3vBq7_xK38M%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=771fe588062b414ea7aa1cfb318ba6ba&_e=0a3NrVgdhE_6wBCuTp5uh4Ts8r0CEs6DTTmeTk8OJlnZUuauFKLtSXI-4FeJUIyQ3mL0S65xutARd1GCOMJp2LqFQHdFixcDB8J0UVKCu0pwz75tgQKCHpN2kCX5qmkOO5LCTIAkYHwv-IEXh-vWOqT-tLqUjYspC6uveYMTFurKoUwTHavyQGR6MYoMpgtDIrDwwHGgTn8VfN50_N9qwIB3gxDhds9XgL1OCA6GPjwhpgvR6no_d8L73g946S19nWvfJPireXBgkrnEd7P72u3mD6GEoDH5PlYGnw7rU6SO8yxJLNMiBE7TPtUyCabobI_8JGCnqsXWB3DGym5UCIg_26DB8VcOokJTxEP1rengoIVijWrR5eCZCBzYXnNR)
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=771fe588062b414ea7aa1cfb318ba6ba&_e=0a3NrVgdhE_6wBCuTp5uh4Ts8r0CEs6DTTmeTk8OJlnZUuauFKLtSXI-4FeJUIyQ3mL0S65xutARd1GCOMJp2LqFQHdFixcDB8J0UVKCu0pwz75tgQKCHpN2kCX5qmkOO5LCTIAkYHwv-IEXh-vWOqT-tLqUjYspC6uveYMTFurKoUwTHavyQGR6MYoMpgtDIrDwwHGgTn8VfN50_N9qwIB3gxDhds9XgL1OCA6GPjwdkp4FkAFSJFK_WrGjxzX5HTsNauwnpG69Dc5UxrumBN_B2CjIGKgxkFyxTPlhgqVLf6jyL2eBQmE4q_LoVjDzrFFMJemc4Q5vn00euMAipnftjD0SXC7Rf-90pe69W-MRdDB2TYTWOPnmtY6EhlUr)

Dear Friend,

Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

The survey has only eight questions, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America.

**The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.**

Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents...

...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties.

At the same time, with the help of the media it...

* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
* Hides the corruption of the ruling class
* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption.

Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=771fe588062b414ea7aa1cfb318ba6ba&_e=0a3NrVgdhE_6wBCuTp5uh4Ts8r0CEs6DTTmeTk8OJlnZUuauFKLtSXI-4FeJUIyQ3mL0S65xutARd1GCOMJp2LqFQHdFixcDB8J0UVKCu0pwz75tgQKCHpN2kCX5qmkOO5LCTIAkYHwv-IEXh-vWOqT-tLqUjYspC6uveYMTFurKoUwTHavyQGR6MYoMpgtDIrDwwHGgTn8VfN50_N9qwIB3gxDhds9XgL1OCA6GPjxA0WKq3GvWPOoR6dpBFB7C_BZwjG_UV9p9izscmI4LDXWwlqW5QmeIuFnOvMcZFXaMvsiN-SvuqZZEqICqHI1gG9pDQq0BP5FJPGh_L35F2yUGGJnhSUZGb4-gTdCCUbLgWZFrgFu_aHWm5WmsUU1S)**

The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.**

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack.

**You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.**

A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.**

These efforts include:

* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It only has eight questions and will take a few minutes of your time.

Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=771fe588062b414ea7aa1cfb318ba6ba&_e=0a3NrVgdhE_6wBCuTp5uh4Ts8r0CEs6DTTmeTk8OJlnZUuauFKLtSXI-4FeJUIyQ3mL0S65xutARd1GCOMJp2LqFQHdFixcDB8J0UVKCu0pwz75tgQKCHpN2kCX5qmkOO5LCTIAkYHwv-IEXh-vWOqT-tLqUjYspC6uveYMTFurKoUwTHavyQGR6MYoMpgtDIrDwwHGgTn8VfN50_N9qwIB3gxDhds9XgL1OCA6GPjywexaEL7a7xdnO-AnWmBGI_U8T7TBMXRqouT2PRLZ1IzQeQp9oNuSr5rIjeJQ5XHL4FpQD4inCAvvzwkI-9Y8-rXB3v_JDyGsGlANbgn54Bo7r7CgDg9z94Plw2vNBx6NnKmNWaVHzqxJFPtR7VQhz)**

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign on to support my Public Housing for the 21st Century Act:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Families across the country are facing homelessness. We need urgent action. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWzUOzUNdQEA5K3octjBN0YtEHFaTjraxC06GHBk1t1-QvIt7HAOhesW_8knrrcjBkPxRdZbkK435kHwjXhUWcrTAtXUf7fZNmcv79229YEffQjduqoyLbCenRjAYEwTEsEx56_3WvU869hOkGNzRMsb2VhRqmZnKJXFjod8fQpp9_dSNyj8CsGMr6H3L8HybPPqST4JMkFp1PFeiPk3_sXBoJbS5cDF_LtdIXUSLfyoE/45w/nuYTxNIqS0W7PMDqqyATpQ/h0/h001.vbIZB8tufbqfKeQ7CSVp4EbzcyyhPeKF1Qd9qoLxqM8)
---
Friend, April is National Fair Housing Month, and we’re in an urgent housing crisis. With 78% of Americans living paycheck to paycheck and rent continuing to skyrocket, families across the country are facing homelessness. The average renter now pays over 30% of their income on rent. Public housing is a crucial lifeline, particularly for our most vulnerable neighbors. However, our government’s investments in public housing have long been insufficient. **To increase affordable housing within the constraints of inadequate federal subsidies, I introduced the**** _Public Housing for the 21st Century Act_** _,_ which will ensure that public housing developers have access to the latest best practices, using local policy tools and financing. [**Please add your name to support my**** _Public Housing for the 21st Century Act_****, which will increase urgently-needed affordable housing production.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ep7jHmomPt2vI628wPSEnCKCgy0fV2U-beFnPC48MxqvdIurZz9TWswuRUFR_N9gF7cTRTqpNmIzm25vjyTnQyQK4KHP6L_Qe-uJX3BP2_yvg8JZpYycISAwyYV4E_7ctMEA6jLgJDvepB5Ir3khPaZh9iHhswKdObPnEW2tcI_wHReB4getJ4otI5khn-63ALsEAV1zpJG0X5suWVG9UEyiM-dysp5mrJewU1Ke6kSUfE3edtUEnMk-kNEXJm8tMqnuqNAKf8rP_oudqVdjphKnQHjdZwvsfkKQEFOGKJe4N-_aCW6XKElKYqAlUSF3JKeQJzX881Nr20kXfcXLYYrK1yAOrUuQaiVwE_7bZC8UIcQAaHj-FTHPxsd-SE42/45w/nuYTxNIqS0W7PMDqqyATpQ/h1/h001.CD406evBgPRiWjwv34ZCst2yaZE27nHhaDG1Tbb6mvs) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ep7jHmomPt2vI628wPSEnCKCgy0fV2U-beFnPC48MxqvdIurZz9TWswuRUFR_N9g6Bdk3L2KvCfMtlLfeF4tKRjyEFVHvLxM2heiabLSKeUuGDFw9aFwy8ZvZLouhelNrfFO-P6l-9vvuGc0KdoK1JwTOhYhXkGq2ekpWuAHUMLGxJvOnIBVwa4RP0SIkvNQk0GdxHP1XRyRDCCsi7LQGrtBcedjEn1jll5FIZTOxsWo2aF9I5zwUTAKs7Szex2s6oveXZ39OF6X09tSKw3ih6I3J63Sv1Zn1PJMxK4flnqnztG4m-RyQnuEKP9gs6PbxZXDEhl3iohAHyrZkDyIZaem1XPNxkWls0COx4vSoAZ7toGdWJmSTUT0b7hLSGFu/45w/nuYTxNIqS0W7PMDqqyATpQ/h2/h001.Qg0LqC4KBkQz426h3YP-AgbbsCzWSuisK0bMDuND3js)
---
When I brought Congresspeople to my district for a hearing and tour on housing justice, local experts affirmed that investing in affordable housing is a key part of addressing our nation’s housing affordability crisis.
**Housing is a human right, and it’s clear that the private market has failed to provide housing that is safe, accessible, and affordable for all.**
We need more quality public housing. In the face of insufficient federal subsidies for affordable rental units, innovative state and local public developers are building affordable units by leveraging local policy tools, adopting innovative financing mechanisms, and using market rate units to cross-subsidize below-market affordable units.
As the push for new, locally-driven public housing development is growing nationwide, all locales should have easy access to the latest models and policy options.
[**Can you sign on to support my**** _Public Housing for the 21st Century Act_****today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ep7jHmomPt2vI628wPSEnCKCgy0fV2U-beFnPC48MxqvdIurZz9TWswuRUFR_N9g5lsl7SLeFmbw9bRVW2r8ndMiYQzfHERYmZkNzWt3DVmAH5yQtt672Iv2UZtGpxNvy6VOY93F5aPkWkdusKcALoYRME7qnu4wQfNGvRGOJpZc-2EJkwuXfnMHWIjJ1rzXPVUXxGcE4eHb0pv1XYYfk3GExloHcKJGUJRlXTJh3K0iABSkt3yOUWrS5DnNxx6XE4-6HXeaue-vLgEkZ3q1ol5IqxmF-zl43-JxAEQblIYGcx6j5nJXvBb-MLl9TJxMLPgD6qDN55k3V2BZThy5IpwHn_kEhdz9HVJoUQQJuoL2wHv8lW5GvDhwXirE3J5C/45w/nuYTxNIqS0W7PMDqqyATpQ/h3/h001.ZStTjyI8IO9r-ZlKQX6JaDWZcSbphJBnrHk96GaJ8X4)

Thank you for pushing to secure the human right to housing.
While homeownership is a vital part of economic stability, it’s out of reach for so many, particularly for people who’ve experienced institutionalized discrimination.
Nationally, the Black-white homeownership gap is wider than it was before the civil rights movement, before the _Fair Housing Act_ made redlining illegal. After the 2008 financial crisis which targeted Black homeowners with predatory loans, my state of Michigan experienced the largest drop in Black homeownership compared to any other state.
To push back, I passed legislation to secure financing assistance to low-income households and to expand homeownership opportunities by pushing for more support for small-dollar mortgages. I’m also pushing to expand banking opportunities and access to credit.
With you and other advocates by my side, I will continue to push to end systemic racism and to guarantee human rights for all.
In solidarity,
Rashida
