clean_body: Families across the country are facing homelessness. We need urgent action. | | | Friend, April is National Fair Housing Month, and we’re in an urgent housing crisis. With 78% of Americans living paycheck to paycheck and rent continuing to skyrocket, families across the country are facing homelessness. The average renter now pays over 30% of their income on rent. Public housing is a crucial lifeline, particularly for our most vulnerable neighbors. However, our government’s investments in public housing have long been insufficient. To increase affordable housing within the constraints of inadequate federal subsidies, I introduced the Public Housing for the 21st Century Act , which will ensure that public housing developers have access to the latest best practices, using local policy tools and financing. | When I brought Congresspeople to my district for a hearing and tour on housing justice, local experts affirmed that investing in affordable housing is a key part of addressing our nation’s housing affordability crisis. Housing is a human right, and it’s clear that the private market has failed to provide housing that is safe, accessible, and affordable for all. We need more quality public housing. In the face of insufficient federal subsidies for affordable rental units, innovative state and local public developers are building affordable units by leveraging local policy tools, adopting innovative financing mechanisms, and using market rate units to cross-subsidize below-market affordable units. As the push for new, locally-driven public housing development is growing nationwide, all locales should have easy access to the latest models and policy options. Thank you for pushing to secure the human right to housing. While homeownership is a vital part of economic stability, it’s out of reach for so many, particularly for people who’ve experienced institutionalized discrimination. Nationally, the Black-white homeownership gap is wider than it was before the civil rights movement, before the Fair Housing Act made redlining illegal. After the 2008 financial crisis which targeted Black homeowners with predatory loans, my state of Michigan experienced the largest drop in Black homeownership compared to any other state. To push back, I passed legislation to secure financing assistance to low-income households and to expand homeownership opportunities by pushing for more support for small-dollar mortgages. I’m also pushing to expand banking opportunities and access to credit. With you and other advocates by my side, I will continue to push to end systemic racism and to guarantee human rights for all. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . clean_body: | | | ** Across California’s 23rd District, our volunteer team is collecting thousands of commit to vote cards. ’s simple: voters sign a pledge to vote, then we mail it back to them right before the November election. Commit to vote cards have been proven to boost voter turnout in peer-reviewed studies - it’s powerful to get a commit to vote card back in your own handwriting! But to mail these cards back, we need your help to cover postage ... especially as our volunteer program grows and the number of commit to vote cards we collect surges. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83886640/469837367/-1995327540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTZhY2Q3Ny03OTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJhib-vN0-FzH-fn6DfQ1mHXgW3foEKqU_Dw_C3ZrLg=&emci=9dbcfce5-6f03-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=596acd77-7905-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=6787172)
---
Hi Friends,
It’s Cristina, President and Executive Director here at NextGen. I’m reaching out to you today because, frankly, I need your help.
In a minute, I’m going to ask you to [chip in $5 to help NextGen PAC reach its critical end-of-month fundraising goal](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83886641/469837368/-1274848752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTZhY2Q3Ny03OTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJhib-vN0-FzH-fn6DfQ1mHXgW3foEKqU_Dw_C3ZrLg=&emci=9dbcfce5-6f03-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=596acd77-7905-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=6787172) and let you know just how important your grassroots support is to young voters in this election.
But first, I’m going to tell you what I’ve been seeing on the ground: **Young voters ready for change.**
It doesn’t matter where I go or what I’m doing — if I’m around young people, I hear again and again all the ways we need to move this country forward, not hold it back.
I hear about the importance of protecting abortion access; people talk my ears off about the climate crisis. And while I’m listening, one question keeps coming back to me: _What can I do to make a difference?_
I’m reaching out to you today because I need your help. NextGen is fighting to make sure young voters have a seat at the table when decisions about this country are made. We’re working every day to provide young Americans everywhere with the tools and information they need to make a difference.
**_But we can’t do that without your support._**
[Can I count on you to chip in $5 today so we can keep mobilizing young voters?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83886642/469837396/-1274848752?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTZhY2Q3Ny03OTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJhib-vN0-FzH-fn6DfQ1mHXgW3foEKqU_Dw_C3ZrLg=&emci=9dbcfce5-6f03-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=596acd77-7905-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: | Hi Friends, It’s Cristina, President and Executive Director here at NextGen. I’m reaching out to you today because, frankly, I need your help. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to and let you know just how important your grassroots support is to young voters in this election. But first, I’m going to tell you what I’ve been seeing on the ground: Young voters ready for change. It doesn’t matter where I go or what I’m doing — if I’m around young people, I hear again and again all the ways we need to move this country forward, not hold it back. I hear about the importance of protecting abortion access; people talk my ears off about the climate crisis. And while I’m listening, one question keeps coming back to me: What can I do to make a difference? I’m reaching out to you today because I need your help. NextGen is fighting to make sure young voters have a seat at the table when decisions about this country are made. We’re working every day to provide young Americans everywhere with the tools and information they need to make a difference. But we can’t do that without your support. | | With gratitude, Tzintzún Ramirez President & Executive Director NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

Hey friend, You may have wondered, what do we mean by #ItsMulletTime? It’s more than just a catchy phrase or hashtag! What we mean is that it’s time for a change because the voters deserve better. Voters deserve a choice that aligns with their priorities, not the extremes of either party. Mark is running for governor to cut housing costs, make neighborhoods safer, keep illegal drugs illegal, and provide a new direction that doesn't involve taxing our way out of every problem. **It’s obvious that the voters want change and the “establishment candidates” aren’t cutting it — #ItsMulletTime!** Our campaign is coming up against our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline in two days and we’re behind on our goal. body:
So we have a message from Kamala Harris for you
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21328%2E4449941%2E4rcK17)
---
**Look, we told you that Elizabeth Warren called for an end to the Electoral College in favor of the popular vote...**

But hardly anyone donated and we’re still $3,031 short of our payment for our ads to abolish the Electoral College with 1 day left... **_NO!!!_**

So today, we’re passing along a VITAL warning from VP Kamala Harris AND _activating our emergency 2X-MATCH_: [ ]() | [_2X-MATCH ACTIVE_ : CHIP IN $7 (_2X-MATCHED_) TO FUND OUR ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE ADS AND SUPPORT OUR WORK »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42584?t=7&akid=21328%2E4449941%2E4rcK17)
---
Listen, the situation in 2024 couldn’t be more dire.

Political experts predict that Trump could win the presidency in 2024 because of the Electoral College...just like in 2016. _NO!!!_

It’s crucial that we raise the final $3,031 to fully fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work before midnight tomorrow!
[**We can’t afford to pull down our ads. Please, 2X-MATCH $7 now and help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42584?t=8&akid=21328%2E4449941%2E4rcK17)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: “MAGA Queen” 😓
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
It’s embarrassing. It’s sad. But most of all, it’s dangerous.
| | |
---
Kyrsten Sinema is not running for re-election.
Kari Lake is the presumptive nominee of the Republican Party in Arizona’s U.S. Senate race.
Someone who cozies up to the furthest of the far-right: Steve Bannon, Mike Lindell, Mike Flynn, Roger Stone — and of course, Trump himself.
Someone who supports the near total abortion ban in Arizona and who continues to level baseless and unfounded conspiracies at honorable election workers.
She is a threat to our democracy, and there is nothing she won’t say or do to get elected.
It’s embarrassing. It’s sad. But most of all, it’s dangerous.
Ruben Gallego is the only thing standing in the way of the “MAGA Queen” becoming a United States Senator. And today, he desperately needs your help.
[**Can you split a donation between Ruben Gallego’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell's in Florida today to help us put an end to Kari Lake’s march to power? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83887482/469839917/1778238238?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1152-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDNmMDM3NzItN2EwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wDNLd6DTr_Ipae8YRihovTOwZxyXUGyfqnN8o2isVeU=)

clean_body: It’s embarrassing. It’s sad. But most of all, it’s dangerous. | | | Kyrsten Sinema is not running for re-election. Kari Lake is the presumptive nominee of the Republican Party in Arizona’s U.S. Senate race. Someone who cozies up to the furthest of the far-right: Steve Bannon, Mike Lindell, Mike Flynn, Roger Stone — and of course, Trump himself. Someone who supports the near total abortion ban in Arizona and who continues to level baseless and unfounded conspiracies at honorable election workers. She is a threat to our democracy, and there is nothing she won’t say or do to get elected. It’s embarrassing. It’s sad. But most of all, it’s dangerous. Ruben Gallego is the only thing standing in the way of the “MAGA Queen” becoming a United States Senator. And today, he desperately needs your help. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ruben Gallego and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Gallego | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. name: Team Evers
subject: Tony’s note about extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you
see Tony's important note? Wisconsin is tied, and with democracy and
abortion rights on the ballot, we need to make critical investments in
expanding our campaign.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2249?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20240426_FR_EOM_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_EOM1.1&t=1001&akid=6698%2E1827488%2E5p7Vlv ]Can we count on you to pitch in to help close our budget gap before
Sunday’s deadline?

Onward,

Team Evers

— Read Tony's Message Below —

Derek,

Extreme Republicans will stop at nothing
to abuse their power for the sake of petty, partisan politics. In
Wisconsin last month, they fired 8 more highly qualified public servants
who I appointed to serve on the boards, commissions and councils of the
state government with flimsy reasoning to back their actions.

Meanwhile, Donald Trump and the billionaire donors behind his campaign
have plans to mass fire nonpartisan experts across the federal government
and replace them with MAGA loyalists who will do his bidding.

It’s clear they have one goal, to attack and undermine our democracy. If
Trump is elected, we could see a national abortion ban, the "termination"
of the Constitution (his words), and much more. We can’t let this happen.

In November, democracy is on the ballot, and with Wisconsin tied in the
polls, I need your help.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2249?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20240426_FR_EOM_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_EOM1.1&t=1002&akid=6698%2E1827488%2E5p7Vlv ]Can I count on you to rush a donation to help close our $15,319 budget
gap before Sunday’s end-of-week deadline?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

name: Colin Allred
subject: I hate doing laundry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=laundry)
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Look, my wife Aly and I share the work of running our household and raising our boys evenly, but to be perfectly honest with you, my smile is forced in this picture – **I hate doing laundry.**
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=laundry)
---
| But here's one laundry list even I can get behind: the list of reasons we need to fire Ted Cruz:
* **Ted Cruz viciously attacks our fundamental rights and reproductive freedoms** – even though six in 10 Texans support abortion access.
* **Texans deserve a leader who will fight for them** – rather than podcasting three times a week or running off to vacation when he's needed most.
* **Ted Cruz has parroted dangerous, far-right conspiracy theories** that endanger the safety and accessibility of our democracy for working Texans.

Listen, Ted Cruz has a lot of dirty laundry – and I could keep going on for pages and pages. **But the bottom line is this: Texans can't afford six more years of an extremist like Ted Cruz. Not when he's proven that his loyalties lie only with the special interests and the mega donors that keep him in power.** Right now, polls show that Ted Cruz and I are neck and neck. We can send him and his dirty laundry packing for good, but it's going to take a huge outpouring of grassroots support to reach the millions of voters we need to win. [**Can you split a donation of $5 or $10 right now between my campaign and No Dem Left Behind to power my campaign to defeat Ted Cruz? His mega donors are pouring millions of dollars into his race, and I'm depending on grassroots supporters like you to help me keep up →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=laundry)
---
| If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | | | [ Chip in $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=laundry&amount=5&express_lane=true)
---
| | | [ Chip in $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=laundry&amount=10&express_lane=true)

---

---
| | | | [ _RUSH $100_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=laundry&amount=100&express_lane=true)
---
| | | [ Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tx_allred_split?refcode=laundry)
---
| | | | Thank you for being a part of this team, my friend. Let's do this.
---
|
---
| Colin
---

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9biRkT0ZFLBZo_8f8EnE7Jowo6A0R8oop8Rrw_kitS3sMwrJn2ozruxmkvaG936_l1duoWABImS72zia5WVvFdRPdIVacSYWx7D5-1AwwudBoQtdWylZJWkXcWtCxYi8l6uivpvNKt6o4cZToIsN4Nph0DGttae-yTXfxbCb7pztOH6NKY4B_GBntWw-WidEC0C1Vigl1RkPdHoVvBDHCLmI2Btluszw3HrATlJsPsesX6x2iZH42PaCo6_lyemjjJ2Oprq0B9_MAzcvLo0LAeN5_3gmqjDqOQg_3meAFxBJIJ3190wvjXdKJR8KAdxfe6iRh2M4VKJV3oAIupwCtapi1SSu82vtHGygFycRVsARqwS_qXmpvrigm6j-IkRbuu_vJJIYqux5fDP4vs51IOssnAkB8GLZeTHc6N5ED8seV2uxysKmnJEAFpvFS21xb8x18ytO-V-uDaIsDXDexRA/45w/A01Bf09DQsmvx3mcde51lw/h0/h001.IcFLfM95Kyl4IvhsFMGpr4FkYHCGLJGTxwNoVqwrDdU)

Peter, we’re on a mission to ensure that racist extremists like Trump and his MAGA allies do not gain complete control of the White House and Congress.

That’s why we’re launching our groundbreaking 11 for the Win campaign focusing on eleven exceptional Black candidates across the country who are committed to fighting for our rights and our future.

Our incredible slate of candidates includes trailblazers such as:

• **Hakeem Jeffries,** the first Black party leader in Congress;
• **Angela Alsobrooks** and **Lisa Blunt Rochester,** both vying to become the first Black female senators in their states;
• and **Mondaire Jones** and **Janelle Bynum,** both poised to FLIP their districts from Red to Blue.

We’re also backing critical House seats that are in danger of flipping blue to red to ensure that our voices continue to have a say — _but we cannot achieve these historic victories alone._

[Will you join us in the fight against racist extremists and elect Black leaders who will fight for our communities? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvfdh0fv4-ZWp0d2-eweRJuHinpPCbMYNgcq2LzlaaiyviecnVHCNwACWWRoRkWrgCvJJWbKfZPvmdEfTLh6JKot30_EXvWWkjKAcc_4YRQXB6fz9P_UskaCmWxbQC1wGzubUIBlaG9aVRrtOYl3GXQNeSHODsmnMTYUHIpH0eglZkyJ-wNDNP-xDuMRgJNkSSUwDALxGsCYumTv9CYsQc6qpknvkFBM-ZAuCdgYpCeH-SPBJzUUJtvsSSwY3PiHvduD693hHWu0VrO7HTbl9OlSmgnEcem1uuk4nGXliPsHt9egbksi7Wqko0TvldE_D5aJhOwEL6czcVdcoObLtIqUPiZtWsa_vLhh74W7YHDEcczltiJQgtgn2_ZcGOmuXUmW6WCF2afRHRqR-V3FL4_HJHIcZJ6iCkMqC0_84V409aoyvRZaGf4XMnDjvgShmY/45w/A01Bf09DQsmvx3mcde51lw/h2/h001.zHIRZGuNtO3pXBz3PB3q_8vsKYvvPY_KGzaTdOVbw0I) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately to The Collective PAC.

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9PnuvrCzoBy5DfIGWsplANbnjpBAv4hJoqiZg5D3GXPoBteW9TLCzhiOODNkSDuTz_EQdQlURP26rOcdubtYGyWEOVn8kOkv_vE5dUQ2_RxZPCRaiFfxmHfgl51zomuLKBn-1Xje3xf9k5qK3cwVkISpz30SOwgaxfdJS523tWvqo_XuehNjNL81Tl6WRy28ACiDyS-qC0G3T4wtM8kPgkY_TdWZKLjmq3yaJ6bFdJflpHXGeFnaFd1_kNhVBEzDWDTRHgKZ2WgS88E4qi2hAAXPYFelXrdCnN7MjVn5FuaYYKg45a3MEsCGx5SPezMbDj0p__mm2OgWMnRglWjfOj8ybgQWci1_c8gFwXA2Rio1vaejpGfnsjOPjLC6QgOwWeDck8XWT3fvn6y7194TivQ/45w/A01Bf09DQsmvx3mcde51lw/h9/h001.mojI5gLEe9Uubw2jEVEcsNdS5J2cLhllC51cqYMtg4I) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. Our incredible slate of candidates includes trailblazers such as: • Hakeem Jeffries, the first Black party leader in Congress; • Angela Alsobrooks and Lisa Blunt Rochester, both vying to become the first Black female senators in their states; • and Mondaire Jones and Janelle Bynum, both poised to FLIP their districts from Red to Blue. We’re also backing critical House seats that are in danger of flipping blue to red to ensure that our voices continue to have a say — but we cannot achieve these historic victories alone. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately to The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Here’s a full list of our 11 for the Win candidates your donation will be split between with The Collective PAC: Red to Blue Mondaire Jones (NY-17) Janelle Bynum (OR-5) Frontline Steven Horsford (NV-04) Jahana Hayes (CT-05) Don Davis (NC-01) Emilia Sykes (OH-13) Senate Angela Alsobrooks (US SEN - MD) Lisa Blunt Rochester (US SEN - DE) Colin Allred (US SEN - TX) Hill Harper (US SEN - MI) Speaker Hakeem Jeffries (NY-08) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. name: Dan Bishop
subject: Let’s just let Michael Jordan play in the WNBA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bishop for NC
body:
Boys do not belong in girls' sports

| [ ](https://links.greatamericatoday.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bddd7403bb154a9abb1ed20076c9a122&_e=stloKwJ51-qE4-ffsHW_RkgmY8vFW9_9ZjX5j7JvLWyqtyPZRG2en3iiXVFq0btYWhCjJTX5am7_SZoWxTC0aoc0VoUkHoX0z6h10L2FxwBnEmTcSnyo8B5nabxi_PNUD2nXqWkXlFeYt1RrCneDS6jheNZeKAhoAqcqdKI0Sehb9ayE8G5u6IMnM84ZEnUVrojKHdmW8JnvZlakVOIPd4AngO_0MRNyAnYsz8CGSxx6P-2HQCaUdQX8HSbdgLezdm8NscOMz0rCulWS9zRhww2W8NbQIJ6mHbYBooH41vXvf1hf8nvpBiGQk8F-YPjN)
---
Fellow American,

**ICYMI: A circuit court just overturned a state law barring boys from playing in girls' sports leagues.**

Could you imagine a prime Michael Jordan at UNC joining the women's March Madness Tournament and dunking on Caitlin Clark? I have to imagine that MJ would've broken every single scoring record in the girls' tournament only if he had identified as female. **The Woke Radical Leftist Thugs would've bought first-row tickets to that game.**

As ridiculous as that sounds, this is what happens when you allow liberal propaganda to influence the rule of law. And this is precisely why I'm running for Attorney General. Under my watchful eye, boys will play in boys' leagues, and girls will play in girls' leagues. Just how the good Lord intended it.

body:
Here are THREE things Frank Mrvan has accomplished for Northwest Indiana.

|
---
Peter, while Election Day may seem far away, neglecting strategic, early investments could jeopardize our chances in this race, and ultimately, our shot at a Democratic House majority. **That’s why we’re asking you today to split a donation between Frank Mrvan and IN Dems.** **[Frank has always stood up for Northwest Indiana values, and with your financial support, he can continue the fight in our nation’s capital. Can we count on you to split a contribution now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83889926/469845685/-969499340?refcode=240427standsup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNhMzlhMS03ZDA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-aaWxP_hAiTDnYOOwol457dUSe8LwAuhOoDYvr4UB3k=)** | | | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83889933/469845686/-969499340?refcode=240427standsup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGNhMzlhMS03ZDA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-aaWxP_hAiTDnYOOwol457dUSe8LwAuhOoDYvr4UB3k=)
---

Here are THREE things Frank Mrvan has accomplished for Northwest Indiana:
1️⃣**Bringing TAX DOLLARS BACK to Northwest Indiana.** Frank understands that every dollar counts and has delivered impactful and positive investments to grow our economy and improve our quality of place.
2️⃣**Connecting individuals with JOB OPPORTUNITIES.** While in office, Frank brought jobs back to Indiana’s veterans and working families with legislation like the CHIPS Act and the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act.

**AN OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN UPDATE FROM THE DESK OF KARI LAKE**
Fellow American,

As one of my top supporters, I wanted to give you an update about recent developments in our Arizona Senate campaign.

**First:** Independent Senator Kyrsten Sinema dropped out, leaving the race a one-on-one contest between myself and radical leftist Ruben Gallego.

**Then:** Left-wing donors and activist groups donated **over $1 million** to Gallego’s campaign in just 24 hours.

**Now:** I’m launching a fundraising blitz to fight back and make sure we have the resources we need to win this race, flip the Senate, and save America.

| [**CHIP IN NOW TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ef8ee5be199c4a3da2c949f3b02ff087&_e=KVD1L2LvuY8PyjODlOedwiXl7S1R1vgOwMgBs5_BUyFyDINVUeJhwIOMHjknIPFSE35Ip5zKbnZU0A7xQ6Wu9CQflPJGEcxwVwvSGN4Ctby7XsBnvVXPlgohwh10HLELs6Um4xRyyb1eMmAduBDsbFpqOv-a5I7Rsk0ZkbzghzR9JOkuqlpHMhAOS3I9CkiFBgZEZOayaP2SOtRHhDamu0HT4Wz5PEUczog5CqffIewuOKzwR3owhfAhDrXYPRft6-A8apxBYk1HZG1ozGlPltTPNNORsiMPabop4L6APCxZcaI-XUBm0QQuge0rsTJL6vH3yBEbBjoG2EDzDbhb9wqYX_QnrlQfmSbv8w71LK5rNtKsyN-rUhjT0u93zin_uJjIelPgzpNrtLDTq8MTcg%3D%3D)
---

The road to the Senate majority goes through Arizona. There’s simply no way for Republicans to flip the Senate unless we win here. That means if we fall short, we can say goodbye to a secure border, a strong economy, and safe streets.

The good news is polling shows we have the lead. The bad news is with my opponent’s massive windfall of cash, and the fake news doing his bidding, our momentum could stall if we don’t act fast.

I don’t have millionaire liberals from New York and California bankrolling my campaign. I’m relying on grassroots conservative patriots who are sick and tired of what Joe Biden and his cronies have done to our great country. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $20, we’d easily match Gallego’s fundraising haul. **I know the stakes. I know that failure is not an option.** That’s why I’m putting everything on the line to win. I just need you to join me. **[Can I count on you?](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ef8ee5be199c4a3da2c949f3b02ff087&_e=KVD1L2LvuY8PyjODlOedwiXl7S1R1vgOwMgBs5_BUyFyDINVUeJhwIOMHjknIPFSE35Ip5zKbnZU0A7xQ6Wu9CQflPJGEcxwVwvSGN4Ctby7XsBnvVXPlgohwh10HLELs6Um4xRyyb1eMmAduBDsbFpqOv-a5I7Rsk0ZkbzghzR9JOkuqlpHMhAOS3I9CkiFBgZEZOayaP2SOtRHhDamux58B-CHGSC7MP2leR6bibfLRgf44JNPQzq8LLwcXAfFn-mqqBtXeuiPZTmv7wmyyiCZ1NRvrQdlhcwfkyu6FuYDBhNwYrs4L1xGtRHPm6aUNZyiU7SKhJUvJTDxeETQQ5wVueLSdNbAx-NvXVFvBOS1pK_CdhJCzSsRyFHvBuCR48WPb6uLArnFAIFa1BppPA%3D%3D)**

name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: How we’re saying thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
After Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline, David’s going to be calling a few of our grassroots donors at random to say thanks.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240428-1&t=1&akid=620%2E587540%2Ew46ECF)
Peter,
Did you see David’s last email? After Tuesday’s end-of-month deadline, he’s going to be calling a few of our grassroots donors at random to say thanks. **It doesn’t matter whether you pitch in $1 or $1,000 — every donor has a chance to be called!**
**[Pitch in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240428-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240428-1-620&refcode2=620_587540_w46ECF&akid=620%2E587540%2Ew46ECF)**
From state legislatures to Congress, there are so many pressing issues for young people that our leaders just aren’t addressing. If we want to change that, we need to make sure young people are more fairly represented at all levels of government.
**We’re getting ready to release our next slate of endorsements _very_ soon** — we just released our first slate with six incredible candidates a few weeks ago — and we’re already hard at work to make sure every one of them wins in November.
But we can’t do any of that work without you, Peter. As a grassroots organization **we depend on your support** to meet our fundraising goals, and right now we’re coming up on a big deadline.
[**If you want to help us elect outstanding young leaders all over the country this November (and potentially receive a call from David to say thanks!), please pitch in $5 or whatever you can today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240428-1?refcode=em20240428-1&amount=5&refcode2=620_587540_w46ECF&akid=620%2E587540%2Ew46ECF)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240428-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240428-1-620&refcode2=620_587540_w46ECF&akid=620%2E587540%2Ew46ECF)**
Thanks,
Leaders We Deserve HQ

name: Cori Bush
subject: I’m a voice for the people. My opponent is a voice for AIPAC.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Before I was in Congress, I was a nurse, activist, organizer,
single-mother, and pastor who knew from firsthand experience that those in
power weren’t doing enough for regular, everyday people like us.

I ran for office to be a powerful voice for the people of St. Louis and
fight for the bold, progressive change that our communities, our country,
and our world deserve — the kind of change that establishment,
corporate-backed politicians have spent years blocking.

As an “insurgent” candidate, I took on an incumbent who’d been in
Washington for two decades and was part of a 52-year political dynasty,
and with the help of Justice Democrats and this people-powered movement, I
defeated him in 2020.

Now, I’m being challenged by an AIPAC-endorsed candidate in one of the
most competitive Democratic primaries of 2024 this August.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-cb.nmWG--&refcode=em20240428-34535&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34535%2E1203867%2E8sgVNw ]Right-wing megadonors are spending more than ever before to unseat me
and my fellow Squad members. Can you help us fight back by splitting
$5 or more between my campaign and the Protect the Squad
campaign today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-cb.nmWG--&refcode=em20240428-34535&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1020&akid=34535%2E1203867%2E8sgVNw ]Contribute $5

Since my time in Congress began in 2021, I have always prioritized the
people’s interests over all else. I know the struggles of being unhoused,
experiencing gun violence, and domestic violence. And I’ve testified
before Congress and the country about being sexually assaulted at 17 years
old and my decision to have an abortion.

I led a direct action on the U.S. Capitol steps to protect 11 million
people from being forced out on the streets during the height of the COVID
pandemic. I’ve taken on our broken criminal legal system which has
disproportionately harmed Black and brown communities. And last October, I
joined my sister-in-service, Rep. Rashida Tlaib, in introducing the
Ceasefire Now resolution, calling for de-escalation and an immediate
lasting Ceasefire in Gaza, the safe release of all hostages and those
arbitrarily detained, and a surge in humanitarian assistance.

Fighting for justice, freedom, and our shared humanity has come at a
price: $100 million, to be exact. That’s how much AIPAC has vowed to spend
against me and my fellow Squad members in an attempt to unseat us from
Congress this year.

My moderate opponent is being propped up by a group funded by anti-choice,
pro-insurrection Republican millionaires and billionaires. Meanwhile, I
refuse to accept corporate contributions and rely on support from the
grassroots.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-pts-email-cb.nmWG--&refcode=em20240428-34535&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34535%2E1203867%2E8sgVNw ]If you can afford to, will you make a split donation between Justice
Democrats and my campaign now to help us overcome the millions of dollars
that right-wing, Trump megadonor-funded groups are spending against us?

Anything you can give to protect my seat and my fellow Squad members in
competitive races is deeply appreciated.

In solidarity,

Cori

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240428-34535-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34535_1203867_8sgVNw&akid=34535%2E1203867%2E8sgVNw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34535%2E1203867%2E8sgVNw

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: | We'll be honest, our campaign is hanging on by a thread, Peter. GOP dark money groups have been pouring millions of dollars into Nevada to flip Jacky’s seat red, and experts at The Cook Political Report just downgraded our race to a “Toss Up.” | = With early voting for the primary election starting in Nevada next month, we simply can’t afford to lose any more ground. The good news is that we recently launched new TV ads to get our message out to voters before they head to the polls – but we need all hands on deck to keep these vital ads on the air. If we don’t hit our $15,000 goal by midnight tonight, we might need to pull back at the worst possible moment. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. = = = = Thank you for being in this fight with us, Peter. The House and Senate voted to send Ukraine funding for a security package to help fight off the unjustified invasion ordered by Vladimir Putin.

Over 100 House Republicans, led by MAGA extremists, voted against the Ukraine funding measure. Chief among them was one of Putin’s most reliable and talkative puppets: **Jim Jordan**.

name: Jane PAC
subject: New report reveals alarming rise in air pollution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The numbers don’t lie.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83892294/469852478/1328794144?refcode=ea.2745266e-8105-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.2745266e-8105-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3NDUyNjZlLTgxMDUtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lw1Kwdz2p2mSmKEwM-taoVlDmjWPjOV_dj13v_9Vr_s=&emci=33f3fc6f-f903-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=2745266e-8105-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4823105)
---
Brace yourself: The American Lung Association's latest _State of the Air report_ paints a grim picture of air pollution in the U.S.: **_Nearly 40% of our nation's population now lives in areas with unhealthy air._** And get this: The report also found that _nearly 91 million people_ live in one of 119 counties that received a failing grade for significant increases in year-round particle pollution — a significant uptick compared to the previous year's findings. Read that again. This means tens of millions of Americans, including children and the elderly, are at increased risk of diseases like asthma, lung cancer, and cardiovascular issues from the air they breathe every day. This report confirms our fears: the fossil fuel industry — backed by politicians who turn a blind eye — continues to poison our communities unchecked. These corporations significantly worsen air pollution, devastate local environments, and *literally* add fuel to the fire by exacerbating the conditions that make wildfires more frequent & deadly. But we’re not giving up hope. **At the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we are more determined than ever to combat the growing influence of the fossil fuel industry on our political landscape and advocate for policies that protect our air, our health, and our communities. clean_body: The numbers don’t lie. | Brace yourself: The American Lung Association's latest State of the Air report paints a grim picture of air pollution in the U.S.: Nearly 40% of our nation's population now lives in areas with unhealthy air. And get this: The report also found that nearly 91 million people live in one of 119 counties that received a failing grade for significant increases in year-round particle pollution — a significant uptick compared to the previous year's findings. Read that again. This means tens of millions of Americans, including children and the elderly, are at increased risk of diseases like asthma, lung cancer, and cardiovascular issues from the air they breathe every day. This report confirms our fears: the fossil fuel industry — backed by politicians who turn a blind eye — continues to poison our communities unchecked. These corporations significantly worsen air pollution, devastate local environments, and literally add fuel to the fire by exacerbating the conditions that make wildfires more frequent & deadly. But we’re not giving up hope. At the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, we are more determined than ever to combat the growing influence of the fossil fuel industry on our political landscape and advocate for policies that protect our air, our health, and our communities. This work has never been more vital. Here’s how you can join us in our mission: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Together, we can turn the tide against pollution and ensure a healthier future for the next generation. The Jane Fonda Climate PAC \----------------- If you want to learn more: | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/83892930/469854315/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240428_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwODg1NjhjLTgyMDUtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZUYZL7MXkRCMeZ4X4GiNwZhw2lO-9Y9RiK7pTqDVan4=)
Peter,
Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks.
But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**
If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, **so be it.**
And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and again), **so be it.**

subject: Do you want to help Democrats take back the House?

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=38848%2E3422442%2ETDQRR0)
Hey Derek,if you opened this email, you probably want to help Democrats take back the House. Here’s why Josh Riley is key to that plan:
* Josh is running in an upstate New York district, **one of the eleven currently represented by a Republican in Congress but ranked “toss up” by the Cook Political Report.** These are the districts Democrats have the best chance of flipping.
* Marc Molinaro, the MAGA Republican that Josh is running against, voted TWICE to make _Jim Jordan_ the Speaker of the House.
* **Josh doesn’t take a dime of corporate PAC money** , which means he really counts on grassroots supporters.

**[Can you make a donation that will be split between Josh’s campaign and Truth to Power?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240428?refcode=em20240428-38848&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38848_3422442_TDQRR0&akid=38848%2E3422442%2ETDQRR0)**
**
**Thanks, Derek.
–Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20240428-38848&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38848_3422442_TDQRR0&akid=38848%2E3422442%2ETDQRR0)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=38848%2E3422442%2ETDQRR0).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

It’s time-consuming and labor-intensive. But if we don’t do it now, then Democrats will be fighting an uphill battle in November. We must do it now. Period. We’re not going to kid you, however. It’s not easy work. It’s time-consuming and labor-intensive. But if we don’t do it now, then Democrats will be fighting an uphill battle in November. Allowing the White House, Congress, the U.S. Senate, the governor’s office, and the General Assembly to fall into the hands of conservative extremists with their anti-freedom and cruel agenda is something we can’t let happen. = Not a week before Election Day, but today. clean_body: let us know where you stand | | | : We want to hear from you! | | UPDATE FROM THE HILL : Biden inches closer to Trump in latest national poll We have to confirm that this data is accurate. Respond to our live poll before 11:59 p.m. tonight: Do you approve of President Biden? | | | | Friend, this is great news, Americans across the country are rallying around President Biden after he recently reaffirmed his commitment to protecting reproductive rights, reducing healthcare costs, and and taking action on environmental justice. Now is the time to build on this momentum and stand behind President Biden as we approach the 2024 elections. The polls are showing a statistical tie between President Biden and Donald Trump, which means your support is more critical than ever. We cannot let Trump put an end to all the progress we’ve made. That’s why we’re tracking our supporters’ opinions closely — we need to ensure that Democrats in 43614 are ready to stand behind President Biden. Friend, we need your input. Will you please take a moment to respond to our poll and let us know where you stand? Do you approve of President Biden? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Mike Soboleski
subject: Convention Wrap Up
body:
Did you hear my speech?
| | |
---
| [](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p2J_-57nEspvnbfh8p-Ly4D_f2dvIu3umTSqh0ma98wI5mH3d_y2L79by7oifurXWT7xNLu7SYYzwPZ46T5EZtWHZzzilayk-xNk4027aCZ8vW0PEZ21v36OUrSjSotlPccYBmrvpRmgs00wP0JsZg8BDIo3qKcM&c=Sa_JZ-hfVu_hV11h0GCR4SRUCoVtFeNkg_TaU7hLxKl95gVouOx6-Q==&ch=ahJNciLrgEdAJuSLyffiTPzkO7spcAtbDzq4bbamobooEqZCr7-AWw==)
---
---
|
# ONE OF US - FIGHTING FOR US!
---
---
|
---
It was wonderful to have my mom at convention on Saturday!
---
| My Friends,
Friends,
What a weekend! The past few days has been filled with spending time at the Maine Republican Party Convention. Friday, I gave our keynote speech that was very well received with many breaks for applause and ending with the only standing ovation of the day!
Thank you to Reagan Paul and Katrina Smith for the kind words and warm introduction before I spoke. I am so thankful that Maine Republicans heard our message loud and clear. This Marine is the only candidate who can beat Jared Golden in the November. Ask anyone in the room - I brought the house down with a barn burner of speech.
Early Saturday morning we had the first debate for the CD2 Republican primary. I spoke about actual accomplishments in the legislature, my vision for Maine and America and how we need to drain the swamp. Even though my opponent publicly declared victory seconds after the debate was over... Anyone who watched knows that we won that as well. We faceoff again Tuesday night on WGME. Be sure to set your DVR!
Convention was a fun time to come together as Republicans and set our course to win elections this fall. We had over 200 people take home Soboleski signs for their front yards! If you would like one, send us an email and we will connect you with local volunteers to plant one in the ground at your home.
Thank you to everyone who attended and participated to get in the fight to make America great again. We'll have video of our time at convention up soon. I'll see you on TV Tuesday night for the debate on WGME!
Stay safe, Mike
---
|
---
Back stage before our speeches with Reagan Paul and Katrina Smith. Thank you my friends!

| |
---

clean_body: Did you hear my speech? | | | | == | ONE OF US - FIGHTING FOR US! | It was wonderful to have my mom at convention on Saturday! | My Friends, Friends, What a weekend! The past few days has been filled with spending time at the Maine Republican Party Convention. Friday, I gave our keynote speech that was very well received with many breaks for applause and ending with the only standing ovation of the day! Thank you to Reagan Paul and Katrina Smith for the kind words and warm introduction before I spoke. I am so thankful that Maine Republicans heard our message loud and clear. This Marine is the only candidate who can beat Jared Golden in the November. Ask anyone in the room - I brought the house down with a barn burner of speech. Early Saturday morning we had the first debate for the CD2 Republican primary. I spoke about actual accomplishments in the legislature, my vision for Maine and America and how we need to drain the swamp. Even though my opponent publicly declared victory seconds after the debate was over... Anyone who watched knows that we won that as well. We faceoff again Tuesday night on WGME. Be sure to set your DVR! Convention was a fun time to come together as Republicans and set our course to win elections this fall. We had over 200 people take home Soboleski signs for their front yards! If you would like one, send us an email and we will connect you with local volunteers to plant one in the ground at your home. Thank you to everyone who attended and participated to get in the fight to make America great again. We'll have video of our time at convention up soon. I'll see you on TV Tuesday night for the debate on WGME! Stay safe, Mike | Back stage before our speeches with Reagan Paul and Katrina Smith. Thank you my friends! | | | If you would like to join our campaign community, please sign up today! | | == | | | | Mike Soboleski is a born and raised Mainer and a lifelong conservative with Maine values. He's running for Congress in Maine's Second Congressional District because he knows our state and country are going in the wrong direction. subject: Happy Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
You’re probably enjoying the spring weather right now. We hope things are going well with you.
#

Peter, it’s the last Sunday in April.
You’re probably enjoying the spring weather right now. We hope things are going well with you.
And we appreciate that you’re reading this email from us, because we know you surely get a lot of them.
So we’ll keep this as brief as we can: [**If you’ve got the means to make a donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today, we need you to chip in. You can use this link to make a donation.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-apr24.p6MMmT&refcode=em240428-2-160&t=1&akid=2261%2E734936%2EO9AmAz)
The truth is, we’re short. We hate to say it, because so many have stepped up and supported us. But if we don’t turn things around we could miss our April fundraising goal, and if we do it makes it more likely that Kari Lake wins this campaign in Arizona.
So if you’re able, pick an amount from the buttons here and chip in to help us hit those goals before our deadline hits on Tuesday:

body:
I joined Lawrence O’Donnell on The Last Word to discuss Governor Youngkin’s refusal to sign a bill to protect access to contraception:

---
| Peter,

**I joined Lawrence O’Donnell on The Last Word to discuss Governor Youngkin’s refusal to sign a bill to protect access to contraception:**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83894987/469859548/-735451230?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-04-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE4OGEwNDgtODgwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BfSoRjYue79VvJrlZ7_AzYZXzDlILih4iUOXo1WUO5M=)
[_**Virginians deserve a Governor who will protect access to contraception.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83894988/469859549/-735451230?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-04-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE4OGEwNDgtODgwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BfSoRjYue79VvJrlZ7_AzYZXzDlILih4iUOXo1WUO5M=) But Governor Youngkin did not sign this bill, because he said it went “too far.” Instead, he gutted the bill’s protections for IUDs, birth control, and emergency contraceptives.

In the wake of the _Dobbs_ decision, we knew it was not just about abortion. We knew that the restrictions would go further, and already, we’ve seen threats to IVF in Alabama and attacks on emergency contraception.

Governor Youngkin is out of step with what the people of Virginia want, and we need legislators — and a Governor — committed to protecting our rights.

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Things are only going to get tougher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
I can’t begin to say how grateful I am for your unwavering support throughout the years.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83895071/469859895/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ2YTA5MC04ODA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0Whfz1FQh86h_n3dpS32ptslG-T9HWLMnkLV73gtQM=&emci=ccce8724-dd03-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=30d6a090-8805-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

I know I’ve said it before, but I want to thank each and every one of you who either voted, made calls, donated their hard-earned dollars, or even spent time reading our emails this month. I can’t begin to say how grateful I am for your unwavering support throughout the years.

Because of you, our team is in a strong position as we head into the general election. But things are only going to get tougher, and I’m going to be relying on this team more and more. That’s why I’m emailing you right now.

Peter,
Throughout my career, I’ve been proudly dedicated to leadership and service, holding senior positions at organizations like the Make-A-Wish Foundation and the American Red Cross.
More than anything else, my deep passion for helping others has driven me as I’ve navigated through life. From being on the ground coordinating first-response efforts after natural disasters to supporting families during their most difficult times of crisis, I’ve been able to cross paths with so many people and play a small role in lifting them up when they need it most.
Now, I’m running for Congress because our Democracy is in peril. Can I count on you to help fuel our people-powered campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]
Our representative in Congress has held office for over 10 years, yet there have been no improvements made in our district. Instead of working for the great people he’s been elected to serve, David Schweikert has disrespected us by succumbing to special interests and extremist agendas.
I know my experience, along with my dedication to helping others, will allow me to be an effective voice for Arizonans in Congress. Our residents deserve better than career politicians like David Schweikert, so it’s time for us to come together to flip this seat from red to blue.
Peter, will you join our team by making a grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kkfc-email-q3-2023?refcode=09062023]

name: COURIER
subject: What happens when Fox News Attacks
body:
Here’s what happens when Fox News attacks me

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83895641/469862047/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMyYTgzNDItODkwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4hG9KbN8tRaBmYG03O1xfNXt29ySYVbvBrIyAJZN8qE=&emci=820f353c-8905-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=e32a8342-8905-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=14016711)
Hey, Peter, it’s Tara McGowan, Founder and Publisher of COURIER. In a moment, I’ll share a personal story about what happened when Fox News attacked COURIER, [**but if you already know you’re ready to do your part to hold Fox News accountable for spreading lies and hate in our communities, please consider donating $15 right now. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83895642/469862048/-593472309?refcode=20240428-EM-TaraTweets&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMyYTgzNDItODkwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4hG9KbN8tRaBmYG03O1xfNXt29ySYVbvBrIyAJZN8qE=)
Earlier this month, we told you about how Fox News published an attack on COURIER, me, and our local newsrooms. The “report” was rife with wild conspiracy theories, insinuations, and ad hominem attacks. You know, typical Fox News stuff.
Of course, we know what happens at Fox News doesn’t stay there. Fox is a super-spreader of right-wing misinformation. When they attack, right-wing influencers and media amplify them throughout the right-wing ecosystem.
**Inevitably, those attacks become very personal and, in some cases, downright scary. Take a look for yourself at a couple of the messages/social media mentions I’ve received since that article came out:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83895643/469862049/-593472309?refcode=20240428-EM-TaraTweets&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMyYTgzNDItODkwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4hG9KbN8tRaBmYG03O1xfNXt29ySYVbvBrIyAJZN8qE=)
Peter, I’ll be honest: it’s **_not great_** to have your social media feed taken over by strangers tweeting vaguely menacing things at you.
But, you know what, I can take it. Why? We founded COURIER to give communities a trustworthy local news alternative to right-wing bad actors like Fox News. I’ve always known they’d come at us with everything they have to try and stop us because it’s such a critical mission.
**I promise you COURIER will never back down in the face of Fox’s or anyone else’s attacks. We know how important it is to protect democracy from right-wing misinformation right now. **
So you don’t need to worry about us. But _**everyone**_ should be worried about how bad actors like Fox News are causing division and hate to spread in our communities.
And that’s why I’m writing to ask for your support today.
[_**So, Peter, let’s show Fox News that we’re ready for a fight. Can you pitch in $15 to help us continue to fight back against right-wing misinformation factories like Fox News?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83895644/469862052/-593472309?refcode=20240428-EM-TaraTweets&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTMyYTgzNDItODkwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4hG9KbN8tRaBmYG03O1xfNXt29ySYVbvBrIyAJZN8qE=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: Here’s what happens when Fox News attacks me Hey, Peter, it’s Tara McGowan, Founder and Publisher of COURIER. In a moment, I’ll share a personal story about what happened when Fox News attacked COURIER, = Earlier this month, we told you about how Fox News published an attack on COURIER, me, and our local newsrooms. The “report” was rife with wild conspiracy theories, insinuations, and ad hominem attacks. You know, typical Fox News stuff. Of course, we know what happens at Fox News doesn’t stay there. Fox is a super-spreader of right-wing misinformation. When they attack, right-wing influencers and media amplify them throughout the right-wing ecosystem. Inevitably, those attacks become very personal and, in some cases, downright scary. Take a look for yourself at a couple of the messages/social media mentions I’ve received since that article came out: = Peter, I’ll be honest: it’s not great to have your social media feed taken over by strangers tweeting vaguely menacing things at you. But, you know what, I can take it. Why? We founded COURIER to give communities a trustworthy local news alternative to right-wing bad actors like Fox News. I’ve always known they’d come at us with everything they have to try and stop us because it’s such a critical mission. I promise you COURIER will never back down in the face of Fox’s or anyone else’s attacks. We know how important it is to protect democracy from right-wing misinformation right now. So you don’t need to worry about us. But everyone should be worried about how bad actors like Fox News are causing division and hate to spread in our communities. And that’s why I’m writing to ask for your support today. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you so much, Tara McGowan Founder & Publisher COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Upcoming Events: Join Us for a Memorable Experience!
[Melville, New York](https://www.kennedy24.com/melville-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_28_24_r_a4&n=2) \- Sunday, April 28th at 6:30 PM
Be a part of an exclusive evening that will spark inspiration and bolster Robert's presidential bid. This is your moment to join a visionary leader—don't let it pass by. You simply must be there!
[Boston, Massachusetts](https://www.kennedy24.com/boston-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_28_24_r_a4&n=3) \- Monday, April 29th at 6:30 PM
We’re proud to host a special event at the Park Plaza Hotel, where RFK Jr. first announced his historic candidacy nearly one year ago. Joining Bobby will be Cheryl Hines along with Jenny McCarthy and Donnie Wahlberg.
[Nashville, Tennessee](https://www.kennedy24.com/country-and-comedy-nashville?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_28_24_r_a4&n=4) \- Wednesday, May 15th at 7:00 PM
Our third “Night of Laughter with RFK Jr.” will include Nicole Shanahan and feature comic legends Rob Schneider and Jim Breuer along with musical performances by Kayley Biship, John Carter Cash, and Ana Christina Cash.
[Castle Rock, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/castlerock-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_28_24_r_a4&n=5) \- Saturday May 18th at 6:30 PM
Join us for an intimate reception with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the serene setting of Castle Rock, CO, where you'll enjoy an evening of engaging conversation, delightful hors d'oeuvres, and cocktails.
[Aurora, Colorado](https://www.kennedy24.com/denver-co-voter-rally?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_28_24_r_a4&n=6) \- Sunday May 19th at 3:00 PM
Catch RFK Jr. in Denver on May 19th for a dynamic rally at The Hangar at Stanley Marketplace. He'll share his vision to rebuild the middle class and curtail corporate power, aiming for a spot on ballots nationwide.
[Santa Monica, California](https://www.kennedy24.com/santa-monica-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_28_24_r_a4&n=7) \- Sunday, June 2nd at 6:00 PM
Join us for an exclusive reception with Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Cheryl Hines at a private venue in beautiful Santa Monica. Enjoy an evening of hors d’oeuvres, cocktails, a fireside chat, and a unique photo opportunity.
[Edmonds, Washington](https://www.kennedy24.com/edmonds-reception?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_28_24_r_a4&n=8) \- Sunday, June 9th at 4:00 PM
Experience an evening of elegance with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. at a stunning waterfront venue. This exclusive fundraiser offers a fireside chat, a Q&A session, and gourmet hors d'oeuvres and cocktails.
* * *
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/ziplining-sweepstakes?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_28_24_r_a4&n=9)
* * *
RFK Jr.: Together We Bring America Back To The People
Why didn’t I choose a political insider to be my VP?
_Because those insiders are the architects of our current crises_ : a staggering $34 trillion national debt, a rampant chronic disease epidemic, pervasive corporate dominance over our key industries, and numerous other challenges.
My running mate, Nicole Shanahan, is a brilliant and incisive thinker whose fresh perspective and expertise embody the transformative leadership America so desperately needs today.
Nicole and I are committed to fundamentally reshaping the way our government operates, to return it to its rightful owners: you, the American people.
**But to implement our vision of genuine change, we need your support.**
[Every donation means we’re one step closer to dismantling the status quo and reclaiming a government that truly serves its citizens.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_4_28_24_r_a4&n=10)

body:

body:
I wouldn’t email you if it wasn’t absolutely critical.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83897356/469866941/-1514006159?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjE1OTg1ZC04YjA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4lisSYbeSuoEHSmTtr05a6x8GOt6zdqtuO_l6eKbhA=) Hi, I know it’s a Sunday, but I wouldn’t email you if it wasn’t absolutely critical.

We just crunched the numbers and we still need to raise $4,213 by the end of the month to knock on more doors, run ads and reach out to voters one-on-one across the district.

**I’m running for Congress in a district that will determine which party controls the House, so there’s no room for error. Missing any of our goals could mean this district falls into Republican hands.**

So please, before you get back to your Sunday, will you chip in $5 to my battleground campaign for Congress?

**[https://go.brianaforcongress.com/a/april-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83897358/469866944/-201247788?refcode=email_042824_sunday&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjE1OTg1ZC04YjA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e4lisSYbeSuoEHSmTtr05a6x8GOt6zdqtuO_l6eKbhA=)**

Thanks,

Briana

name: Team Moore
subject: We’re asking for $5 today
body:
$5

Friend, that number is what we’re asking from you today. We’re so grateful for every contribution of $5 or more folks give to support Wes and the work he is doing to create a better Maryland. We don’t take it lightly that folks are inspired to donate their hard-earned dollars. But with three months of not being able to fundraise, that means that we have to work twice as hard to close our fundraising gap so we’re prepared for the year ahead.

That’s why your support today is critical. Every donation we receive today will help us keep up the work. We hope today, you can support the Moore-Miller administration by contributing $5 or any amount today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240428-1?refcode=20240428-1]

We have to ramp up our fundraising momentum through the rest of the year. We can’t let up on our efforts now. We have to make up for lost time during the fundraising freeze, and meeting our end-of-month goal will help us get back on track.

Contributing $5 or more now to our end-of-month goal will make a huge difference as we map out the rest of the year. Make a contribution today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240428-1?refcode=20240428-1]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240428-1?refcode=20240428-1&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240428-1?refcode=20240428-1&express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240428-1?refcode=20240428-1&express_lane=true&amount=50]
Donate $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240428-1?refcode=20240428-1&express_lane=true&amount=75]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240428-1?refcode=20240428-1&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240428-1?refcode=20240428-1-other]

With gratitude,
Team Moore

| | **"Kari Lake says 'unfortunately' Arizona isn't enforcing 1864 abortion ban, flipping again"**
_— NBC News, April 23, 2024_
* * *
_Arizona GOP Senate candidate Kari Lake said in an interview with an Idaho media outlet that "unfortunately," her state's near-total abortion ban dating from 1864 is not being enforced, flipping back on comments she made against the law earlier this month, when she called state legislators asking them to repeal it._ | [PITCH IN TO DEFEAT KARI LAKE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83897496/469867290/-1974965524?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240428_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3NzM5YmEtOGIwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fMez4zaBhRRaq5vaD49FUgnAXqHtLTilGwZLPBdaFxA=)
---
Well, she’s flip-flopping AGAIN. We can’t say we’re surprised, but it does beg the question:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83897497/469867291/-1974965524?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240428_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3NzM5YmEtOGIwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fMez4zaBhRRaq5vaD49FUgnAXqHtLTilGwZLPBdaFxA=)
Kari’s message to conservative Idaho residents (yup, Idaho, not Arizona 🙄) was that she was “disappointed” that the pro-choice leaders of Arizona aren’t enforcing this draconian ban on abortion even though just last week she was asking state legislators to repeal the law that she called “great” back in 2022.
She’s flopping more than a fish on a dry lakebed, and the only thing we know for sure is that she’ll do and say ANYTHING to please Donald Trump and the most extreme fringes of the right-wing.

**- Desecrated** Easter Sunday with wokeism
**- Arrested** the leader of the Republican Party
**- Removed** Trump from the ballot in key states
**- Raided** Mar-a-Lago with armed agents
**- Censored** Conservative voices
**- Spied** on Catholic worshippers
**- Gutted** election integrity measures
**- Peddled** the Russia Hoax for years
**- Threw** open our border to illegals
**- Abandoned** Americans in Afghanistan
**- Caved** to the Chinese Communist Party
**- Moved** to pack the Supreme Court
**- Forced** propaganda into classrooms

And the list goes on and on and on! Never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time. If the Radical Left Democrats somehow win control of the White House, the Senate, and the House... America will be lost forever.

_I know this to be true. You know it too._ But when everything is on the line, moments like this separate the strong from the weak. And make no mistake - the future of our country hangs in the balance.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we’re rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen. ")**_

If you consider yourself a strong American Patriot - like the two of us do - I'm personally asking for your full commitment right here and right now.

The resources we collect today will help build the largest GOP voter turnout operation in history, deploy an army of volunteers in swing districts, run hard-hitting ads in battleground states, harvest ballots where it's legal, and help make this the most secure election EVER.

**THAT** is how Conservatives will win in a landslide...

**THAT** is how we take control of the White House, Senate, AND House...

**THAT** is how we stop the Radical Left Democrats from destroying America...

**THAT** is how we save our country as we know it...

**AND THAT** is how we send shockwaves through the heart of the Deep State, DC Swamp, and Liberal Media...

_**[I'm asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that's you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It's the only way we win. So what do you say? If you can't afford to pitch in $100 or $50 right now, I understand completely. If you can spare JUST $5 or $10, it will still go a long way in the fight for what we believe in. I only ask that everyone contributes SOMETHING.

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy

I hoped to email you on a lighter note but I didn't have another choice with everything happening right now. The unholy alliance between Joe Biden, the corrupt Deep State, the DC Swamp, the Liberal Media, and the Radical Left Democrats is a national disgrace. "We, the American People, will never forget what they’ve done to us. Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who: " - Desecrated Easter Sunday with wokeism - Arrested the leader of the Republican Party - Removed Trump from the ballot in key states - Raided Mar-a-Lago with armed agents - Censored Conservative voices - Spied on Catholic worshippers - Gutted election integrity measures - Peddled the Russia Hoax for years - Threw open our border to illegals - Abandoned Americans in Afghanistan - Caved to the Chinese Communist Party - Moved to pack the Supreme Court - Forced propaganda into classrooms And the list goes on and on and on! Never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time. If the Radical Left Democrats somehow win control of the White House, the Senate, and the House... America will be lost forever. I know this to be true. You know it too. But when everything is on the line, moments like this separate the strong from the weak. And make no mistake - the future of our country hangs in the balance. "That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we’re rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen. " If you consider yourself a strong American Patriot - like the two of us do - I'm personally asking for your full commitment right here and right now. The resources we collect today will help build the largest GOP voter turnout operation in history, deploy an army of volunteers in swing districts, run hard-hitting ads in battleground states, harvest ballots where it's legal, and help make this the most secure election EVER. THAT is how Conservatives will win in a landslide... THAT is how we take control of the White House, Senate, AND House... THAT is how we stop the Radical Left Democrats from destroying America... THAT is how we save our country as we know it... AND THAT is how we send shockwaves through the heart of the Deep State, DC Swamp, and Liberal Media... "I’m asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that’s you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It’s the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you? " If you can't afford to pitch in $100 or $50 right now, I understand completely. If you can spare JUST $5 or $10, it will still go a long way in the fight for what we believe in. I only ask that everyone contributes SOMETHING. No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you. Thanks for all you do, Vivek Ramaswamy | | | "Please take my Election Year Check-In!" It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | | "START HERE >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003

I love serving my community in Congress, but before I ever ran for office, I was a public school teacher.

Working with children sparked my passion for public service — and inspires me to fight every day for Ohio.

**But look, my ability to deliver results for our kids hinges on whether we can keep this seat blue.[We need to work together to get the job done, so please, chip in $10 or more today. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83897786/469868100/-417552776?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.04.28_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWRjOGQ1Ny04YzA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Tp9TuHZydBVixW1zsxuEGIimR2k0G84E5Bf2SEDmyY=)**

My time as a teacher taught me that the policy debates in DC don’t exist in a vacuum.

They affect real people — our children — in a real way.

That’s why I know this race is about so much more than just winning an election.

**It’s about building a future where every child can prosper — and I need you with me if we want any hope of winning it.**

**[So please, can you chip in $10 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83897787/469868101/-417552776?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.04.28_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWRjOGQ1Ny04YzA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Tp9TuHZydBVixW1zsxuEGIimR2k0G84E5Bf2SEDmyY=)**

Thanks for your support,
_Greg_

And it ensures that we can fight back against the Republican dark-money groups flooding the airwaves with attack ads as they try to win back the Senate.

With polls saying that control of the chamber could go either way this year, there’s never been a more important time for this team to have Mark’s back.
