name: John Avlon
subject: This could come down to one seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-emq2?refcode=em0420 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-emq2?refcode=em0420]
Friends,

Right now, MAGA has the narrowest possible majority in the House. What that means is every single seat in the House is going to matter this year. This thing could really come down to one seat. One vote.

Think about the power of one vote. Remember John McCain giving the ACA repeal a “thumbs down” on the Senate floor? One vote.

The stakes are so much higher now. MAGA’s been fighting amongst themselves instead of taking on a murderous dictator. They’re so wrapped up in their own internal power squabbles they’ve left Ukraine twisting in the wind for six months in their fight against Russia.

They’re so focused on the fighting that they aren’t doing any fixing. And we have a lot to fix. They’re still trying to strip women of basic reproductive freedoms. They took Arizona back to a Civil War era law passed when women couldn’t even vote.

They keep telling us who they are. We have to believe them.

From Day One, we can take meaningful action to do things like reduce the cost of living and increase everyone’s quality of life by restoring the SALT deduction and expanding the Child Tax Credit - putting more money back in your pockets. That won’t happen with MAGA.

We can actually stand up for women’s rights and make sure women’s reproductive freedoms are protected on the federal level – not left in the hands of MAGA extremists.

And we can find common ground with common sense on issues like immigration – not just bowing to whatever Trump happens to feel is in his short-term best interests – not yours – on any given day.

When I say the stakes couldn’t be higher, that’s what I mean. This comes down to a simple choice. Can we come together to get things done, or will we be stuck in this hyper-partisan MAGA mess?

I got into the arena because I believe we all can step up and fix this. That starts with winning back the House. And yes, it could likely come down to one seat. Are you with me? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-emq2?]

Thank you for fighting the good fight with me.

-John

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-emq2?refcode=em0420]

clean_body: [] Friends, Right now, MAGA has the narrowest possible majority in the House. What that means is every single seat in the House is going to matter this year. This thing could really come down to one seat. One vote. Think about the power of one vote. Remember John McCain giving the ACA repeal a “thumbs down” on the Senate floor? One vote. The stakes are so much higher now. MAGA’s been fighting amongst themselves instead of taking on a murderous dictator. They’re so wrapped up in their own internal power squabbles they’ve left Ukraine twisting in the wind for six months in their fight against Russia. They’re so focused on the fighting that they aren’t doing any fixing. And we have a lot to fix. They’re still trying to strip women of basic reproductive freedoms. They took Arizona back to a Civil War era law passed when women couldn’t even vote. They keep telling us who they are. We have to believe them. From Day One, we can take meaningful action to do things like reduce the cost of living and increase everyone’s quality of life by restoring the SALT deduction and expanding the Child Tax Credit - putting more money back in your pockets. That won’t happen with MAGA. We can actually stand up for women’s rights and make sure women’s reproductive freedoms are protected on the federal level – not left in the hands of MAGA extremists. And we can find common ground with common sense on issues like immigration – not just bowing to whatever Trump happens to feel is in his short-term best interests – not yours – on any given day. When I say the stakes couldn’t be higher, that’s what I mean. This comes down to a simple choice. Can we come together to get things done, or will we be stuck in this hyper-partisan MAGA mess? I got into the arena because I believe we all can step up and fix this. That starts with winning back the House. And yes, it could likely come down to one seat. Are you with me? [?] Thank you for fighting the good fight with me. -John CONTRIBUTE [] PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS John Avlon for Congress PO Box 1200 Sag Harbor, NY 11963 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Team McBride
subject: 3️⃣ options
body:
Can you help us catch up today?
#
Hey,
Our end-of-month deadline is two days away — and we hate to say it, but we’re still behind where we need to be to reach our $10,000 email fundraising goal.
**So, we have three options right now:**
1. 📱**Increase Sarah’s call time** , so she can make more calls to our donors — leaving less time for her to be out in front of voters
2. ⬇️ **Scale back on our organizing efforts** — which could mean making fewer phone calls and knocking on fewer doors across Delaware.
3. 💌 **Reach out to Sarah’s top grassroots supporters — like you —** and ask if you can help bridge the gap, hence this email!

We are big fans of option #3 because we are constantly amazed by the outpouring of support Sarah receives from this grassroots team. [**Will you take a moment right now to make a $5 contribution today to help us reach our $10,000 goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240428?refcode=em20240428-1-197&amount=5&refcode2=197_21716_FmnH9d&akid=197%2E21716%2EFmnH9d)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240428?amount=5&refcode=em20240428-1-197&refcode2=197_21716_FmnH9d&akid=197%2E21716%2EFmnH9d)**
Thank you!
–Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240428-1&t=1&refcode2=197_21716_FmnH9d&akid=197%2E21716%2EFmnH9d)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=197%2E21716%2EFmnH9d)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=197%2E21716%2EFmnH9d)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=197%2E21716%2EFmnH9d)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Sherrod (personal)
subject: I’m a fighter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, my motto has always been that when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. That's what I'm doing every day in the Senate.
**I'm fighting for the Dignity of Work.** No matter where you're from or what kind of work you do, hard work should pay off for everyone. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I'll fight for you.
**I'm fighting for accountability.** For years, we've seen corporations lobby for tax breaks and bad trade deals that hurt workers. I'm not afraid to stand up to Wall Street or take on Big Pharma to level the playing field.
**I'm fighting for our fundamental rights.** My opponent has made it clear he doesn’t have our best interests at heart. I will always fight for a more equal and inclusive country.
**But here's the deal, Peter:** I need you to fight with me. I'm facing my toughest race yet, and polls show me neck and neck with my Trump-backed opponent. He’s spending millions of dollars to flip this seat and the Senate red, and I can't fight back without your help.
**[I need to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to fight back, and I'm counting on your grassroots support to get there. Please, will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and Bob Casey’s to help me win in Ohio, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and keep fighting for you in the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-1?refcode=em20240428-1&refcode2=2831_552475_YQgEym&akid=2831%2E552475%2EYQgEym)**
Thank you,
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-1?refcode=em20240428-1&refcode2=2831_552475_YQgEym&akid=2831%2E552475%2EYQgEym)

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2831%2E552475%2EYQgEym)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2831%2E552475%2EYQgEym)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Mark Pukita, GFI
subject: 👥 Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!
body:
Your involvement is crucial. Act swiftly to make a difference. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=34a0da8cc1&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!
---
| | | **
OHIO ELECTION INTEGRITY!
"OHIO ELECTION INTEGRITY NETWORK"
AKA "OEIN"
HOW YOU CAN TAKE ACTION!
VOLUNTEERS NEEDED!**

---
|
Are you aware there is a statewide team of volunteers working to ensure our elections are fair & accurate, conforming to all current state & federal laws?

The Ohio Election Integrity Network, or OEIN, has teams working on:

• Voter roll maintenance
• Data & technology (including machines)
• Legislation (proposed & in-effect)
• Mail-in & absentee voting
• Media & promotion
• Stopping ranked choice voting in Ohio
• Recruiting poll workers & poll observers
• The "Citizens Research Project"
• Vulnerable voters

OEIN needs more volunteers. They need your help. To do your part go to:

[ohioein.org](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6155888a95&e=5c740fa3e2)

Or, click on the image below!

Register to receive communication from them as well as volunteer. Many hands lighten the load!

If you have any questions, please contact Mark Pukita at 614-499-0599 (c) by text or call.

THANK YOU!

---
| [](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bb75d2ceae&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**THE OHIO PRECINCT STRATEGY
UNDERSTAND IT!
EMBRACE IT!
BECOME PART OF IT!**

---
|
If you haven't heard of the "Precinct Strategy" it is imperative you learn what it is and how it can be a big part of taking back our country, state, and communities from corrupt political insiders.

Ohio's political parties have an organization, codified in the Ohio Revised Code (ORC), that provides for 88 county parties and 1 state party for each of the 2 major political parties (Republican & Democrat).

Every precinct (or in some counties every ward & township) has an elected, unpaid, representative on their County Central Committee (CCC). These are the lowest-level elected offices in America, and a great way for average Americans to have an impact on how we are governed. All politics truly is local, right down to the precinct level. **And the time commitment is typically no more than a few hours a calendar quarter.**

The Ohio Precinct Strategy was formed to help Ohioans understand Ohio's political structure and identify grassroots candidates to run for these seats. The only qualification you need is to be an Ohio registered voter.

May 2026, about 2 years from now, is when more than half of Ohio's counties will have central committee elections.

If you have even a single spark of interest (or know someone else who might) please go to (or have them go to):

[https://www.ohioprecinctstrategy.org](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d57adf8d3a&e=5c740fa3e2)

Or, click on the image below!

There, you (or they) can register, find more information on filing to run, how to run and win, and what you can do once in office. We also have people across the state who can provide any help & information you might need.

If you have any questions, feel free to call or text Mark Pukita at 614-499-0599 (c) and have a chat. You can email him too: [mark@mark4ohio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=01e0815be9&e=5c740fa3e2)

THANK YOU!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=886c4f24f4&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**OHIO PARENTS ALERT!
FIX OUR PUBLIC SCHOOLS!
BECOME A BOARD MEMBER!
HERE'S HOW!**

---
|
**This section is a repeat from last week's message because we had such great success from getting the word out! 10 people stepped up to explore running for school boards in Ohio just last week! Can we make it 20 more this week?**

Next year, in November of 2025, all public school districts in Ohio will have at least 2 school board seats up for re-election, or if there is no incumbent for the seat, up for election.

We need concerned citizens who are for parental rights, a return to the basics of education, and completely depoliticizing Ohio's public schools, to run for these school board seats.

Anyone can run & there is no need for any kind of special qualifications, experience, or skills. All that's needed is a desire & common sense.

And, the Ohio School Board Constitutional Coalition (OSBCC) can help you every step of the way. 40% of the candidates they helped last election won!

If you are interested, or know someone who is, please, please, please make sure you (or they) visit the OSBCC website & register to start getting OSBCC's regular emails & training notices [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3437d325e0&e=5c740fa3e2) or by clicking on the image below

If you (or they) are anxious to start preparing to run for a school board seat, go to (or have them go to) the contact page & send OSBCC an email or fill out the contact form [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=62381dfca0&e=5c740fa3e2). The volunteers at OSBCC will get back to you to get you started off strong. It's not too early to start your campaign!

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a6cf574903&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[April 21, 2024 - 📣 Breaking: Election Integrity Lawsuit](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2fb589cbd8&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 14, 2024 - This Week's Must-Know Trio!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=60a1a12c76&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 7, 2024 - Secure American Freedoms This Week!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f3e71f93fc&e=5c740fa3e2)

[February 18, 2024 - Vote on or before March 19th!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c8505a929c&e=5c740fa3e2)

[January 14, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e4ae728139&e=5c740fa3e2)[Ohio Liberator List!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=073b48407f&e=5c740fa3e2 "URGENT! Ohio Liberator List!")

[November 9, 2023 - What now?

October 15, 2023 - Critical Volunteer Needs!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=62375d304b&e=5c740fa3e2)

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7d779a562b&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=989e7f1853&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)**
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=b16058d7bc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=b16058d7bc).

Can I count on you, Peter? = = = = What excites me most is that we now have solid proof voters are responding to our message in a major way. If we can get our message out to enough voters, this race is ours for the taking. That's where you come in, Peter. I can’t overstate the urgency of making sure every voter in North Dakota knows Cramer’s record and what he really stands for. This is our chance to strike while the momentum is on our side and deliver on the issues everyday folks care most about – but it all hinges on whether I can gather the resources to spread my message to voters. = = | = = = = = Thank you, Katrina Friends of Katrina Christiansen P.O. Florida is on the cusp of flipping blue this November — but I need your help to make sure we don’t waste this incredible opportunity. Please, will you let me explain?
[**_(If you already know that Florida is ready to flip blue, you can click here to rush a gift and help Debbie hit her critical $800,000 end-of-month goal.)_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83901342/469875426/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1153-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk1YTU4OTYtOTMwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fntZZqYNqBTz9pbftwRFfGSft_0zjoPw0BnjO_XyZ28=)
You see, activists in Florida officially secured enough signatures to put abortion rights on the ballot this November. If Florida follows states like Kansas and Ohio, this ballot initiative will pass in a landslide, restoring reproductive rights and ending the GOP’s extreme ban. And it could drive up Democratic turnout across the board, giving Debbie a critical boost.
**But that’s not all:** Democrats also won a key special election here, flipping a critical State House District from red to blue against all the odds! And, polling data shows that Debbie is polling 4 points ahead!
Listen, a blue wave is building in Florida — and our party is preparing to make historic investments to help Debbie win this race.
But we’re not the only ones investing in Florida: **Rick Scott has spent nearly $4 MILLION airing attack ads. His unprecedented spending proves that he’s terrified to lose, but it also proves Debbie needs strong, sustained investments from grassroots Democrats to win.**
That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Tonight, Debbie is up against an urgent $800,000 end-of-month goal, and she can’t hit it without a huge outpouring of grassroots support in the next few hours. [**_Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to make sure that Debbie can compete with Scott’s massive personal fortune? clean_body: | Peter, We’ve noticed that a lot fewer donations have come into Mazie’s campaign this month than usual. It caught us by surprise, especially since the 2024 election is heating up. We knew it could simply be a fluke, but we wanted to be sure nothing was wrong. So for our due diligence, we checked around with some other Democratic Senate campaigns, and it looks like we’re not alone. The verdict? Grassroots dollars for Democrats are down this month, in a big way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = With National Republicans raising eye-popping sums, this is a huge warning sign, especially since losing just one seat means our pro-choice majority will be toast. Outside groups and donors spent over $1.2 million in Hawaii’s last federal election, and we’re expecting even more this year. All of it could be used to fund attack ads against Mazie designed to muddy the waters and stop her fight for working families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

**_URGENT! URGENT! URGENT!_** [ ]() **GREAT NEWS!** President Biden is gaining on Donald Trump in critical swing state polling – he’s surging with momentum!

**BAD NEWS!** The Trump campaign is seeing the same polls we are – and seeing Biden catch up will trigger an onslaught of attacks and a wave of dark money.

We need up-to-the-minute accurate data to ensure our 2024 strategy is accurate and effective, **so we’re polling our top 10% of supporters:** _To maintain your top 10% status, respond now:_

| | Peter,

As the Executive Director of the Democratic Party of Georgia, Georgia’s always on my mind. After years working with other state parties and candidates, I'm ready to harness the momentum that sent President Biden and VP Harris to the White House and Jon Ossoff and Reverend Warnock to the Senate.

This same momentum that sent Senators Ossoff and Warnock to the Senate to represent all Georgians—in every corner of the state–is what will send Joe Biden and Kamala Harris back to the White House. _Georgians made that happen and WILL make this happen again!_

[**_As we build on those victories, establishing Democratic momentum is certainly on my mind, but this election is truly about electing officials who care about our families, our freedoms, and our futures – representatives who will actually deliver change. Will you please rush what you can ahead of our end-of-month deadline to help us do just that?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83902891/469878472/710125701?refcode=20240428.1_KO_4AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzkxYmZkMS05NjA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WZXJxsewP6vNDJ0IkGv7ZMrkiojdRbd8sMJLGKot414=) When I look into my children’s eyes, I’m reminded that they should be able to inherit a world that’s better than the one we have now. MAGA Republicans are trying to strip away their rights, and I refuse to let my kids grow up with fewer freedoms than I had growing up.

Keeping Georgia on my mind means working hard to elect those who’ll protect our environment, expand healthcare access, and enact gun safety laws—leaders who will make a better world for my children. _Will you join me?_ | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: will you? | | | Peter, As the Executive Director of the Democratic Party of Georgia, Georgia’s always on my mind. After years working with other state parties and candidates, I'm ready to harness the momentum that sent President Biden and VP Harris to the White House and Jon Ossoff and Reverend Warnock to the Senate. This same momentum that sent Senators Ossoff and Warnock to the Senate to represent all Georgians—in every corner of the state–is what will send Joe Biden and Kamala Harris back to the White House. Georgians made that happen and WILL make this happen again! = When I look into my children’s eyes, I’m reminded that they should be able to inherit a world that’s better than the one we have now. MAGA Republicans are trying to strip away their rights, and I refuse to let my kids grow up with fewer freedoms than I had growing up. Keeping Georgia on my mind means working hard to elect those who’ll protect our environment, expand healthcare access, and enact gun safety laws—leaders who will make a better world for my children. Will you join me? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = The stakes couldn’t be higher, and we need you with us. We’re in a battleground state, one of just a handful that will determine what happens this November. In 2020, Georgia went blue by just 0.23% of the votes cast, and you can BET that it’ll be just as close this year. Peter, I’ve got you on my mind. And, now, in this role, I’ve got you in my heart. Together, we’ve got this! Are you with me? – Kevin Kevin Olasanoye Executive Director Democratic Party of Georgia | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. We’ve got to show Larry Hogan and the MAGA extremists fueling his campaign that we won’t let them flip this seat and take control of the Senate.
We have to do everything in our power to stop them from imposing their draconian agenda on the American people – abolishing abortion nationwide, shredding our safety nets, and gutting our healthcare system.

I know we can do it, but not without your immediate help.

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. # [#]
We’re exactly ONE WEEK AWAY from Election Day here in Texas! Need more info on where and how to vote for the May 4th election? Click here! [https://tfn.org/resources/vote-in-texas-elections-hub/]

Peter: May the 4th is Election Day for many Texans ( possibly including you! ) and we think Star Wars is quite a fitting theme for this year’s election cycle, don’t you think?

In 2024, we’re fighting back AGAINST The Empire (MAGA extremists like Abbott, Cruz, and Paxton), and fighting FOR The Rebel Alliance (progressive leaders and change).

And we’ll NEVER turn to The Dark Side (far-right hate and attacks on our democracy).

Although we’re fully prepared to use The Force for good, we cannot get there without the support of Rebels (grassroots supporters) like you, . We have a $15k end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up to help us continue our work for progressive leaders in Texas. Can we count on you to contribute $ right now to help us reach our goal and mobilize thousands of Texans to the polls? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-apr24?amount=]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] We’re exactly ONE WEEK AWAY from Election Day here in Texas! Need more info on where and how to vote for the May 4th election? Click here! [] Peter: May the 4th is Election Day for many Texans ( possibly including you! ) and we think Star Wars is quite a fitting theme for this year’s election cycle, don’t you think? In 2024, we’re fighting back AGAINST The Empire (MAGA extremists like Abbott, Cruz, and Paxton), and fighting FOR The Rebel Alliance (progressive leaders and change). And we’ll NEVER turn to The Dark Side (far-right hate and attacks on our democracy). Although we’re fully prepared to use The Force for good, we cannot get there without the support of Rebels (grassroots supporters) like you, . We have a $15k end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up to help us continue our work for progressive leaders in Texas. Can we count on you to contribute $ right now to help us reach our goal and mobilize thousands of Texans to the polls? [=] If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. DONATE $ » [] DONATE $ » [] DONATE $ » [] DONATE $ » [] DONATE $ » [] OTHER AMOUNT » [] Here at TOP PAC, we’re dedicated to electing progressive leaders who can effectively represent ALL communities – no matter race, age, gender, or income – and voting out far-right extremists. We’ll see you at the polls, Peter! Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. We’ll cut to the chase, team:
Team: We only need to flip **four seats** to retake the House majority, and **NY-17 is one of our BEST pickup opportunities.** Election experts are calling this race a "toss-up," and for good reason.

Mike Lawler was named the **second-most vulnerable House Republican.** In 2022, Lawler squeaked by with a victory margin of just **1,820 votes.** Every vote will count this November, and we can't afford to leave anything to chance.

That’s why we’re preparing now to fight back against the millions we know will be spent to defeat Mondaire. **It’s going to take fighting back with everything we’ve got if we’re going to flip this seat and send Mondaire to Congress.**

name: John Fetterman
subject: Because I wear shorts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let’s not trivialize things...
#
Derek, remember when some folks wanted to equate Donald Trump’s insurrection to my wearing shorts in the Senate?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240428?refcode=em20240428-8953&refcode2=8953_434096_5yAF8q&akid=8953%2E434096%2E5yAF8q)
Republicans have been sharpening their knives since before I got elected about anything and everything – especially the clothes I wear to work. 🤡
**My campaign raises funds to make sure I am ready for any attack Republicans send my way when it comes time to run for reelection.**
**[My team tells me that we are going to be short of our goal this month. Will you contribute $5 or anything you can afford to help us prepare for the GOP's tomfoolery?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240428?refcode=em20240428-8953&refcode2=8953_434096_5yAF8q&akid=8953%2E434096%2E5yAF8q)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240428?amount=5&refcode=em20240428-8953&refcode2=8953_434096_5yAF8q&akid=8953%2E434096%2E5yAF8q)**
Can’t tell you how much I appreciate you!!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240428-8953-footer&t=1&refcode2=8953_434096_5yAF8q&akid=8953%2E434096%2E5yAF8q)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Republicans have been sharpening their knives since before I got elected about anything and everything – especially the clothes I wear to work. 🤡 My campaign raises funds to make sure I am ready for any attack Republicans send my way when it comes time to run for reelection. Can’t tell you how much I appreciate you!! ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

| | | Hi friend, it's Martin Sheen. As a former "acting" president of the United States, I’d like to talk about what your support could mean for the country you and I both love.

[We’re about to ask you to make a $5 donation to support Michelle Vallejo, but if you’re already on board, click here to donate. Otherwise, read on to see a breakdown of exactly what $5 will do for this campaign »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83905765/469884379/1549002450?amount=5&source=SBD_MV_EM_FR_042824_1_2_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjNmYzNlNC05YzA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ_Ozhk2AqDg9mXDY1gME-G1uTm9HSpBVQMWM47M4lw=) Hi Peter, it’s Team Vallejo. We know you probably get fundraising emails all the time asking for donations of $5, $25, $50, or more. But let us explain what your donation will fund here at Vallejo HQ. As a community-powered campaign, grassroots donations will be KEY to Michelle’s success on Election Day. They go toward our GOTV efforts, campaign literature, paying our staffers, and **yard signs**. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83905767/469884381/1549002450?source=SBD_MV_EM_FR_042824_1_2_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjNmYzNlNC05YzA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ_Ozhk2AqDg9mXDY1gME-G1uTm9HSpBVQMWM47M4lw=) Yard signs are an easy way for supporters in Texas and beyond to spread Michelle’s message AND in-district supporters get a yard sign at no cost! But with our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up on Tuesday, we need your help. Yard signs cost our campaign roughly $5, and in order to keep giving them out, we set a lofty $20K end-of-month fundraising goal to support our yard sign fund AND make sure we have all other resources to send Michelle to Washington in November. clean_body: Just $5 to sponsor one yard sign If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = = Hi Peter, it’s Team Vallejo. We know you probably get fundraising emails all the time asking for donations of $5, $25, $50, or more. But let us explain what your donation will fund here at Vallejo HQ. As a community-powered campaign, grassroots donations will be KEY to Michelle’s success on Election Day. They go toward our GOTV efforts, campaign literature, paying our staffers, and yard signs. = Yard signs are an easy way for supporters in Texas and beyond to spread Michelle’s message AND in-district supporters get a yard sign at no cost! But with our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up on Tuesday, we need your help. Yard signs cost our campaign roughly $5, and in order to keep giving them out, we set a lofty $20K end-of-month fundraising goal to support our yard sign fund AND make sure we have all other resources to send Michelle to Washington in November. = | | = | = | = | = Thank you! Our April End-of-Month deadline is coming up FAST, and we need your help to meet our goal! | I 'M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP. Look, the Radical Left is bound and determined to unseat Republicans and push Biden's Socialist Agenda down the American people's throats. We can 't have a Left-of-Lenin Neo-Socialist putting the greatest country in human history in danger. It's make-it-or-break time right now, and I know you've done so much to make sure we maintain the House majority, but I've got to have your help RIGHT NOW. Thank you for all your help in advance. name: Mayor Trent Staggs
subject: We won the Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trent Staggs for Utah
body:
Help me carry the grassroots momentum into the Primary.

| [ ](http://links.staggsforutah.org/u/click?_t=fb8e0cef758b4b539ddf02de6167734f&_m=551a4f6471e24370b169e15a2119fe5f&_e=sYBDdgRZOH0UTkjh-IRik8swLB6dmk13viNDdjrZFmXfUw414IdO4Pe5Ubbak4yjV36OROG8B31of2vk-vgJb1VcM5AlOjtP-xGF_wcmQr_PCnuBFBpVdXasyWf_M2Sbk9dkF312ZnSuDFDXFwCwvYRUUW0XvQ4iMzh8EAeOJhVJzc1E-hpDz5gN1ZK3BdNP3gexaYvNGJ36BZcyMna0KZ7KT4iTrDZcXLovewodCQ0z2jxJB07phMlvLLFgMdq2u9BdVoCjI16g2xIH0KapCZ7bClwQVL3MTzPsFPNDYiktxErKK2oi5TD6sUaXNrrNS0MrAV5NKIzCz9rCbk08nw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, we WON!

The Utah Convention is officially over, and our campaign received 69% of the vote to secure our spot on the Primary ballot to replace the RINO Mitt Romney.

**_First of all, I want to thank everyone who has supported me up until this point, but also the delegates who voted for me yesterday to advance to the Primary.

I am honored to have the endorsement of such great MAGA Patriots like President Trump, Senator Tuberville, Kari Lake, Charlie Kirk, Matt Gaetz, and Vivek Ramaswamy. We are just getting started and I am forever grateful to have you on my team. _**

I am fighting to defeat the establishment and drain the swamp. I jumped into this race to defeat the RINO Mitt Romney, and now we're one step closer to ensuring Utah has true conservative representation. We need leadership in the US Senate that will put America First and get our country back on the right track.

**As your next US Senator, I promise to Create Jobs, Stop Inflation, Grow the Economy, and Secure the Border. With a MAGA Senate majority, we will Unleash American Energy, Support our Military/Vets, and Protect our always-under-siege Second Amendment.**

**[Our country is under attack from the Radical Left, and we cannot let up now. The fight to win in November is going to be an expensive one. Please consider chipping in whatever you can, even if it's just a $1!](http://links.staggsforutah.org/u/click?_t=fb8e0cef758b4b539ddf02de6167734f&_m=551a4f6471e24370b169e15a2119fe5f&_e=sYBDdgRZOH0UTkjh-IRik8swLB6dmk13viNDdjrZFmXfUw414IdO4Pe5Ubbak4yjV36OROG8B31of2vk-vgJb1VcM5AlOjtP-xGF_wcmQr_PCnuBFBpVdXasyWf_M2Sbk9dkF312ZnSuDFDXFwCwvViqlf4XZSk_ry07f8Oxm5i0ljMV9QYMEO82lqMXNciQ5ZDJBuNseSjSQ5obxZsSAaJQyv3XNY6J3vChoMBsQxTPxKDwDpvWaSTs_aOfEbAupF05bm07zNQt5fcPgQzqxV-jL8Ke0Z9uq1kZScBj6CpnhuklAQ775lCRFsGsPx34U4RA0JYFXGMIctu7IlTk1w%3D%3D)**
| [ **KEEP MOMENTUM GOING** ](http://links.staggsforutah.org/u/click?_t=fb8e0cef758b4b539ddf02de6167734f&_m=551a4f6471e24370b169e15a2119fe5f&_e=sYBDdgRZOH0UTkjh-IRik8swLB6dmk13viNDdjrZFmXfUw414IdO4Pe5Ubbak4yjV36OROG8B31of2vk-vgJb1VcM5AlOjtP-xGF_wcmQr_PCnuBFBpVdXasyWf_M2Sbk9dkF312ZnSuDFDXFwCwvViqlf4XZSk_ry07f8Oxm5i0ljMV9QYMEO82lqMXNciQoxB5No1V0R9rYd5CZBHhiFq6dAA5EqUGsw95jx0sXxfOLxV13rVW6q9cNlwxaYmHOdJy62upfC4S1cTb1ktGkAikoHxEfy209y6a-k5cEAUweM3apeH-JB-fEtixkAu7l2YMiTq4EzjbErDxef9tDg%3D%3D)
---

I will always put Utah and this country first. It becomes more difficult without your support.

My family and I appreciate all of the support from each and every one of you.

[](http://links.staggsforutah.org/u/click?_t=fb8e0cef758b4b539ddf02de6167734f&_m=551a4f6471e24370b169e15a2119fe5f&_e=sYBDdgRZOH0UTkjh-IRik8swLB6dmk13viNDdjrZFmXfUw414IdO4Pe5Ubbak4yjV36OROG8B31of2vk-vgJb1VcM5AlOjtP-xGF_wcmQr_PCnuBFBpVdXasyWf_M2Sbk9dkF312ZnSuDFDXFwCwvYRUUW0XvQ4iMzh8EAeOJhVJzc1E-hpDz5gN1ZK3BdNPUb44EFKlQIwye_utafVkAv2vZAoi-__GDD6Q4CAWGZyk9SQDw9H5WL-UA1M6zDy1Zymsd1ArPJgIe8gO34rbvJsFcXF5RmjPzwp2VxjkHqJAhA_4udtWPqbP2UffSwMdGycM19zWgnKuBfEfEocwYg%3D%3D) | [ **Trent Staggs**

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Six crucial campaigns need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Hi there — Alexandria, Ayanna, Cori, Ilhan, Jamaal and Rashida here!
We’ll cut to the chase: [All six of us are up for re-election this year — and we have some well-funded, MAGA-backed challengers to ward off.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240428.o0AENQ&refcode=em20240428-6276-P_FND_SVF_SVF&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU)
We’ve grown so much since our Squad first got to Congress in 2018 — and our conviction to showing up as true representatives of our communities, to inform policy rooted in justice and equity, and to lead with compassion has never wavered.
**We know that, with you on our side, we’ll be able to accomplish even more in the future**. But the truth is, we need to have the resources, tools, and funding to protect our progress. And we’ll need all the support we can get if we want to keep advancing life-changing policies in Congress.
Republicans are gearing up to throw everything they have, including $100 million, to unseat our Squad this year. **But we won’t let them intimidate us into silence, or undo our hard-earned progressive wins**.
Reaching our April fundraising goal would show our opposition the true strength of our movement — and make clear that _we aren’t going anywhere_. But we can’t do this without you.
[If you stand with our Squad, will you make a $6 contribution today — $1 for each of our campaigns — to help us close the gap on our $55,000 goal and end April in the strongest position possible?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240428.o0AENQ&refcode=em20240428-6276-P_FND_SVF_SVF&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU)
**[Contribute $6](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240428.o0AENQ&refcode=em20240428-6276-P_FND_SVF_SVF&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU)**
Whether or not you can contribute today, thank you for standing with us.
Thank you,
Alexandria, Ayanna, Cori, Ilhan, Jamaal, and Rashida

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240428?refcode=em20240428-6276-P_FND_SVF_SVF&t=22&refcode2=6276_2526796_EDnpYU&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240428-6276-P_FND_SVF_SVF&t=23&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=6276%2E2526796%2EEDnpYU)

name: Biden HQ
subject: We know that $5 doesn’t seem like enough to help beat Trump. But believe us, it is.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |
---
Peter -- **$50,000,000.** That’s the total amount that Donald Trump raised from his Wall Street buddies after one campaign event. **$5.** That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make today to help Joe Biden and Kamala Harris secure another four years in the White House. We know that $5 doesn’t seem like enough to fight back against Donald Trump and all of the other outside spending groups attacking Joe Biden right now. But we’re here to tell you it is -- because it’s not just your $5. It’s $20 from Caroline, an educator in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania who also made a donation to an email just like this one. It’s another $50 from Craig, a physician in Tucson, Arizona who added his donation to support Joe Biden, too. **Now, they’re counting on you to make your first donation. Believe us, it adds up quickly when we're all chipping in. name: Elizabeth
subject: Elizabeth Helgelien’s opponents in NV-03 race refuse to debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada]( "Paid for by Elizabeth for Nevada")
body:
All of them refuse to step in the arena with me | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1f0ac38758c/elizabeth-helgeliens-opponents-in-nv-03-race-refuse-to-debate?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| | In the face of opposition, I have always stood firm in my beliefs and commitments. As the only candidate in Nevada's 3rd Congressional District who has consistently championed conservative values and President Trump’s America First agenda,[Peter I am reaching out to you directly today.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=0d00d92853&e=54a81bd33c)

While my opponents dodge debates and conceal their questionable records, I stand ready to discuss the crucial issues facing our community.

Marty O’Donnell and Dan Schwartz have outright refused to debate on KLAS Channel 8, and Drew Johnson has retreated after his false accusations against me came to light, along with his anti-Trump and anti-conservative statements and fabricated endorsements.

_**I have always been America First.**_ From supporting President Trump unwaveringly since 2015 to maintaining a 100% conservative voting record, I have been a true warrior for our cause. Yet, some so-called Republicans in this race cannot say the same. They shy away from scrutiny because their records are not truly conservative.

It's pathetic that these competitors lack the nerve to face a true conservative warrior. They know their records can't withstand real scrutiny. As your representative, I promise to fight relentlessly for our America First agenda and expose the impostors among us.

Now, more than ever, I need your support to continue this fight. [Can you contribute $50, $100, or $250 today to help ensure our voice is the strongest in this race?](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=e2d554805d&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| [Donate $50](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=406c0681f5&e=54a81bd33c "Donate $50")
---
| [Donate $100](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=233b21cd35&e=54a81bd33c "Donate $100")
---
| [Donate $250](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=75aca4806c&e=54a81bd33c "Donate $250")
---
| And while we have raised more money than any of the other candidates COMBINED, _two of my opponents are independently wealthy;_ **fueled by Woke Corporations and Chinese Communist Party controlled entities**. They are going to try to buy the race without ever talking about their real policies.

Thanks to your generous support. Let’s keep this momentum going! With endorsements from respected leaders like Senator Tommy Tuberville and Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna, our campaign is poised for success—but not without your help.

[**Join me now**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=1fc1f0bab9&e=54a81bd33c) in standing firm for conservative values in NV-03. [Every dollar you donate empowers our campaign to fight harder and speak louder against those who would see our values compromised.](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=9e608bdc51&e=54a81bd33c)

Thank you for your steadfast loyalty and support. Together, we will win this race and continue to defend our principles in Congress.
---
|
---
| **America First,

Elizabeth Helgelien**

[**ElizabethForNV.com**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=a3d0fc527d&e=54a81bd33c)

name: Rand Paul
subject: I know we can
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate<-
body:
Fellow Conservative,

All eyes are on Ohio’s Senate race this year, where my friend Bernie Moreno is taking on Washington Insider and ‘America Last’ Democrat Sherrod Brown.

\*\*Today, I’m asking you to support Bernie in his bid for Senate so we can retake the Senate Majority in November and put a stop to the madness coming out of DC.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=6099120.2631.1.d12c6dc1daac9326c81ba0f5279d2c45 )

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=6099120.2632.1.1361abddf0a0f2fcb03441b96124f9dd )<-

-> \*\*DONATE\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=6099120.2633.1.2c313998bd7b6f6744541bdaf0bb9f2f )<-

If you’re wondering why this race matters,_ I’ll tell you... _

Insider career politicians like Sherrod Brown are working overtime in D.C. to put America LAST. They care more about Ukraine than they do about our southern border.

\*\* _ Enough is enough. _

\*\*

-> \*\*STAND WITH RAND AND BERNIE\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=6099120.2634.1.6ea08c5057b479ead66d7813c16d963b )<-

Bernie Moreno is a political outsider, an America First conservative, and a fierce fighter for the American Dream. He is exactly the type of person we need to help us take back the Senate this Fall and reject the America Last agenda coming out of Washington.

\*\*There is too much at stake this year.\*\* \*\*Rush your support to help elect Bernie Moreno in Ohio and get our country back on track!\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=6099120.2635.1.013c9f7a8ee847425e4973cc81eb4cd0 )

For America,

Senator Rand Paul

->

\*\*Meet Bernie Moreno:\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=6099120.2636.1.06564186cf341e15f6d7f1e144dfd658 ) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

-> \*\* Join Bernie ➞ \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=6099120.2637.1.71c03741d4b89ec5ee7571cb8bfff78b )<-

<-

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=6099120.2627.1.0116321c0dacc701c54566aa67128189 )<-

I’ve finished writing two more petitions. Both election related, 1: Require precinct level counting with hand counting, also requires to have tabulation done asap, so we can get election results day of or next day. No more machines. 2\. We are going to modify existing absentee laws so they are only available to a limited population. The new law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Many I’ve talk to say my three pieces of Legislation below led by citizen initiative will cut down on 90% of voter fraud. Our elections will be far more Free, Fair, and Honest 1\. Repeal Jungle Primary and RCV 2\. Require Hand Counting at Precinct Level 3\. New law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Join me today and help us, we need 1\. Volunteers to help with signature gathering 2\. Advisory board members to help keep us on track 3\. People sharing our messages and get out the vote this November 5th and tell everyone you know hundreds of times to Vote Yes to Repeal. Big money millionaires and billionaires have a big target on Alaska. Our future is not for them to decide regardless of their money. Read Below

#### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
#### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_

This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=662eb8b3ae28ec3b6379e9a6&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_662eb6b5f8d5a33f392da6a5&l=en-US&s=m1psbr8p6lRJ4vlQy2Jqfd40QrM%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---

|

Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:**Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals.
** (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure.

(b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the

**I’m not the only one who’s worried about**[**#RankedChoiceVoting**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=662eb8b3ae28ec3b6379e9a6&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_662eb6b5f8d5a33f392da6a5&l=en-US&s=m1psbr8p6lRJ4vlQy2Jqfd40QrM%3D)**impact on vulnerable voters** Washington Secretary of State Steve Hobbs (Democrat) to discuss his opposition to RCV. Here is what Secretary Hobbs told us: “Ranked-choice voting adds a layer of complexity to voting that threatens to disenfranchise people who aren’t experts at the process. This includes people living with developmental disabilities – such as my son – for whom choosing one candidate is more straightforward than figuring out how to rank a list of them. Additionally, it can be a challenge for newly-naturalized citizens to adapt to American elections. Converting some elections to ranked-choice voting would increase the obstacles to exercising their rights as Americans. Top-two primaries present none of these challenges. You pick your favorite, then you send in your ballot. That’s something people can easily grasp. I stand firmly behind Top Two and encourage other states to learn from our usage of it.” Secretary Hobbs also recently told Crosscut: “Oh, I have lots of feelings about ranked-choice voting. I’m completely against ranked-choice voting; I used to be for it. But when you occupy this office, you have to take a step back and look at how elections affect everyone. Right? You know, the top three things, transparency, accessibility and security is what I look at. And then just with my own personal situation, my mom came to this country, she didn’t know any English. You know, we both learned by watching Sesame Street. And then my middle son is a child with special needs. So imagine, if you will, a naturalized citizen where English is not their first language, receiving a ballot, where they have to vote by ranked choice? How are they going to do that? They don’t know how to do that . . . And that’s why I am no longer for ranked-choice voting because you will disenfranchise people. They will not take full advantage of their vote because they don’t understand what they’re doing.”
---
---
|
---
**Overview of Election Types and Systems** The recent elections comprised various types, including Special Primary, Special General, Regular Primary, and Regular General elections. Each election type presented its own set of rules and systems. Notably, both the Special General Election and the Regular Primary occurred simultaneously. The Special General employed a Top 4 Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) system, whereas the Regular Primary followed a simpler system where voters were to select just one candidate. Complexity of Simultaneous Elections The concurrent scheduling of the Special General Election (using a Top 4 RCV system) and the Regular Primary (select one candidate system) undoubtedly introduced complexities. Voters received a single ballot that included both election types, potentially leading to significant confusion. This complexity was especially pronounced because the instructions for the Regular Primary (to choose one candidate) could easily be mistaken as applicable to the Special General Election as well. Voter Confusion and Election Outcomes The confusion among voters is highlighted by the election outcomes. In the Special General, a Democrat secured victory with 75,000 votes, despite Republican candidates collectively garnering 112,000 votes. This result suggests a significant portion of voters may have followed the Regular Primary’s instructions, opting to vote for only one candidate in the Special General as well. Such a scenario would inadvertently skew the effectiveness of the RCV system, where ranking multiple candidates is crucial. Introduction of Ranked Choice Voting Adding to the electoral confusion was the introduction of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) for Alaskans. As their first experience with RCV, many voters were unfamiliar with its mechanisms, which require voters to rank candidates by preference. The presence of both a new voting system and dual election types on the same ballot likely contributed to unintended voting behaviors and unexpected election results. Implications and Reflections The overlap of different voting instructions and the debut of RCV evidently had a profound impact on voter behavior and the election’s outcome. This scenario underscores the need for clear communication and voter education, particularly when implementing new voting technologies or systems. Ensuring that voters are well-informed and understand the distinctions between concurrent elections is crucial for the integrity and accuracy of electoral processes.

Both election related, 1: Require precinct level counting with hand counting, also requires to have tabulation done asap, so we can get election results day of or next day. No more machines. 2\. We are going to modify existing absentee laws so they are only available to a limited population. The new law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Many I’ve talk to say my three pieces of Legislation below led by citizen initiative will cut down on 90% of voter fraud. Our elections will be far more Free, Fair, and Honest 1\. Repeal Jungle Primary and RCV 2\. Require Hand Counting at Precinct Level 3\. New law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Join me today and help us, we need 1\. Volunteers to help with signature gathering 2\. Advisory board members to help keep us on track 3\. People sharing our messages and get out the vote this November 5th and tell everyone you know hundreds of times to Vote Yes to Repeal. Big money millionaires and billionaires have a big target on Alaska. Our future is not for them to decide regardless of their money. Read Below Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter. The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets. Their new Incorporation is their top donor. Then "Article Four from Virginia" Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C." This is who is funding the group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,” | Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes. Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals. (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure. (b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the | | When Other State’s GOP are more helpful than Alaska’s GOP, makes me wonder if our efforts would be more appreciated in other States... Seems To Be The Case | | | | Who’s Team are You on? Team Alaska or Team Soros WE DID IT!!!, We are in Scott Presler might be coming to Alaska to help us GOTV for our Repeal of Rank Choice Voting | | | | I’m not the only one who’s worried about on vulnerable voters Washington Secretary of State Steve Hobbs (Democrat) to discuss his opposition to RCV. Here is what Secretary Hobbs told us: “Ranked-choice voting adds a layer of complexity to voting that threatens to disenfranchise people who aren’t experts at the process. This includes people living with developmental disabilities – such as my son – for whom choosing one candidate is more straightforward than figuring out how to rank a list of them. Additionally, it can be a challenge for newly-naturalized citizens to adapt to American elections. Converting some elections to ranked-choice voting would increase the obstacles to exercising their rights as Americans. Top-two primaries present none of these challenges. You pick your favorite, then you send in your ballot. That’s something people can easily grasp. I stand firmly behind Top Two and encourage other states to learn from our usage of it.” Secretary Hobbs also recently told Crosscut: “Oh, I have lots of feelings about ranked-choice voting. I’m completely against ranked-choice voting; I used to be for it. But when you occupy this office, you have to take a step back and look at how elections affect everyone. Right? You know, the top three things, transparency, accessibility and security is what I look at. And then just with my own personal situation, my mom came to this country, she didn’t know any English. You know, we both learned by watching Sesame Street. And then my middle son is a child with special needs. So imagine, if you will, a naturalized citizen where English is not their first language, receiving a ballot, where they have to vote by ranked choice? How are they going to do that? They don’t know how to do that . . . And that’s why I am no longer for ranked-choice voting because you will disenfranchise people. They will not take full advantage of their vote because they don’t understand what they’re doing.” | Overview of Election Types and Systems The recent elections comprised various types, including Special Primary, Special General, Regular Primary, and Regular General elections. Each election type presented its own set of rules and systems. Notably, both the Special General Election and the Regular Primary occurred simultaneously. The Special General employed a Top 4 Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) system, whereas the Regular Primary followed a simpler system where voters were to select just one candidate. Complexity of Simultaneous Elections The concurrent scheduling of the Special General Election (using a Top 4 RCV system) and the Regular Primary (select one candidate system) undoubtedly introduced complexities. Voters received a single ballot that included both election types, potentially leading to significant confusion. This complexity was especially pronounced because the instructions for the Regular Primary (to choose one candidate) could easily be mistaken as applicable to the Special General Election as well. Voter Confusion and Election Outcomes The confusion among voters is highlighted by the election outcomes. In the Special General, a Democrat secured victory with 75,000 votes, despite Republican candidates collectively garnering 112,000 votes. This result suggests a significant portion of voters may have followed the Regular Primary’s instructions, opting to vote for only one candidate in the Special General as well. Such a scenario would inadvertently skew the effectiveness of the RCV system, where ranking multiple candidates is crucial. Introduction of Ranked Choice Voting Adding to the electoral confusion was the introduction of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) for Alaskans. As their first experience with RCV, many voters were unfamiliar with its mechanisms, which require voters to rank candidates by preference. The presence of both a new voting system and dual election types on the same ballot likely contributed to unintended voting behaviors and unexpected election results. Implications and Reflections The overlap of different voting instructions and the debut of RCV evidently had a profound impact on voter behavior and the election’s outcome. This scenario underscores the need for clear communication and voter education, particularly when implementing new voting technologies or systems. Ensuring that voters are well-informed and understand the distinctions between concurrent elections is crucial for the integrity and accuracy of electoral processes. | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | This Communication Was Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message. The Top 3 Contributors Are Phillip Izon, Wasilla, AK, Art Mathias, Anchorage, AK, ; And Ranked Choice Education Association, Anchorage, AK | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Alaskans For Honest Elections 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla United States

Fellow Patriot,

We need your feedback on an urgent threat to freedom that is taking place on college campuses nationwide.

Leftist administrators are pushing a radical, woke agenda on our children and grandchildren. Yet, students have never been more eager to hear your conservative values of individual freedom, a strong national defense, free enterprise, and traditional values.

But thanks to increasing censorship by college administrators, students often can't hear your conservative ideas. Many students seeking to learn conservative ideas face leftist bullying, harassment, and discrimination.

Worse still, colleges and universities are now providing safe havens for radical Jihadist sympathizers and their hate-America ideologies.

That's why I am looking for 100 people today to share their thoughts on the current state of higher education.

Your response right now will help raise awareness about what everyday Americans think about the woke policies sweeping through higher education before it is too late.

Click here to take our short, five-question _State of Higher Education Survey_ : **[https://yaf.org/offers/2024-state-of-higher-education-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1d7c41a5f6334927887be0824fd77d3a&_e=_s8xpaMUtPITlJmdYIZzYCoUupvo5WkntTc1PhG2Orc9ZKTwSCbA1K2HUaPhvnuR7dn_06qNBjwNnW3VOKbOb1wYR4cQSj8NeLGPVgNPmDfXKQzcFbYii4NginIFeQGm870IVtj4X3X-oYsKsJqiXL6TcjkSYePw5xrWmQtfwTUQxYaVE9bs-BZyHZAQmZDhkWfM1vpfjcjgABdhCyh3CtczYiuE1INQ_aTPtR81T27a_t8rSxUOrQ1xQfJLC3JfGqQD_G_SvoIwpM8vMBg0cxXp91JU6_l_ye5mVnZPVjmlZy9VAGXI1wC_Uf5k1cuwRIJcozdMmRhDBv-MI_pAmhS_B13o92q4kJ1ianwkTESJ2REhlVVm3r4CKDqpSrqpSzZk8zSw_f_7RWK4JZ9y1A%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing for freedom.

Governor Scott Walker
**President of Young America 's Foundation**

clean_body: Before I return to Congress this week | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Friend, Sorry to bother you on a Sunday! I was scrolling the headlines while enjoying my morning coffee, so I thought I’d reach out quickly. The truth is, I’ve got the Sunday scaries, friend. It's not because I’m dreading Monday — it’s because the House returns from recess this week, and I’m sick of the chaos from MAGA Republicans. The reality is, my job these days is constant. When I’m not on the floor of the House, I’m fighting tooth-and-nail to help my Democratic colleagues flip the House this November. So whatever chaos happens this coming week, I know that there is one way to help get rid of my Sunday scaries: ensuring my team can reach our EOM deadline in just 48 hours. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Don’t let the Sunday scaries catch up to us in November, friend! — Eric | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! name: Sherrod (personal)
subject: I’m a fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks, my motto has always been that when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. That's what I'm doing every day in the Senate.

**I'm fighting for the Dignity of Work.** No matter where you're from or what kind of work you do, hard work should pay off for everyone. Whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I'll fight for you.

**I'm fighting for accountability.** For years, we've seen corporations lobby for tax breaks and bad trade deals that hurt workers. I'm not afraid to stand up to Wall Street or take on Big Pharma to level the playing field.

**I'm fighting for our fundamental rights.** My opponent has made it clear he doesn’t have our best interests at heart. I will always fight for a more equal and inclusive country.

**But here's the deal:** I need you to fight with me. I'm facing my toughest race yet, and polls show me neck and neck with my Trump-backed opponent. He’s spending millions of dollars to flip this seat and the Senate red, and I can't fight back without your help.

[I need to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to fight back, and I'm counting on your grassroots support to get there. Please, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to help me win in Ohio, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and keep fighting for you in the Senate?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66369?t=6&akid=13964%2E878179%2Ez3vaZL) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66370?t=7&akid=13964%2E878179%2Ez3vaZL)

Thank you.

– Sherrod

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13964%2E878179%2Ez3vaZL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13964%2E878179%2Ez3vaZL).**

clean_body: Democratic pro-choice women are counting on our support month after month | = Peter, as our team prepares to close the books on this month, we're reflecting on all the ways our millions-strong community has shown up to support Democratic pro-choice women this critical election year. Here's what we put together for you, Peter: RECURRING SUPPORTER RECORD Prepared for: dpwillis67@gmail.com Recurring Donor Status: Our records indicate that you are not a recurring donor. = Deadline: Tuesday, April 30 at 11:59 p.m. | = = There's a lot of work to do and a lot at stake in the six months ahead. That's exactly why this community is rallying to hit our big $125,000 End-of-Month goal: so that Democratic pro-choice women know they can count on our support month after month. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, Callie Fines (she/her/hers) Chief Financial Officer, EMILYs List EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
