| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=25a06a047e084348aa71d10eed2ad374&_e=PkMYC2yjrQXjkBOP88MoJZDNzBrrRqiKVbIVrdG5BTq7Zpgrb3hAkZF6K1bs0nMVtR7v7o3dqz1yACi59rLY1oUuZt9QJpgbueEyujiBozxK1JSsuR29azDU8q8NGnev-yOMqjhst7tO7WO3-TnaBWkvMdEKapbz8nJlkfL9bXEeQqPcJUX4U8lG-fkU14PfUSc3Ly887fXAnemrqBtaWMLO62m8_5a0E3sMIdM0s-g20QM9b0Rw-OazeirxBjIFIRPj3FEcY4oFScYcMrTwm-OyI4WYgk1R72V0nvYdrvimVWyo5upnMLSk6sLnYSC1Y9Uzc-IrzC6_vppD0OF_CATF_eZNDLFJTPtUDlmrF8f0SHDQdn8k2VhMRFRXF5GS-bJ5X7uVpClzeACUmfQO7Q%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=25a06a047e084348aa71d10eed2ad374&_e=PkMYC2yjrQXjkBOP88MoJZDNzBrrRqiKVbIVrdG5BTq7Zpgrb3hAkZF6K1bs0nMVtR7v7o3dqz1yACi59rLY1oUuZt9QJpgbueEyujiBozxK1JSsuR29azDU8q8NGnev-yOMqjhst7tO7WO3-TnaBWkvMdEKapbz8nJlkfL9bXEeQqPcJUX4U8lG-fkU14PfUSc3Ly887fXAnemrqBtaWMLO62m8_5a0E3sMIdM0s-i3PrQV7A8qtE_463QbeoOBZFG06_gNRtZjWFM_OdNhGuQ9ymhhRNgIy7QDXWwhZiO6jXutGCT0xnWqf9mMQY1S7uC4yijqUDyCecbiDbUpex4VZ0l1lImL2B2U3iGPqMBTxrJBTBXmJ7rfpHPiczVrqmC-APoWbSxViv6f3nD8Jw%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you. | | | As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails **** |

Fellow American,

**I’m glad that you opened this email, but this needs to be kept a secret between us.**

**I’m behind my next major fundraising deadline, even though President Trump just endorsed me. This is not good. How did we get to this point?**

**FIRST:** I launched my campaign to flip PA-08 red and fire Matt Cartwright, who is backed by Joe Biden. Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left Woke Money Machine. I want to empower my community and stand up for the little guy, and that means standing up to career politicians like Matt Cartwright, who has lied countless times to Americans and sided with Nancy Pelosi 100 percent of the time in Congress. Cartwright snuck by with victories in 2016 and 2020 despite President Trump winning in PA-08 both times.

**THEN:** President Trump endorsed me, noting the difference between my opponent and me, “Rob worked hard to Create Jobs and Grow the Economy, unlike his opponent, Matt Cartwright, who is completely beholden to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.” Speaker Johnson, Steve Scalise, Elise Stefanik, Tom Emmer, and countless others also endorsed me.

**NOW:** [**I’m asking you to endorse me and to chip in a donation of whatever you can afford.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=c4c8f645df3f411c9c7850f56c8f4d43&_e=nHzVJshpkqV82t3FWLP2nKyIxOI9wDi_26L65UAz8LV4U9sGV0DjfuaYaTQz02q0vpEZqo6vTGPYgJahjG1xE6vbNUODZiZDIVIY3PZAJ265boFEnKtgrMCXIRdEAIubgdUSzaAqdrjZ3LNEb6qRWobl2WlWLHT9G3ai1OMujxyzCQLjei0j8Slp93r1mMa6tJEJbXjLmyPF8dUJrd14-MjPuuRSg_qd9If5FVnoiyU5zak0R3bxn9aKQbN9ChKaaWnPOrGi5vN9PszuFdRTkqKHpgAfWTwDEzq5UVnRguUlPnpuYiqtxEInrf07PCvZddHi-yJ0MEHKzpAc32psyfdj4l15OHPrrUWtI7j20AplaCCY1mk4gUyUkm7oT_YkCGEyqbvw7Hi8ppgPTL42Kz66ZX5-aFfD9LWzkeGIkg4%3D) It may not seem like much, but having a strong flow of grassroots donors and supporters will help me finally unseat Cartwright, expand our House Majority, and give President Trump one more much-needed ally in Congress when we win on November 5. This is only achievable if we meet our fundraising goals, and it starts with my next major deadline. Help me catch up.

**President Trump endorsed me because he knows I’ll fight hard to Secure the Border, Cut Wasteful Spending, Strengthen our Military, Support our Veterans, Protect our Second Amendment, and Hold Joe Biden and his Thugs accountable for their Unconstitutional Lawfare, Corruption, and Election Interference.**

If you care about any or all of those issues, then you should care about supporting my campaign, even if you’re not within the PA-08 boundary lines. This race is about more than just Northeastern PA; it’s about the future of our country.

[**So, I’m humbly asking you to co-endorse me with President Trump by contributing whatever you can afford and helping me catch up on my next major fundraising deadline.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=c4c8f645df3f411c9c7850f56c8f4d43&_e=nHzVJshpkqV82t3FWLP2nKyIxOI9wDi_26L65UAz8LV4U9sGV0DjfuaYaTQz02q0vpEZqo6vTGPYgJahjG1xE6vbNUODZiZDIVIY3PZAJ265boFEnKtgrMCXIRdEAIubgdUSzaAqdrjZ3LNEb6qRWobl2WlWLHT9G3ai1OMujxyzCQLjei0j8Slp93r1mMa6tJEJbXjLmyPF8dUJrd14-MjPuuRSg_qd9If5FVnoiyU5zak0R3bxn9aKQbN9ChKafz2OvoR7c4L2uZ63O3r78_-TpAXfOtAZIHm4lC8xQXJp_cx2TPbWzcNpwR_C67GYi2TingzC3BtFCsZbsC9EipZD7mCT3Zb43bzGkOiqDMD78EKite2-zrOukd-iRNOmhK9ni_joaN1gq1hyWCJVRAuOerDooLOtVh4Sjwgg--c%3D)

clean_body: Don’t open this if you can’t keep a secret | Fellow American, I’m glad that you opened this email, but this needs to be kept a secret between us. I’m behind my next major fundraising deadline, even though President Trump just endorsed me. This is not good. How did we get to this point? FIRST: I launched my campaign to flip PA-08 red and fire Matt Cartwright, who is backed by Joe Biden. Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left Woke Money Machine. I want to empower my community and stand up for the little guy, and that means standing up to career politicians like Matt Cartwright, who has lied countless times to Americans and sided with Nancy Pelosi 100 percent of the time in Congress. Cartwright snuck by with victories in 2016 and 2020 despite President Trump winning in PA-08 both times. THEN: President Trump endorsed me, noting the difference between my opponent and me, “Rob worked hard to Create Jobs and Grow the Economy, unlike his opponent, Matt Cartwright, who is completely beholden to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.” Speaker Johnson, Steve Scalise, Elise Stefanik, Tom Emmer, and countless others also endorsed me. NOW: It may not seem like much, but having a strong flow of grassroots donors and supporters will help me finally unseat Cartwright, expand our House Majority, and give President Trump one more much-needed ally in Congress when we win on November 5. This is only achievable if we meet our fundraising goals, and it starts with my next major deadline. Help me catch up. President Trump endorsed me because he knows I’ll fight hard to Secure the Border, Cut Wasteful Spending, Strengthen our Military, Support our Veterans, Protect our Second Amendment, and Hold Joe Biden and his Thugs accountable for their Unconstitutional Lawfare, Corruption, and Election Interference. If you care about any or all of those issues, then you should care about supporting my campaign, even if you’re not within the PA-08 boundary lines. This race is about more than just Northeastern PA; it’s about the future of our country. Thanks for charging⚡️ my campaign, | Meet Rob Bresnahan: A fifth-generation Northeastern Pennslyvanian, Rob Bresnahan took the reins of his grandfather's union electrical contracting company at age 19 and expanded the business across the commonwealth while tripling the number of good-paying union careers they provided to Pennsylvanians. Rob is focused on facing challenges head on to solve problems. That's why he's running for United States Congress. Rob is committed to bringing people together and is uniquely qualified to send a jolt of energy through Congress and deliver results for everyone here in Northeastern Pennsylvania. body:
I understand if some may overlook this message

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a740bb81cea4a65ad31bede96bd7ae6&_e=iQpwgA8FL5tIxwGE3_V3_2kBXfz0OFl3Sjf-BMH9iM92UmaKi2077VcCR10eqQzlnbWd8M5SXaTTCfMXJf1meM0EoaL0at9jYS2xyIP8EVQ_nRb58hrK0LADDBpkrTzhJv7txhrStO_EwO-K25PKCm671aNwhQWapTE8wvY2N8xUxiq9QwWoilgAHYVv_sMeAORrxzWmMNlOSIEOM0qXEhJD9gzoyPgs0fk3mUlNlfLdxTopHV6b-Na-6Wi738Lp805SGdmwaycpYm6dm41C0jP04I8jQi6qGtjYPhO4tyh574DEEVyJ4N4oibKmu6VCVS5MZVYxE4b-vcNBcIj1rRvFFKpWFV8kevNhZEosXBUd1UFJR19Td7hFnifyJz8p6rC0TwR5qx8w6NMH3hsBqtr7bmuMqxjRn0ShbSqrv1k%3D)

Fellow American,

Thank you for opening this email. In a world where political noise drowns out the voices of hard working Americans like us, **your attention means everything.**

**Did you know that only a fraction of supporters open these emails, and even fewer take action?** Yet, it's individuals like you and me, who understand the challenges our communities face who hold the power to make a difference.

Please read this email through to the end. Your engagement could be the difference-maker. And if, after reading, you're unable to contribute, know that your support in spirit is equally valued.

I'm committed to ensuring that everyday Americans like us fuel our conservative values.

**[Imagine the impact if everyone who opened this email donated just $1](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a740bb81cea4a65ad31bede96bd7ae6&_e=iQpwgA8FL5tIxwGE3_V3_2kBXfz0OFl3Sjf-BMH9iM92UmaKi2077VcCR10eqQzlnbWd8M5SXaTTCfMXJf1meM0EoaL0at9jYS2xyIP8EVQ_nRb58hrK0LADDBpkrTzhJv7txhrStO_EwO-K25PKCm671aNwhQWapTE8wvY2N8xUxiq9QwWoilgAHYVv_sMeAORrxzWmMNlOSIEOM0qXEhJD9gzoyPgs0fk3mUlNlfLdxTopHV6b-Na-6Wi738LpHwRPGGyww2OysXqVtNjVFM7dss6TUEBIyCACErSrvG3O4Tibm3sTLnSxqbk-drk4WVbiuTogugDOmOu6WiF_QpTB7ag-vLVC8f14VVxhnzQABIs-GEWFkxxL7UZ18XJfhMvbYKDQbDOP485vv9ORvzRSHqG4rfmodjgde-fG-n0%3D)** – a single dollar. With your support, we can surpass all of our goals and make a real difference.

I've witnessed the decline of American manufacturing and the struggles of hardworking families like mine. Despite the challenges, my grandmother, **Mamaw** , was my rock, guiding me with her tough love and unwavering faith.

Mamaw's tough love and unwavering faith shaped my character, instilling values of hard work, perseverance, and family. Despite challenges, her belief in the American dream inspired me to strive for a better future. **Today, as a U.S. Senator for Ohio, I honor Mamaw's legacy by fighting for hardworking families and ensuring opportunities for all Ohioans.**

I've dedicated myself to rebuilding our communities. Now, **[I'm taking action to make a difference and will ask that you join me.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a740bb81cea4a65ad31bede96bd7ae6&_e=iQpwgA8FL5tIxwGE3_V3_2kBXfz0OFl3Sjf-BMH9iM92UmaKi2077VcCR10eqQzlnbWd8M5SXaTTCfMXJf1meM0EoaL0at9jYS2xyIP8EVQ_nRb58hrK0LADDBpkrTzhJv7txhrStO_EwO-K25PKCm671aNwhQWapTE8wvY2N8xUxiq9QwWoilgAHYVv_sMeAORrxzWmMNlOSIEOM0qXEhJD9gzoyPgs0fk3mUlNlfLdxTopHV6b-Na-6Wi738LpnO1Zlw6CyE1pizZ-40e1nqaNjWDB2nUAZc5i8CR_XyWTiWNlVjzezXpUisnRGEfIR03SOBRhIH8met2qL8BkoH23A9gRLYA4J5d9C0c9_jmjN7pYLmMXhrWoP6VkgFVqHlCn3oiel3-FBRSWL5F_SxlMsfGNb-PqrDauPV6S7w0%3D)**

| [**CHIP IN $1**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a740bb81cea4a65ad31bede96bd7ae6&_e=iQpwgA8FL5tIxwGE3_V3_2kBXfz0OFl3Sjf-BMH9iM92UmaKi2077VcCR10eqQzlnbWd8M5SXaTTCfMXJf1meM0EoaL0at9jYS2xyIP8EVQ_nRb58hrK0LADDBpkrTzhJv7txhrStO_EwO-K25PKCm671aNwhQWapTE8wvY2N8xUxiq9QwWoilgAHYVv_sMeAORrxzWmMNlOSIEOM0qXEpVFxXTnlWeWR27ST-am6msPFUnSSX5Gtc-eSYY-jsTkJLifn-KBzMlZCmhmW-5e7p6VADBFIQKRhmJvWRMc8ljQ60aizGS3HWLhXaWgvWf-xK108PnkAvanH_2l0NG61tcXCjeD6AGqF1XD5IyxewX3Pr7xrSoWbXDCBYiHONB_xxlCkJvcHzGhsd6boFTJxXdaYuApRhen6HVQULYjRy8%3D)

[**FLIP THE SENATE**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a740bb81cea4a65ad31bede96bd7ae6&_e=iQpwgA8FL5tIxwGE3_V3_2kBXfz0OFl3Sjf-BMH9iM92UmaKi2077VcCR10eqQzlnbWd8M5SXaTTCfMXJf1meM0EoaL0at9jYS2xyIP8EVQ_nRb58hrK0LADDBpkrTzhJv7txhrStO_EwO-K25PKCm671aNwhQWapTE8wvY2N8xUxiq9QwWoilgAHYVv_sMeAORrxzWmMNlOSIEOM0qXEpVFxXTnlWeWR27ST-am6msPFUnSSX5Gtc-eSYY-jsTk85dFgFysSEgsr5Xqu23cI3hXcWhek8V08xC31LewkGMPXvcHtCDqizsaLow0kMW4cKvxwv-zeVhPBPVeZ-p-WhYKQeayitwCGwnzbM7ruuLxQ2qFnkhP4WoUZO0aWBPhr_l2NTKiNFBR-pHlsd3BpbuDnlcmKG6fMS3IeQiMglc%3D)

The opposition hopes we'll lose faith – in ourselves and in the future of our region. But I refuse to give up, and I know you won't either. Our shared heritage and the unique fabric of our American spirit are worth preserving.

I understand if some may overlook this message. But for those who recognize the urgency of our cause, your support is invaluable. If you believe, as I do, that it's time to reclaim our voice and rebuild our communities, **[please consider making a donation before midnight.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6a740bb81cea4a65ad31bede96bd7ae6&_e=iQpwgA8FL5tIxwGE3_V3_2kBXfz0OFl3Sjf-BMH9iM92UmaKi2077VcCR10eqQzlnbWd8M5SXaTTCfMXJf1meM0EoaL0at9jYS2xyIP8EVQ_nRb58hrK0LADDBpkrTzhJv7txhrStO_EwO-K25PKCm671aNwhQWapTE8wvY2N8xUxiq9QwWoilgAHYVv_sMeAORrxzWmMNlOSIEOM0qXEhJD9gzoyPgs0fk3mUlNlfLdxTopHV6b-Na-6Wi738LpojSed09K-cJgV9uMfsc5WXNDeJ0wSG1q_AI_863F-6J8XlXTr_HzAznOPUyuYK4xc1jDRn-rzIzJ0VABMAEPC3DlnkQCccymqLajRKp1Us6DT2bsF1yQx4XWHr7pAom8skcvuK7gsd2YwnuTyWMcYOELlK8mRo6DceWC9vasPVQ%3D)**

Thank you for standing shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight.

Sincerely,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.

## Disasters Briefs
Disaster Briefs are your weekly (or more often, if needed) summaries and headlines from around the world about natural and man-made disasters, climate change, and international conflict.
### Meteorological
Tornadoes in the Midwest United States devastated multiple communities from Texas northward toward South Dakota during the weekend. At least four people were killed in Oklahoma Sunday, April 28. More than 100 people were hospitalized across the state from Sunday's severe weather. On Friday, the National Weather Service logged 95 reports of tornadoes in the region over a 24-hour period.
African dust carried northward turned the skies of Athens orange this week. The strong southerly winds over the past few days have also fanned unseasonal early wildfires in the country's south. The fire service said Tuesday evening that a total 25 wildfires broke out across the country in the past 24 hours. [Read more.](https://substack.com/redirect/0544023e-fd13-492c-bdd2-887594a1ac0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
At least five people were killed in a tornado Sunday in Guangzhou, China when it leveled large areas of the city's manufacturing district, damaging 141 factory buildings. [Read more.](https://substack.com/redirect/0efb7f21-8e51-44b1-bb0d-769451952867?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Devastating floods during Kenya's rainy season, aggravated by climate change, have killed at least 38 people and displaced thousands as rivers burst their banks and inundated low-income neighborhoods. [Read more.](https://substack.com/redirect/b2285842-4745-4301-8c51-1ddc5ba6393f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Security was tight around a military base in southwestern Cambodia on Sunday, a day after a large munitions explosion killed 20 soldiers, wounded others and damaged nearby houses. Cambodia, like many countries in the region, has been suffering from an extended heat wave, and the province where the blast took place registered a high of 102 F on Saturday. While high temperatures normally can't detonate ammunition, they can degrade the stability of explosives over a period of time, with the risk that a single small explosion can set off a fire and a chain reaction.
Record rainfall in Dubai led to widespread flooding in the United Arab Emirates. The nation's most populous city recorded more than a year's worth of rain in under 12 hours, while surrounding areas logged more than two year's worth of rain. Rainfall up to 10 inches flooded much of the area, and was [still visible via satellite two days later](https://substack.com/redirect/032af94c-c325-4b0c-8207-c8c6411f6fd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The same system flooded parts of neighboring Oman, killing at least 17 people in a series of flash floods. ...

The last thing we need is more MAGA extremism in the House — but both have a real shot of winning. subject: You Don’t Know Real Hunger… Keep It That Way.
body:
Fight food insecurity with long-term emergency food. Get your kit for $50 OFF!
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtSgzAYhZ_mZ1cmnARCF1m0dnBRx9GFly5DEmwcIjQBmb6901rd_pfvfHN0GHvfnRXJLQFHbxMBxDcEnA5LiPNn2N-vXg_v29WpegzlZYs7Aqbz6P5Pb5TcBe37y1TuMqt4Z5nInCpkIbhAVfHsqFCzsizs2hnBtNCt5K6t2hqFq4zrjM28AoNgAjVQSIFc12sGY0to3UJ3jgS75uQ6uOiNLtK06BiHIeRmCFmvjtM0pqtYQ2iWOORfs-ndnH7fzBAIzU2Z0HwTmueX6S2d9mkOxJtrC3z35HabVI7yIYvKjovve58qSYJ9_GF-AgAA__8LPWF9)

# **Have you ever experienced true, gnawing hunger?**
In our modern world with all its abundance and options, most people haven't. They’re used to having long-term food security bolstered by supply chains, fast food, delivery apps, and chain restaurants. Some have never even missed a meal. But what if they had to? What if disaster were to strike tomorrow, leaving thousands of Americans without access to food? Most couldn't go even a few days without food, let alone a week. They lack the resources, know-how, and preparation to be able to feed themselves or their families. Sadly, many would go hungry. Some might even starve. Would you? Don't wait to find out.

Don't be like the unprepared, who rely on delicate systems to feed them. They aren't ready for what's coming next and are even less prepared to do the hard work to find food after a crisis.

[The time to start preparing is now.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFuszAQBp9muYHMejHhwOHPH9FDpR6r5lRtwE7c2rJjO0K8fUVU9To72m_YR2fNNkJ_BMSbXTIggvwHiPfz6tPjy7--1O_nj2N9V2--26_4HxDLFvWf-vul0Z6t22l_qpZRmkVQpce2b0kSKiWr2zgo0xL1HTPhrIiGob2w6g6IUqgWRWVHFEiC8IDY9oQNHwaB89Ih8wXZaCDx3GnY62RnbnNZOaUQfDMHX7nxVkrMz7AJcPJb5JJsKPkRo9t2B3CKfNUZcMpRz5ZdHYzRCeT0KP7TLiBPtH53IhgDqHZWdPIgT4Jq7Os9sErjElfrnM2qBxLXZ9Ic_E8AAAD__yFFZk4) When groceries are picked over, looted, or permanently closed, they will be scrounging around for scraps while you enjoy the fruits of your labor. They will be left trying to forage or hunt for the first time—competing with thousands of others—while you enjoy your stockpile. As the old saying goes, “an ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure.” Those who prepare are setting themselves up for success, no matter what comes next. They will be ready to put food on the table for themselves and their families during times of famine, conflict, supply chain disruptions, and more. [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFuszAQBp9muYHMejHhwOHPH9FDpR6r5lRtwE7c2rJjO0K8fUVU9To72m_YR2fNNkJ_BMSbXTIggvwHiPfz6tPjy7--1O_nj2N9V2--26_4HxDLFvWf-vul0Z6t22l_qpZRmkVQpce2b0kSKiWr2zgo0xL1HTPhrIiGob2w6g6IUqgWRWVHFEiC8IDY9oQNHwaB89Ih8wXZaCDx3GnY62RnbnNZOaUQfDMHX7nxVkrMz7AJcPJb5JJsKPkRo9t2B3CKfNUZcMpRz5ZdHYzRCeT0KP7TLiBPtH53IhgDqHZWdPIgT4Jq7Os9sErjElfrnM2qBxLXZ9Ic_E8AAAD__yFFZk4) There is no better time to get ready for what's coming next. [**My Patriot Supply**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFuszAQBp9muYHMejHhwOHPH9FDpR6r5lRtwE7c2rJjO0K8fUVU9To72m_YR2fNNkJ_BMSbXTIggvwHiPfz6tPjy7--1O_nj2N9V2--26_4HxDLFvWf-vul0Z6t22l_qpZRmkVQpce2b0kSKiWr2zgo0xL1HTPhrIiGob2w6g6IUqgWRWVHFEiC8IDY9oQNHwaB89Ih8wXZaCDx3GnY62RnbnNZOaUQfDMHX7nxVkrMz7AJcPJb5JJsKPkRo9t2B3CKfNUZcMpRz5ZdHYzRCeT0KP7TLiBPtH53IhgDqHZWdPIgT4Jq7Os9sErjElfrnM2qBxLXZ9Ic_E8AAAD__yFFZk4) is here to ensure that you, and _millions_ of other families, are prepared for the worst. **My Patriot Supply** are the experts in emergency preparedness. They have streamlined and perfected the path to securing your peace of mind with readiness essentials.
## With the [**4-Week Emergency Food Supply**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFuszAQBp9muYHMejHhwOHPH9FDpR6r5lRtwE7c2rJjO0K8fUVU9To72m_YR2fNNkJ_BMSbXTIggvwHiPfz6tPjy7--1O_nj2N9V2--26_4HxDLFvWf-vul0Z6t22l_qpZRmkVQpce2b0kSKiWr2zgo0xL1HTPhrIiGob2w6g6IUqgWRWVHFEiC8IDY9oQNHwaB89Ih8wXZaCDx3GnY62RnbnNZOaUQfDMHX7nxVkrMz7AJcPJb5JJsKPkRo9t2B3CKfNUZcMpRz5ZdHYzRCeT0KP7TLiBPtH53IhgDqHZWdPIgT4Jq7Os9sErjElfrnM2qBxLXZ9Ic_E8AAAD__yFFZk4) from **My Patriot Supply,** setting up for survival becomes a matter of a single, effortless step.
Even better? For a limited time, this essential food stash is yours for **$50 OFF!** If you're ready to start getting serious about your stockpile, this is the ideal building block. With a whole _month_ of delicious, easy-to-prepare food on hand, you'll be ready to face power outages, evacuations, economic challenges, and more. But this is just the beginning... Once you start taking preparation seriously, you'll be ready to set up a serious stockpile that will last you for months. You'll sleep better at night knowing your family is ready to hold out for the long haul—and it all will have started with this one kit. Whether you're an experienced survivalist or just starting on the road to total readiness, this 4-Week Emergency Food Supply is your plan to fight food insecurity. It's designed to last, offering peace of mind for up to 25 years, ready whenever and wherever you need it. In emergencies, calories are crucial. You need at least 2,000 to make it through each day, and this kit delivers that _and then some_. With options for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and drinks, meal monotony won't be a problem. Instead, you'll find delicious, easy-to-prepare meals to get you through any crisis. [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFuszAQBp9muYHMejHhwOHPH9FDpR6r5lRtwE7c2rJjO0K8fUVU9To72m_YR2fNNkJ_BMSbXTIggvwHiPfz6tPjy7--1O_nj2N9V2--26_4HxDLFvWf-vul0Z6t22l_qpZRmkVQpce2b0kSKiWr2zgo0xL1HTPhrIiGob2w6g6IUqgWRWVHFEiC8IDY9oQNHwaB89Ih8wXZaCDx3GnY62RnbnNZOaUQfDMHX7nxVkrMz7AJcPJb5JJsKPkRo9t2B3CKfNUZcMpRz5ZdHYzRCeT0KP7TLiBPtH53IhgDqHZWdPIgT4Jq7Os9sErjElfrnM2qBxLXZ9Ic_E8AAAD__yFFZk4) Just boil water, add it to the meal mix, and let it simmer for a few minutes. The result? Flavors that defy your expectations of emergency food. Far from your typical "disaster diet," these meals are so delightful that many of our customers dig in _immediately_ without waiting for an emergency to strike. In your kit, you can expect to enjoy comforting, morale-boosting favorites like mac and cheese, mashed potatoes, buttermilk pancakes, and more! The inevitability of another crisis is clear, the question is just "when?" That's why keeping a dependable stockpile of emergency food now is your smartest move. Just stock up and set it aside until it's needed. Yes, it really is that simple. Don't gamble with your survival. Complete this essential first step today, and rest easier knowing that, come what may, your family will have what they need during difficult times. Facing an uncertain future doesn't have to be a solo journey. **My Patriot Supply** has got your back, helping you get ready for whatever challenges might come your way. It doesn't matter what kind of danger or where it's coming from—they're here to get you prepared for _anything._ It's time to take this crucial step. Click the button below and secure a 4-Week Emergency Food Kit for **$50 OFF** per kit! Get one for **EVERY** member of your family. But don't wait! This rare deal ends **SOON.** [_Click here_](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFuszAQBp9muYHMejHhwOHPH9FDpR6r5lRtwE7c2rJjO0K8fUVU9To72m_YR2fNNkJ_BMSbXTIggvwHiPfz6tPjy7--1O_nj2N9V2--26_4HxDLFvWf-vul0Z6t22l_qpZRmkVQpce2b0kSKiWr2zgo0xL1HTPhrIiGob2w6g6IUqgWRWVHFEiC8IDY9oQNHwaB89Ih8wXZaCDx3GnY62RnbnNZOaUQfDMHX7nxVkrMz7AJcPJb5JJsKPkRo9t2B3CKfNUZcMpRz5ZdHYzRCeT0KP7TLiBPtH53IhgDqHZWdPIgT4Jq7Os9sErjElfrnM2qBxLXZ9Ic_E8AAAD__yFFZk4) to start building your food future today.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: A roll of aluminum foil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - __one single dollar__ - we'd be able to hit all of our goals.

Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community.

**I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! [Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. _Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails.

They also hope you stop reading these emails.

They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether._

_**I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either.**_ I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today.

But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can before midnight.

clean_body: I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. | | | | | Friend, I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days. Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you. With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end? If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time. While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals. I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me. And you know what? If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - one single dollar - we'd be able to hit all of our goals. | | - "DONATE $1 >>" | | "DONATE WHATEVER YOU CAN >>" Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community. I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! "Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. I rely on folks like you, who can give $3, $9, or even $18.25 to reach my goals." | | "CHIP IN THE PRICE OF ALUMINUM FOIL >>" Democrats hope I give up on you and stop sending these emails. They also hope you stop reading these emails. They'd love it if we both give up on our conservative values altogether. I won 't give up on you, and I hope you won't quit on me or our shared values either. I know a lot of folks are going to ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what's at stake. If you think you're better off than you were 5 years ago, then I understand why you don't want to donate today. But if you think we need to get this country back on track and restore the American Dream, please donate whatever you can before midnight. | | "DONATE TODAY" | Marco Rubio | | | "Marco Rubio Endorses Young Kim" | "JOIN MARCO!" | Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee 1101 30th St. NW #125 Washington, DC 20007 The appearance of U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

name: Call for a Ceasefire via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Congress approves more U.S. complicity in the atrocities against the Palestinian people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Congress voted last week to send billions more in weapons to Israel.
Bernie made it clear to his colleagues in the Senate that their votes for
this funding bill went against what the American people want and would
continue U.S. complicity in the murder of Palestinian civilians.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16982?t=1011&akid=5885%2E5885482%2EUHecvE ][IMG]

A majority of Americans didn’t want Congress and President Biden to send
Netanyahu more bombs. They did it anyway. But President Biden still has
the opportunity to broker a lasting Peace and it’s the only path forward
to end the murder of Palestinians and starvation of over 1 million people
in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16983?source=email-20240428&t=1012&akid=5885%2E5885482%2EUHecvE ]Add your name: CEASEFIRE NOW! The only way towards Peace is diplomacy,
humanitarian aid, and the end of Netanyahu’s war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16983?source=email-20240428&t=1013&akid=5885%2E5885482%2EUHecvE ]ADD YOUR NAME

Meanwhile, many lawmakers in Congress and Netanyahu are scrambling to
defend the murder of Palestinians any way they can. Congress and President
Biden are taking the hypocritical, immoral position of recognizing the
disastrous humanitarian situation in Gaza and STILL sending more bombs to
Israel. The majority of the American people see through it.

Before the vote, Bernie said, “What we are doing today is very bad policy.
We are aiding and abetting the destruction of the Palestinian people. What
we are doing today is not what the American people want.”

How can President Biden and other lawmakers express concern over the grave
humanitarian situation in Gaza, with over 1 million Palestinians facing
starvation, then send more bombs to Netanyahu’s military?

The only way forward is for President Biden to use his power to broker an
immediate, diplomatice Peace in Israel-Palestine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16983?source=email-20240428&t=1014&akid=5885%2E5885482%2EUHecvE ]Add your name: The U.S. must broker a Ceasefire and end its complicity
with the atrocities against the Palestinian people.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

But President Biden still has the opportunity to broker a lasting Peace and it’s the only path forward to end the murder of Palestinians and starvation of over 1 million people in Gaza. [ ]Add your name: CEASEFIRE NOW! The only way towards Peace is diplomacy, humanitarian aid, and the end of Netanyahu’s war. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Meanwhile, many lawmakers in Congress and Netanyahu are scrambling to defend the murder of Palestinians any way they can. Congress and President Biden are taking the hypocritical, immoral position of recognizing the disastrous humanitarian situation in Gaza and STILL sending more bombs to Israel. The majority of the American people see through it. Before the vote, Bernie said, “What we are doing today is very bad policy. We are aiding and abetting the destruction of the Palestinian people. What we are doing today is not what the American people want.” How can President Biden and other lawmakers express concern over the grave humanitarian situation in Gaza, with over 1 million Palestinians facing starvation, then send more bombs to Netanyahu’s military? The only way forward is for President Biden to use his power to broker an immediate, diplomatice Peace in Israel-Palestine. [ ]Add your name: The U.S. must broker a Ceasefire and end its complicity with the atrocities against the Palestinian people. When we organize, we win. Our Revolution [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: Harry Dunn and I almost died defending the Capitol on January 6th...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
He guarded the stairwell where other officers injured in the attack were held.
#
[
---
My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and on January 6, 2021 I almost died defending the Capitol from insurrectionists inspired by Donald Trump. But I fought back. I fought for our democracy. I'm still fighting for it. So is Capitol Police Officer Harry Dunn. Harry was there on January 6th as well. He guarded the stairwell where other officers injured in the attack were held. He confronted the Trump supporters trying to get into Speaker Pelosi's office. And like me, he endured the racial taunts and physical attacks that he carries with him to this day. Now Harry is running for Congress in Maryland, and his primary is just a few days away. Rest assured that he will protect your rights, your freedom as much as he protected the U.S. Capitol from the horde of violent criminals on Jan 6. But he needs our help to get there: **[Please use this link to split a $5 contribution between Harry Dunn's campaign for Congress and VoteVets today. They both need our support to defend our democracy from the far-right who incited an insurrection on January 6th.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april24-dunn.21HGqL&refcode=em240428-1-30&t=2&akid=25077%2E3013755%2EoXYVCm) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between VoteVets and Harry Dunn instantly:_ | | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-april24-dunn.QKKB4B&refcode=em240428-1-30&t=21&akid=25077%2E3013755%2EoXYVCm)**

Peter,
This year’s election will be the most consequential of our lifetimes.
We know... It seems like we say that every two years. But Peter, it’s the truth. The stakes this November are truly higher than they’ve ever been.
In every recent poll we’ve seen, Donald Trump has been virtually tied with President Biden in Minnesota. The path to the White House runs straight through our state. Trump knows that, and he’s willing to do and spend whatever it takes to flip us red, retake power, and wreak havoc on our reproductive rights, our national security, and our democracy itself.
**But here’s the bottom line: No matter how much money Trump and his campaign spend spreading lies across our state, sowing division, and fomenting hate, it’s no match for our people-powered movement when we’re running at full capacity.**
That’s why every fundraising deadline we have really, really matters this year. And right now, we still need to raise $23,472 by Tuesday to keep our budget on track so we can keep up our critical work.

body:
| I hate to be the bearer of bad news.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2514%2E35263%2EEd-OKO)
Hi Peter — Lexie from Team Baldwin here! As Tammy’s Finance Director, my eyes have been glued to our ActBlue this weekend. We still have ground to make up to reach our grassroots fundraising goal before the deadline on Tuesday, and we’re running out of time to close the gap. I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but we’ve seen a major slowdown in donations over the past few days. **Just take a look for yourself:** [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240428_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2514%2E35263%2EEd-OKO) This is the wrong time to be falling behind. We just learned that our megamillionaire opponent wrote his campaign an $8 million check(!!!) last quarter. But here’s the deal: Tammy isn’t self-funding her campaign or relying on right-wing megadonors to power her reelection. Instead, she’s counting on folks like you, the people she’s accountable to in the Senate. Before the weekend ends, I’m hoping you can help us reverse these troubling trends and put us back on course to reach our end-of-month goal. **[What do you say? Will you rush a donation to help us close the gap to our goal and fight back against our self-funding Republican opponent? body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2842%2E552475%2EMhuANk)
Peter, we know it’s the weekend — so let us quickly explain why we’re reaching out, and why we are [**asking for your contribution before our end-of-month deadline in just two days.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-3?refcode=em20240428-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2842_552475_MhuANk&akid=2842%2E552475%2EMhuANk)
**_Our opponent David McCormick is on the attack._** With the help of his huge personal fortune, Wall Street billionaires, and the national GOP, he is trying to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat.
We are doing everything we can to keep PA blue and re-elect Bob Casey to continue fighting for working families in the Senate. But to fight back, we need you, Peter.
We won’t beat around the bush: **There is no way we can win without grassroots support.** None. And while we know that not every person who reads this email will chip in before this deadline, we’re really hoping that you do.
[**So please, will you chip in your first donation of ANY amount to help us stay in the fight and defend our razor-thin Democratic majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-3?refcode=em20240428-3&recurring=1&refcode2=2842_552475_MhuANk&akid=2842%2E552475%2EMhuANk)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240428-3-el&refcode2=2842_552475_MhuANk&akid=2842%2E552475%2EMhuANk) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240428-3-el&refcode2=2842_552475_MhuANk&akid=2842%2E552475%2EMhuANk) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240428-3-el&refcode2=2842_552475_MhuANk&akid=2842%2E552475%2EMhuANk) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240428-3-el&refcode2=2842_552475_MhuANk&akid=2842%2E552475%2EMhuANk) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240428-3-el&refcode2=2842_552475_MhuANk&akid=2842%2E552475%2EMhuANk) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240428-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240428-3&refcode2=2842_552475_MhuANk&akid=2842%2E552475%2EMhuANk)

Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots. I think that anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21330%2E4449941%2EcuYIGV)
---
Kyrsten Sinema is not running for re-election.

Kari Lake is the presumptive nominee of the Republican Party in Arizona’s U.S. Senate race.

Someone who cozies up to the furthest of the far-right: Steve Bannon, Mike Lindell, Mike Flynn, Roger Stone — and of course, Trump himself.

Someone who supports the near total abortion ban in Arizona and who continues to level baseless and unfounded conspiracies at honorable election workers.

She is a threat to our democracy, and there is nothing she won’t say or do to get elected.

It’s embarrassing. It’s sad. But most of all, it’s dangerous.

Ruben Gallego is the only thing standing in the way of the “MAGA Queen” becoming a United States Senator. And today, he desperately needs your help. subject: Time for AG Tong to Do His Job
body:
Rally to defend our Elections - Wed May 1 | | | | |
---

**Rally for Election Justice**
_Fight Voter Fraud against Attorney General Tong in court_ _to compel him to fulfill his responsibilities._

|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
---

**Fight Voter Fraud, Inc. Takes Groundbreaking Election Integrity Case to Connecticut Supreme Court**

Linda Szynkowicz, Founder and CEO of Fight Voter Fraud Inc., stated: "In our pursuit of election integrity, we've been labeled as 'vigilantes.' Vigilance is our civic duty. Our approach to challenging election fraud in

The Connecticut Supreme Court embodies the very essence of 'We the People' taking a stand for what is right. It's about ensuring that every legal vote is a voice heard, not silenced by unlawful acts. The definition of a 'vigilante' is a member of a self-appointed group of citizens who undertake law enforcement in their community without legal authority, typically because the legal agencies are thought to be inadequate.
' Under **Connecticut State Law, 9-368** , we do have the legal authority. Our fight is for transparency, accountability, and justice."
| | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/ba13e2a5ff04/time-for-ag-tong-to-do-his-job?e=8763c56857)
Dominic For CT * 4 Mariners Way * Branford, CT 06405-4481 * USA

|

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=michigan_ballot_win_4_28_24nd1&n=2)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=michigan_ballot_win_4_28_24nd1&n=3)
Dear Peter,
We have fantastic news to share . . .
Thanks to your unwavering support, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. _has successfully secured his spot on the ballot in the critical swing state of Michigan_! This victory is not just a win for our campaign but a testament to the power of a united, grassroots movement dedicated to restoring integrity and healing America. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Roger Stone, Tucker Carlson, Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| Peter,

Never did I imagine that I would become the right-wing’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. Never.

But if investigating Donald Trump and holding him accountable for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**

If Roger Stone wants to call me a congenital liar and despicable huckster, **so be it** (a pretty rich insult coming from him if I do say so myself).

And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me, as he did in all caps on his social media, “SLIMEBALL ADAM ‘SHIFTY’ SCHIFF, ONE OF THE TRUE LOWLIFES IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS IN AMERICA” for holding him to account over and over and over again, **so be it**.

They are going after me because they know I am effective. Those that don’t concern them — they ignore. _The last place_ Roger Stone or Donald Trump want me to be is in the United States Senate — because they know I will continue to hold their feet to the fire.

[**Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate by splitting $3 or any amount you can spare between Mark Takano and my campaign ahead of our midnight/end of quarter deadline. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83915231/469901372/-1202657106?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20240428_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmVjOTRhZC1iNTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSWrS9SwZPmCUK1gUu1pd4NOaBh2eNsOVvsMmG3cHJ8=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and Mark Takano will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83915237/469901378/-1202657106?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20240428_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmVjOTRhZC1iNTA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSWrS9SwZPmCUK1gUu1pd4NOaBh2eNsOVvsMmG3cHJ8=)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Hypocrite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I call BS. |
#
Team, In recent weeks, Donald Trump has tried to walk back his stances on abortion. After the Arizona Supreme Court upheld the enforcement of a law from 1864, Trump tried to distance himself from the radical decision. He keeps squawking the talking point that abortion rights belong to the states. **I call BS. Folks, Donald Trump IS the reason 1 in 3 American women have lost their freedoms to make their own decisions about abortion.[Chip in to my work to make sure he is defeated this fall.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83916038/469901866/-1723741421?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240428_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjExMGE2NS1iNzA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBKMljUBuEEFS5w7c7Ta88dBtA1x5r7zcSu2sGFR0Zo=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83916039/469901867/-1723741421?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240428_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjExMGE2NS1iNzA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBKMljUBuEEFS5w7c7Ta88dBtA1x5r7zcSu2sGFR0Zo=)
---
Trump stacked the Supreme Court with anti-choice judges. He appointed Cabinet officials who don’t believe in reproductive freedoms. And he’s stacking his campaign with policy advisors who are _already_ drafting executive orders to repeal abortion access should Trump make it back to the White House.
Trump isn’t the only GOP candidate saying one thing about abortion but acting on the contrary. MAGA Republican Senate candidates across the country are “softening their stances on abortion” — but if they make it to the Senate, I know sure as hell that they would vote to restrict abortion access.
**We CANNOT let these candidates back away from their stance on reproductive freedoms. Voters need to know the truth.**
**[I’m doing all I can to amplify how *dangerous* these Republicans’ positions are on abortion. Please chip in to help me defend reproductive freedoms at the ballot box this fall.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83916040/469901868/-1723741421?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240428_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjExMGE2NS1iNzA1LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VBKMljUBuEEFS5w7c7Ta88dBtA1x5r7zcSu2sGFR0Zo=)**

clean_body: I call BS. | Team, In recent weeks, Donald Trump has tried to walk back his stances on abortion. After the Arizona Supreme Court upheld the enforcement of a law from 1864, Trump tried to distance himself from the radical decision. He keeps squawking the talking point that abortion rights belong to the states. I call BS. Folks, Donald Trump IS the reason 1 in 3 American women have lost their freedoms to make their own decisions about abortion.= | = Trump stacked the Supreme Court with anti-choice judges. He appointed Cabinet officials who don’t believe in reproductive freedoms. And he’s stacking his campaign with policy advisors who are already drafting executive orders to repeal abortion access should Trump make it back to the White House. Trump isn’t the only GOP candidate saying one thing about abortion but acting on the contrary. MAGA Republican Senate candidates across the country are “softening their stances on abortion” — but if they make it to the Senate, I know sure as hell that they would vote to restrict abortion access. We CANNOT let these candidates back away from their stance on reproductive freedoms. Voters need to know the truth. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = We have to defend every inch of reproductive freedom we have left. Thanks for joining me in the fight. I need you with me. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

body:
No, not with you. With the Radical Left

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=8972776cc16a44a8bb17d67bf1285f56&_e=o1wZj50HgHOJI_Mf5tA8J5zIt_CmKkhyNtAMi-dSmUx_FLnKiJvYDz0sGYSTwlt6Z7v1IS3M-hsc1UhY89iCKFkjdSPHEC-u2tlbaKp1sLENSdKAb-Map0NtAvjfoGXdOvuwpcNc6JL8eG_WUb7MBO4eUiVyM7i1gs3S9uPRWCLvYWf2qnA_4f8CcDuhOZ48o_IsxPBD9ERVTuEA5Yr-JS-xy7vEWGdkvmyYNYgCROQqLXVryDPIfMzKaSsaliDE3e4pECuowWX2uEU7h2T2cbwNNM_Th4ZUqFo5nIX2RdFBm3muffXahwXMAzUXzpph)

Fellow American,

**I'm itching for a fight.**

No, not some street brawl or bar fight. I'm itching for a fight against some of these WOKE ideologues who think it's okay to defund the police and turn America into a Sanctuary Nation.

I've had it with these radical leftists who want to gentrify our country from proud American Patriots to Illegal Immigrants who are about to vote in our elections without photo ID. **[If you're ready to bring Law and Order back to North Carolina, will you rush a few bucks to my campaign now?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=8972776cc16a44a8bb17d67bf1285f56&_e=o1wZj50HgHOJI_Mf5tA8J5zIt_CmKkhyNtAMi-dSmUx_FLnKiJvYDz0sGYSTwlt6Z7v1IS3M-hsc1UhY89iCKFkjdSPHEC-u2tlbaKp1sLENSdKAb-Map0NtAvjfoGXdHDpbEvN35CvvPF6JjJqy8b8fdj8vhqkHTvHPkzBEEEgOoinfI1qauvJmmSJ1uTK-p0s0i8-ST9xwmcEPsBZapSaD50dJtBUCjZW34dpfAMecZBf570Unie39MFUJ92rBBRYrfJX2Z1bY-GOQEQDCUR-vRCucO913Y5xMeBeS5aToyvLFsAhMhtdPBFrR74ZXvWlq9i1BGhFDPlv5ECLTAg%3D%3D)**

In Congress, I've been one of the toughest and most outspoken conservatives. As a member of the judiciary committee and the subcommittee on the weaponization of the federal government, I fought the Biden administration's dangerous policies, exposed the federal government's abuses against the Trump presidency, and held my fellow Republicans accountable to our conservative principles.

I don't plan on stopping that fight as North Carolina's Attorney General.

**[But I need your help to get there. Will you send my campaign $5 or more now?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=8972776cc16a44a8bb17d67bf1285f56&_e=o1wZj50HgHOJI_Mf5tA8J5zIt_CmKkhyNtAMi-dSmUx_FLnKiJvYDz0sGYSTwlt6Z7v1IS3M-hsc1UhY89iCKFkjdSPHEC-u2tlbaKp1sLENSdKAb-Map0NtAvjfoGXdHDpbEvN35CvvPF6JjJqy8b8fdj8vhqkHTvHPkzBEEEhdkDDJou6g3OiFWBQSoBatibkCFim9_wppx1khfO8Jc3tKRgFpDDM1o2K_8rCARx0gH_J8ct251KHyTPSOEGpp1PUN0y_vWq6PrRhgkPnh8LCFtlMG7PeMALhDi4QH7SVPHFdgRRBrP1U5rWjYo8v9KzRZMI2fPd9msWDNsQ86MQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your support,

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here’s where we are on student debt cancellation:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2150%2E4032634%2EvWqNU2)
---
Usually, progress doesn’t follow a straight line. It takes twists and turns. It comes with stops and starts. But if we keep at it, we can make real change. And student debt cancellation is a prime example. Naysayers dismissed it as pie-in-the-sky. A far-right Supreme Court laid down giant roadblocks. But families are now getting relief, with more on the way. It can be hard to keep track of all the latest developments, so here’s a quick summary:
* President Biden has now delivered $153 billion in student loan relief to 4.3 million borrowers, including nurses, teachers, and other public servants who’ve been paying down their debt for years and years already.
* He’s launched a new income-driven repayment plan with 8 million enrollees, where most borrowers pay $0 a month.
* And he just announced new proposals that would bring the grand total of Americans receiving relief to 30 million.

Even though right-wing extremists on the Supreme Court substituted their own ideology for the rule of law and blocked the president’s broad-based student debt cancellation plan, he’s still finding ways to lift this crushing burden off people’s shoulders. And even though critics and cynics claimed that student debt relief was impossible when we first started talking about it, it’s now making a real difference in millions of Americans’ lives. With millions more to come. Experts kept illuminating how student loan debt was holding people back from launching new businesses, becoming homeowners, and even starting a family. Borrowers kept sharing their personal stories. Activists and activists kept up the pressure on Washington. I kept working alongside colleagues and organizers and this whole grassroots team. **Together, we took student debt cancellation from “impossible” to $153 billion of debt canceled — and counting.** **We can keep following that same roadmap to make more change that reaches more families. Like ensuring universal child care. And tackling the housing affordability crisis. And making technical schools, community colleges, and public universities tuition-free.** [**It starts with growing our grassroots movement, person to person, one grassroots contribution at a time. Can you pitch in with a donation right now to keep up the fight for bold reforms that touch people’s lives?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2121?t=8&akid=2150%2E4032634%2EvWqNU2)

name: Debbie
subject: I'm not a megamillionaire like Rick Scott, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
full disclosure —
| | |
---
Hi, friend — this is important:
**I need you to understand that in a little over 48 hours, our campaign will face our biggest end-of-month goal of the election year yet.**
Everyone from Rick Scott to Mitch McConnell to cable news pundits will want to see what we raise — and they _will_ use it to judge our movement's strength.
I'm telling you this because I just left my last finance meeting before the Tuesday night deadline. **Full disclosure: My finance director says we've still got a $33,104 gap to close our $800,000 goal — and as of this morning, the rate donations are coming in will not be enough to close it in time.**
To put it plainly, we cannot afford to fall short here.**Rick Scott is one of the richest senators in the country. He can cut himself a _massive_ check whenever he wants.**
**I'm not a megamillionaire like Scott, friend,** and this people-powered campaign relies on grassroots donations from supporters like you. And winning this November will come down to staying on top of even our most ambitious grassroots goals.
**At this team's most important fundraising deadline to date, our fundraising numbers this quarter will set the tone for the rest of this race.[So please, help me make up the shortfall with your donation of $5 or more to ensure we can stay on track to retire Rick Scott, flip Florida blue, and save our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/83916770/469902462/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1154-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmY3ODE1MDYtYmEwNS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SZpSyx9fF0bojF5WNZytcwPzcouMO2ALZP-DybxNkoc=)**

clean_body: full disclosure — | | | Hi, friend — this is important: I need you to understand that in a little over 48 hours, our campaign will face our biggest end-of-month goal of the election year yet. Everyone from Rick Scott to Mitch McConnell to cable news pundits will want to see what we raise — and they will use it to judge our movement's strength. I'm telling you this because I just left my last finance meeting before the Tuesday night deadline. Full disclosure: My finance director says we've still got a $33,104 gap to close our $800,000 goal — and as of this morning, the rate donations are coming in will not be enough to close it in time. To put it plainly, we cannot afford to fall short here.Rick Scott is one of the richest senators in the country. He can cut himself a massive check whenever he wants. I'm not a megamillionaire like Scott, friend, and this people-powered campaign relies on grassroots donations from supporters like you. And winning this November will come down to staying on top of even our most ambitious grassroots goals. At this team's most important fundraising deadline to date, our fundraising numbers this quarter will set the tone for the rest of this race.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Really, friend — thank you for everything. I can't do it without you. Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
